name: Gajendra Verma
about: Gajendra Verma is a multifaceted artist who wears many hats - singer, arranger, lyricist, and sound recordist. His rise to fame began when his song Emptiness, also known as Tune Mere Jaana, inadvertently went viral online. The song, which was created over seven years prior, was misattributed to a tragic story about a student named Rohan Rathore, and it garnered over 40 million views on YouTube. Verma's subsequent releases have been equally impressive, with his 2018 song Tera Ghata racking up an impressive 450+ million views on the platform. With a talent for crafting resonant melodies, Gajendra Verma has established himself as a notable figure in the music industry, making him an excellent choice for live performances at various events. His unique sound and style have the potential to make any occasion unforgettable.

name: Sachet Parampara
about: Sachet Tandon and Parampara Thakur, collectively known as Sachet Parampara, are a talented duo that rose to prominence after competing in the inaugural season of The Voice India in 2015. The following year, they decided to join forces and create music together. Initially, the pair built a following by sharing their music on YouTube and other online platforms. Their heartfelt renditions of devotional songs, released independently on social media, quickly gained traction and earned them widespread recognition. This exposure led to their first major breakthrough, composing music for the film 'Kabir Singh'. The song's success marked the beginning of a fruitful career, with subsequent releases including Bekhayali, Mere Sohneya, Tum Hi Aana, Dil Mein Ho Tum, Sachiyan Mohabbatan, Humrah, and Maiyya Mainu, among others. With their soulful sound and growing discography, Sachet Parampara has established themselves as a notable force in the music industry. Their unique blend of talent and dedication has captivated audiences, making them an exciting prospect for live events and performances.

name: Guru Randhawa
about: Guru Randhawa has established himself as a prominent figure in the Punjabi music scene, captivating audiences with his diverse range of songs. His musical career began in 2012 with the release of Same Girl, followed by his debut album Page One in 2013, which featured three notable tracks. Over the years, Randhawa has garnered numerous accolades, including the PTC Music Award for Best Debut Male for his song Patola in 2014, as well as the Best Duo Song award for the same track in 2016. He has also received the Youth Icon Award from News 24 in 2017 and the prestigious Dada Saheb Phalke International Film Festival Award in 2019. With a career spanning multiple successful years, Guru Randhawa continues to be a sought-after performer for various events, including weddings, live concerts, and college shows, showcasing his talent and entertaining crowds with his unique sound. His extensive list of achievements is a testament to his dedication and passion for music, solidifying his position as a leading artist in the industry.

name: Arijit Singh
about: Arijit Singh has established himself as a prominent figure in Bollywood, renowned for his soulful voice and versatility in singing various genres, including Sufi, Qawwali, Western classical, Pop, Folk Indian, Classical, and EDM. His musical journey in the industry began with the song 'Phir Mohabbat' in the 2011 film Murder 2, and since then, he has captivated audiences worldwide with his emotive performances. Arijit's immense popularity is reflected in his impressive streaming records. According to Spotify, he was the most-streamed Indian artist between 2020 and 2023. Additionally, he holds the distinction of being the second most-followed artist globally and the most followed Asian artist on the platform. Throughout his career, Arijit has accumulated numerous awards and accolades, solidifying his position as a talented and influential artist. With his extensive range and captivating stage presence, Arijit Singh is an exceptional choice for live concerts, offering an unforgettable experience for fans. His discography boasts an array of hit tracks that have resonated with listeners across the globe, making him a sought-after performer in the entertainment industry.

name: Balraj Shastri
about: Balraj Shastri is a talented vocalist with a unique voice that has captivated audiences across India. His participation in the popular reality TV show 'Om Shanti Om' on Star Bharat earned him the title of The King of Sweet Voice from esteemed judges Shekhar Ravjiani, Kanika Kapoor, and Sachin-Jigar. Additionally, he received praise from renowned artists such as Shankar Mahadevan, Sonu Nigam, and Udit Narayan. With a strong educational foundation in music, Balraj Shastri has honed his craft to mesmerize his audience. He seamlessly blends his singing talent with entertaining stage presence, making him a rare find. Since his debut performance in Mumbai at the age of 16, he has performed in over 200 shows across the country. His versatility allows him to adapt to various events, including corporate functions, university concerts, weddings, and intimate unplugged performances. Balraj Shastri's extensive experience and repertoire make him an ideal choice for a wide range of events. His soulful voice and engaging stage presence are sure to leave a lasting impression on his audience. With his talent and charisma, he can elevate any occasion, from college festivals to private gatherings and corporate events.

about: Raag Mehta, a vocalist rooted in Indian classical music, has diversified his artistic expression by incorporating Bollywood, Punjabi, and Gujarati folk songs into his extensive repertoire. This eclectic blend has enabled him to connect with a broad audience, transcending cultural boundaries. His dynamic performances span a wide range of events, including Bollywood Unplugged, fusion shows, ghazal nights, corporate functions, weddings, and college gatherings, both within India and internationally. Notably, Raag Mehta has also ventured into music composition, with his Gujarati folk song 'Nav Navrat' garnering over 1 million views on YouTube in a remarkably short period. Furthermore, he has had the privilege of performing at Gujarat Samachar Samanvay on multiple occasions, leaving a lasting impression on the audience with his captivating voice.

about: Hailing from Gujarat, Payal Patel is a skilled singer with a strong foundation in Indian classical music, which she began studying at a young age. One of her notable achievements includes the significant online success of her rendition of 'Aapki Nazro ne Samjha', which garnered a substantial number of views on YouTube in a remarkably short period. Payal's versatility as a performer is evident in the diverse range of live events she participates in, including weddings, garba celebrations, intimate unplugged nights, and corporate functions, all of which have been well-received by audiences across India. name: Samrat Sarkar
about: With his band by his side, Samrat has embarked on a globe-trotting journey, performing in a multitude of cities worldwide. His travels have taken him to iconic destinations such as London, Sydney, and Dubai, as well as vibrant cities like Singapore, Cape Town, and Kuala Lumpur. He's also had the opportunity to entertain audiences in the picturesque Langkawi Islands, Bangkok, Phuket, and Bali. Closer to home, Samrat has toured extensively throughout India, covering almost every major city. A notable highlight of his career was in 2008, when he shared the stage with rock legend Bryan Adams at the prestigious Palace Gardens, an experience that undoubtedly left a lasting impression.

name: Darshan Raval
about: Darshan Raval has established himself as a talented singer, songwriter, and composer in the Hindi and Gujarati music scenes. His journey to stardom began with his appearance on the reality show India's Raw Star in 2014, which catapulted him to widespread recognition. With a devoted fan base, known as the 'Blue Family', Darshan has built a loyal following across the country. His discography boasts an array of hit songs, including Saajan Ve, Mahiye Jinna Sohna, which has garnered over 67 million views, as well as Piya Re, Jannat Ve, and Tum Mere. He has also lent his voice to notable tracks like Kabhii Tumhhe from the film Shershaah. Darshan's songs have become synonymous with festive celebrations, particularly during Navaratri. His tracks Chogada from the film Loveyatri and Kamariya from the film Mitron have become anthems, shattering records and solidifying his position as a leading voice in the industry. With a growing repertoire of hits, Darshan Raval continues to make his mark on the music world.

From her early days as a YouTube sensation to her breakthrough in Bollywood, Shirley has consistently demonstrated her versatility as a singer, performer, and recording artist. Her notable releases include Hoodie, Faasla, and Sach Bata Mujhe, showcasing her growth and range. Within a remarkably short period, Shirley achieved her Bollywood debut, topped the charts with an original song, and collaborated with prominent artists like DJ Chetas and Atif Aslam on Jab Koi Baat. Her impressive portfolio includes work with esteemed Bollywood composers and singers, such as Sachin-Jigar, Ehsaan & Loy, Arko Pravo Mukherjee, Jubin Nautiyal, and Raftaar. name: Osman Mir
about: Born on May 2, 1974, in Vayor, Kutch, Gujarat, India, Osman Mir has established himself as a versatile Indian playback singer. His musical journey began with the release of the song Mor Bani Thanghat Kare in the 2013 film Goliyon Ki Raasleela Ram Leela. This marked the starting point of his successful career, which has since spanned multiple genres and languages, including Hindi and Gujarati films. Osman's early introduction to music was as a tabla player, and he later transitioned to singing, making his debut performance in Ahmedabad. His repertoire encompasses a wide range of styles, from Bhajan and Ghazal to Semi-Classical and Sugam, as well as traditional Gujarati folk music. He has also lent his voice to numerous Gujarati films, totaling 58 movie soundtracks. With thousands of public performances under his belt, Osman has had the opportunity to showcase his talent globally, performing in 25 countries worldwide. His formal training in music began under the guidance of his father, followed by official mentorship from Ismalbhai Datar. Osman's Bollywood debut was marked by his rendition of the Gujarati folk song Mor Bani Thanghat Kare in the film Goliyon Ki Rasleela Ram-Leela. He continues to entertain audiences with his live concerts, accompanied by his band, in various cities across India and around the globe.

about: Mohit Chauhan is a talented musician who has made a lasting impact on the Bollywood music scene. Throughout his career, Chauhan has delivered a string of memorable hits, such as Tum Se Hi, Kuchh Khaas Hai, Masakali, Yeh Dooriyan, Tune Jo Na Kaha, and Pee Loon. about: Kuhu Gracia is a talented vocalist and dynamic live performer, known for her ability to captivate audiences with her soulful voice. With a wide-ranging repertoire, she effortlessly navigates multiple genres, including Hindi, English, Punjabi, retro, and semi-classical Hindi songs. Her online presence is impressive, with millions of viewers tuning in to watch her cover songs. Some of her most popular covers, such as O Saathi, Humsafar, Thodi Der, and Gali Me Aaj Chand Nikla, have garnered over 3 million views. Kuhu has also had the opportunity to collaborate with notable music labels like Devotees Insanos Records. In recent years, she has released a string of original songs, including 90's Vibe, Zara Sa, and Dil Ibadat, which have further solidified her position as a rising star in the music industry. With her unique voice and versatility, Kuhu Gracia is an exciting talent to watch, and her live performances are sure to leave a lasting impression on music lovers of all ages.

name: Gurashish Singh
about: Gurashish Singh is a talented artist known for his captivating vocals, which have gained him a significant following online. With a strong presence on YouTube, he has become a sought-after performer for various events. His YouTube channel, Singh's Unplugged, has garnered an impressive 62 million views and attracted over 600,000 subscribers from around the globe. The channel's unique selling point is its eclectic mix of mashups, which have become a hallmark of Gurashish's style. From blending popular Hindi and English tracks to creating original compositions, his content showcases his versatility as an artist. By offering a fresh take on familiar tunes, Gurashish has built a loyal fan base that appreciates his creative approach to music. His performances are perfect for a range of events, including live concerts, weddings, college festivals, and private gatherings, making him a great addition to any occasion.

name: Tony Kakkar
about: Tony Kakkar has carved a niche for himself in the music scene with a diverse range of hits that cater to different tastes. Alongside his sisters, Neha Kakkar and Sonu Kakkar, he has made a significant impact on the industry. His solo tracks, including 'Ankhiyan', 'Car Mein Music Baja', 'Mile Ho Tum', and 'Lori Suna', have garnered immense popularity. With a repertoire that spans energetic party anthems and heartfelt romantic ballads, Tony Kakkar is a versatile artist who can elevate any event. His music has resonated with audiences, making him a sought-after performer for live concerts, weddings, college festivals, and private events.

name: Jignesh Kaviraj
about: Gujarati singer and actor Jignesh Kaviraj has established himself as a prominent figure in the music scene. With an impressive discography of over 150 singles, his music has resonated with audiences worldwide. One of his most notable releases, Hath Ma Chhe Whisky, has garnered an astonishing 80 million views on YouTube. Jignesh's energetic live performances have been a staple at Garba Nights, Dandiya programs, and Dairas across Gujarat and internationally. His versatility and charisma on stage have made him a sought-after performer for events globally. For those interested in learning more about his performance schedule and details, further information is available upon request.

name: Geeta Rabari
about: Hailing from the vibrant region of Kutch, Geeta Rabari has earned the affectionate title of Kutch Ni Koyal among her fans. This Gujarati folk singer has made a lasting impact with her soulful voice, particularly with the massive hit Rona Sema, which has garnered an impressive 570 million views on YouTube, making it the most-watched Gujarati song to date. Geeta's extensive discography boasts an array of captivating songs, including Ma Tara Ashirvad, Dev Dwarika Vada, and Diva Ni Divete, each one showcasing her unique talent and resonating with her audience. Her high-energy garba performances have electrified events both within Gujarat and on the international stage, with appearances in the USA, Canada, Australia, the UK, and Dubai. With her infectious enthusiasm and authentic Gujarati style, Geeta Rabari brings a unique flavor to every event she attends. For those seeking to infuse their gatherings with traditional Gujarati charm, Geeta's performances promise an unforgettable experience. Her talent and charisma have solidified her position as a leading figure in Gujarati folk music, making her a sought-after artist for events around the world.

faq.question: How much does Geeta Rabari charge for a garba concert?
faq.answer: The garba concert fees for Geeta Rabari vary depending on the type of event, such as a wedding sangeet, college show or a public concert. To get the exact booking price for Geeta Rabari live program, please share your event details with us, and we will provide you with all the necessary information, including her fees, travel, accommodation, and other requirements.

faq.question: What type of events does Geeta Rabari specialize in?
faq.answer: Geeta Rabari is known for her energetic performances at Garba nights, wedding sangeets, Lok dayro (folk song) events, and other live garba concerts.

faq.question: How to contact Geeta Rabari for show booking?
faq.answer: To book Geeta Rabari for your next event, please contact us with the details of your event. We will assist you in arranging her performance, ensuring all booking details are handled smoothly.

faq.question: What is the typical duration of Geeta Rabari's live performance?
faq.answer: Geeta Rabari typically performs for approx 180 minutes on stage, delivering an unforgettable experience with her powerful voice and engaging presence.

faq.question: What is the process to book Geeta Rabari for a live concert or a private event?
faq.answer:
To book Geeta Rabari for a live concert or private event, follow these steps:
      1. Share event details with us, including date, city, venue, and organization name.
      2. We'll check if Geeta Rabari is available on your chosen date.
      3. If available, we'll provide details on artist fees, travel, accommodation, and technical needs.
      4. If you're okay with the details, we'll send a contract for you to sign.
      5. Once the contract is signed, we can proceed with the necessary advances to secure the booking.

name: Vijay Suvada
about: Vijay Suvada has established himself as a prominent figure in Gujarati folk music and acting. One of his recent releases, Tu Jone Ne Jone Mata, garnered significant attention on the Soorpancham Beats YouTube channel, surpassing 15 million views in a remarkably short period. His previous single, Mohabbat Khape Biju Kai Na Khape, achieved substantial success on the Studio Saraswati Official YouTube Channel, with over 25 million views. Vijay's performances have taken him to various cities in Gujarat and around the world, where he has entertained audiences with his energetic Dandiya programs, Garba Nights, and Dairas, as well as wedding shows. His discography continues to grow with recent releases like Touch Ma Rejo, Pasand Amari, and Vadlo. With his impressive repertoire and captivating stage presence, Vijay Suvada is a sought-after artist for live events and music festivals, bringing his unique blend of traditional Gujarati folk music to audiences everywhere.

name: Kajal Maheriya
about: Hailing from the vibrant region of Kutch, Gujarat, Kajal Maheriya is a talented singer rooted in Gujarati folk music. Her powerful voice has brought to life iconic songs such as Bewafa Tune Mujko Pagal Kar Diya, Banvu Chhe Tari Ladi, and Rota Meli Ne Tame Chalya Re Gaya, which have gained significant attention on the Studio Saraswati Official YouTube channel. With a diverse repertoire, Kajal Maheriya's performances have captivated audiences across Gujarat and India. Her music encompasses a range of genres, including Garba shows, Diaras, and traditional Gujarati folk events, making her a sought-after artist for weddings and other celebrations. Recent releases like Tame mane Gamo Cho, Mannat, and Haccha Prem Na Parkha have further solidified her position in the music scene. Kajal's soulful voice and energetic stage presence have made her a favorite among fans, who appreciate her unique ability to connect with listeners through her songs. Explore her discography to discover more of her popular tracks and experience the essence of Gujarati folk music.

name: Sukhbir Singh
about: Sukhbir Singh, affectionately referred to as the 'Prince of Bhangra', has made a name for himself in the music industry by seamlessly blending traditional Punjabi sounds with global styles. His distinctive approach to Bhangra incorporates elements of rap, techno, and reggae, creating a unique sound that sets him apart. What makes Sukhbir's music truly special is his incorporation of authentic Bhangra instruments, such as the dhol and dholak, which add an extra layer of depth and cultural richness to his songs. His debut album, 'New Stylee', was a critically acclaimed success, earning him awards for Best Debut Album, Best Male Vocalist, and Best Music Video at the Channel V Awards. Sukhbir's high-energy live performances are a testament to his passion and dedication to his craft. With a repertoire that includes hits like 'Sauda Khara Khara', 'Nachdi', and 'OH Ho Ho Ho', he has the ability to captivate and entertain audiences from all walks of life. Whether he's performing at a live concert, wedding, college festival, or private event, Sukhbir's infectious energy is sure to leave a lasting impression. With a career built on innovation and creativity, Sukhbir continues to push the boundaries of Punjabi music, making him a sought-after artist for events and performances.

name: Neeti Mohan
about: With a voice that has captivated audiences nationwide, Neeti Mohan stands as a prominent figure in the Bollywood playback singing scene. Her melodious tone has earned her a special place in the hearts of music lovers. Neeti's impressive repertoire is marked by numerous accolades, including the prestigious Filmfare RD Burman Award for New Music Talent, which she received for her rendition of Ishq Wala Love from the film Student of the Year. Additionally, she was nominated for Best Female Playback Singer for her powerful performance in Jiya Re. Her collaborations have also garnered significant attention, such as Nachle Na, a duet with Guru Randhawa, which has amassed over 35 million views in a remarkably short span. Some of her other notable recent releases include Mere Yaaraa, Naari, Meri Jaan, and Kithe Reh Gaya, further solidifying her position as a talented vocalist in the industry.

name: Aishwarya Majmudar
about: Aishwarya Majmudar is a talented vocalist who has made a name for herself in the Bollywood music scene and on reality television. Her journey to stardom began at a young age, when she won the prestigious STAR Voice of India – Chhote Ustad competition at just 15 years old. Aishwarya's experience in the music industry also includes her participation in the popular show 'Music Ka Maha Muqabala', where she was a valued member of Himesh Reshamiya's team. With a diverse range of credits to her name, Aishwarya has brought her unique voice to numerous songs in both Bollywood and Gujarati cinema. Her impressive repertoire and captivating stage presence make her an exciting performer to watch, suitable for a variety of events, from live concerts and wedding celebrations to college festivals and private gatherings.

faq.question: How much does Aishwarya Majmudar charge for a garba event?
faq.answer: The charges for booking Aishwarya Majmudar vary depending on the type of event, such as a Garba show, wedding, college or corporate event. To get an accurate quote, please provide your event details, and we will get back to you with her booking price, including travel and accommodation costs.

faq.question: What type of events does Aishwarya Majmudar specialize in?
faq.answer: Aishwarya Majmudar is renowned for her energetic Garba shows and also performs at weddings, corporate events, college shows, and private events. Her dynamic stage presence makes her a perfect fit for various occasions.

faq.question: How to contact Aishwarya Majmudar for show booking?
faq.answer: To book Aishwarya Majmudar for your event, please contact us with the event details. We will assist you in arranging her performance and provide all necessary booking information.

faq.question: What is the typical duration of Aishwarya Majmudar's live performance?
faq.answer: Aishwarya Majmudar typically performs for 180 minutes in Garba shows and 90-120 minutes in Bollywood shows, delivering an electrifying performance that captivates audiences.

faq.question: What are the sound or technical requirements for Aishwarya Majmudar?
faq.answer: Upon booking confirmation, we will provide a detailed list of sound and technical requirements necessary for Aishwarya Majmudar's performance, ensuring a seamless event.

To book Aishwarya Majmudar for a live concert or private event, follow these steps:
1. Share event details with us, including date, city, venue, and organization name.
2. We'll check if Aishwarya Majmudar is available on your chosen date.
3. If available, we'll provide details on artist fees, travel, accommodation, and technical needs.
4. If you're okay with the details, we'll send a contract for you to sign.
5. Once the contract is signed, we can proceed with the necessary advances to secure the booking.

faq.question: How to get Aishwarya Majmudar's contact number for booking?
faq.answer: To get in touch with Aishwarya Majmudar for booking, please contact us with your event details, and we will facilitate the communication and provide all necessary booking information.

name: Sunanda Sharma
about: Sunanda Sharma is a multifaceted artist, excelling in both the Bollywood and Punjabi entertainment industries as a singer and actress. With a strong online presence, she has garnered a significant following on YouTube, which has paved the way for her successful career as a playback singer. Her discography boasts an array of hit songs, including 'Billi Akh' and 'Tere Naal Nachna', which have resonated with audiences. Recently, she has released songs such as 'Saadi Yaad', 'Chori Chori', 'Duji vaar Pyaar', and 'Sandal', further solidifying her position in the music scene. In addition to her music, Sunanda has also ventured into acting, with a notable role in the film 'Sajjan Singh Rangroot', where she shared the screen with Diljit Dosanjh and Yograj Singh. With her unique blend of talent, charm, and performance skills, Sunanda Sharma is an exciting prospect for events. Her versatility makes her an ideal choice for a range of occasions, from live concerts and wedding celebrations to college festivals and private gatherings.

name: Aastha Gill
about: Aastha Gill is a talented Bollywood playback singer known for her high-energy performances. With a career spanning several years, she has lent her voice to some of the most popular dance tracks in the industry. Her Bollywood debut came in 2014 with the song Dhup Chik from the movie Fugly, which featured rap stars Raftaar and Badshah. This was followed by hits like Abhi Toh Party Shuru Hui and DJ Waley Babu, also in collaboration with Badshah. As a live performer, Aastha Gill brings a infectious energy to the stage, engaging audiences with her catchy songs and dance moves. Her repertoire includes recent releases like Saawariya, Drunk N High, and Dhoondein Sitaare. Whether it's a live concert, wedding, college festival, or private event, Aastha Gill is sure to get the crowd moving. With her unique voice and charismatic stage presence, she is an excellent choice for events looking to feature a talented and versatile performer.

name: Atif Aslam
about: Atif Aslam is a multifaceted Pakistani artist, renowned for his soulful voice as a playback singer and his talents as an actor. His musical repertoire spans multiple languages, including Hindi, Urdu, and Bengali, and encompasses a range of genres such as film pop, Bollywood, and Sufi music. Aslam is also a skilled guitarist, adding another layer to his artistic depth. Aslam's foray into acting began with the 2011 Pakistani film Bol, marking the start of his journey in the film industry. He has since lent his voice to numerous Pakistani films, including Ho Mann Jahaan and Actor in Law. Atif's vocal talents have also been featured in a multitude of Indian films, with credits including Bas Ek Pal, Race, Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani, Prince, Tere Naal Love Ho Gaya, Race 2, Jayantabhai Ki Luv Story, A Flying Jatt, Hindi Medium, Qarib Qarib Singlle, Tiger Zinda Hai, and Baaghi 2, among others.

name: Rekha Bhardwaj
about: Rekha Bhardwaj is a renowned Bollywood playback singer known for her captivating live performances. With a voice that exudes raw emotion, she effortlessly navigates a wide range of musical styles, from classical to upbeat dance tracks. Throughout her career, Rekha Bhardwaj has garnered numerous accolades, including two Filmfare Awards and a National Award. Her versatility as a singer is evident in her ability to perform in multiple languages, having lent her voice to films in Bengali, Marathi, Punjabi, Malayalam, and Hindi. Some of her notable recent releases include Ram Sita - 14 Phere, Vedha Sajjeya, and Saware, showcasing her enduring talent and appeal.

name: Abhijeet Sawant
about: Born on October 7, 1981, in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India, Abhijeet Sawant is a multifaceted Indian artist. His career spans several fields, including playback singing, television acting, and anchoring. His rise to fame began with his win on the inaugural season of Indian Idol. He also demonstrated his talent by finishing as the first runner-up on Clinic All Clear – Jo Jeeta Wohi Superstar and securing third place on Asian Idol. In addition to his television appearances, Abhijeet has released his own solo album, Junoon, which debuted on July 10, 2007. His film credits include roles in the movies Lottery and Tees Maar Khan, showcasing his versatility as a performer.

name: Amaal Mallik
about: Amaal Mallik is a multi-talented musician who has made a significant impact on the Indian music scene. With a passion for music that began at a young age, Amaal has honed his craft alongside his brother, Armaan Mallik. As a skilled instrumentalist and vocalist, he has lent his voice to numerous popular tracks and composed music for various films. His notable compositions include Kaun Tujhe from the film M.S. Dhoni, Bol Do Na Zara from Azhar, and Sooraj Dooba Hai from Roy, among others. He has also worked on songs like Soch Na Sake Recreated for Airlift, Ghar Se Nikalte Hi, and Kar Gayi Chull for Kapoor & Sons. Some of his other notable works include Hua Hai Aaj Pahli Baar from Sanam Re and the single Aaja Na Ferrari Mein. Recently, Amaal has released new songs such as Pyaar …Ek Tarfaa, Tujhe Chaahta Hoon Kyun, and Tu Mera Nahi, further showcasing his musical prowess.

name: Shraddha Sharma
about: Shraddha Sharma's music career took off in 2011 when she began posting cover songs on YouTube. Her rendition of Haal-e-Dil caught the attention of a wide audience, quickly going viral and propelling her into the spotlight. As her fan base grew, so did her reputation as a talented and relatable performer. With her down-to-earth personality and authentic style, Shraddha has built a massive following worldwide. Today, she stands as one of India's most prominent YouTube artists, with her popularity continuing to soar as she connects with listeners on a global scale.

name: Siddharth Slathia
about: Hailing from Jammu and Kashmir, Sidharth Slathia has been making waves in the Indian music scene with his versatile voice. His musical journey began in 2009 when he started sharing cover songs on YouTube, alongside offering classical vocal music lessons. Over time, his channel has grown to feature a diverse range of covers, with Channa Mereya emerging as his most popular upload. Recent releases include soulful renditions of Tumhe Dillagi, Ishq Hai Tumse, and Kaash. Citing Sonu Nigam as a key influence, Sidharth has developed a unique sound that resonates with fans. With a substantial following of over 2 million subscribers on his official YouTube channel, Sidharth Slathia is an artist to watch in the Indian music industry, having also showcased his creativity with a 10-style rendition of the hit song Tum Hi Ho.

name: Desi Swagg
about: Danielle Rebello and Silvina Fernandes form the dynamic duo known as The Desi Swagg. With their impressive live performances, they have consistently drawn in packed crowds and captivated their audience. The duo's vocal talents span across two genres, showcasing their skill in both Bollywood and English music, with Danielle and Silvina bringing their unique blend of styles to the stage.

name: Nakash Aziz
about: Nakash Aziz, a versatile singer, has been making waves in the music industry with his recent contributions to TV serials and ad jingles for prominent brands such as Asian Paints, Hyundai, UltraTech Cement, and Microsoft. His upcoming projects will focus on music recording and production, further showcasing his artistic range. With a repertoire of hit Bollywood songs like Saree Ke Fall Sa from R Rajkumar, Pungi from Agent Pungi, and Dhating Naach from Phata Poster Nikhla Hero, Nakash Aziz has established himself as a talented vocalist. He has also had the opportunity to work with renowned music directors Pritam and A R Rahman on films like Delhi 6, Rockstar, Jab Tak Hai Jaan, and Raanjhanaa. Additionally, he has lent his voice to A R Rahman's compositions in the Tamil film Mariyan and the Commonwealth Games theme song. His latest releases include songs from Badhaai Do and Tuesday & Friday. Nakash Aziz's experience in the music industry is extensive, with collaborations on high-profile projects like the Olympics Song 2012, directed by Danny Boyle. His work continues to evolve, with a steady stream of new music and exciting endeavors on the horizon.

name: Ash King
about: Born Ashutosh Ganguly on August 3, 1980, in London, Ash King is a multifaceted Indian artist with a strong background in music. As a vocalist, lyricist, and author, he has made a name for himself in the industry. His family's rich musical heritage, which includes a connection to the legendary Kishore Kumar, has undoubtedly influenced his passion for music. Ash King's introduction to Bollywood came through his collaboration with the renowned composer A. R. Rahman on the film Delhi-6. This marked the beginning of a successful streak, with hits like Te Amo from Dum Maaro Dum, I Love You from Bodyguard, and Suno Aisha from Aisha. In addition to his work in India, Ash King has also performed in the UK, where he has co-written and sung songs like Love Is Blind with artist Ramzi. Growing up in a family of musicians, Ash King's exposure to music began at a young age. His grandfather, Brajendra Lal Ganguly, was a prominent figure in Indian classical music, having taught at Rabindranath Tagore's institution, Shantiniketan. His father, too, had performed with notable artists like Shankar in the 1960s. Ash King's home was also a hub for musical influences, with visitors like George Harrison, who shared an interest in Indian classical music. Ash King's versatility has led to collaborations with international artists, including a remix of Lady Gaga's Just Dance, which was featured on the Asian release of her album. He has also worked with artists like Hard Kaur on the song Look for Me. Recently, Ash King has released new songs, including Mera Yaar, Is it Love, and Aao Milo, solidifying his position as a talented and diverse artist in the music industry.

name: Ankit Tiwari
about: Born on March 6, 1986, in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India, Ankit is a prominent figure in the Indian music industry. As a playback singer and conductor, he has carved out a successful career, earning recognition as one of the highest-paid artists in his field. His impressive array of awards includes accolades from the Guild Awards, BIG Star Entertainment Awards, Filmfare Awards, GIMA Awards, IIFA Awards, Mirchi Music Awards, Screen Awards, Stardust Awards, and Zee Cine Awards, showcasing his expertise as a conductor and singer. Ankit's collaboration with Mithoon and Jeet Gannguli led to a shared Filmfare Award for Best Conductor, with the team also receiving awards from other notable ceremonies, such as the IIFA Awards and Zee Cine Awards. In addition to his work in music direction, Ankit has been nominated for Best Male Playback Singer at the Filmfare Awards, and went on to win the award for his rendition of Galliyan. Some of his recent notable song releases include Mehfooz Hai, Juda Hojaye, and Aaram De, further solidifying his presence in the music industry.

name: Papon
about: Hailing from Assam, Papon is a versatile Indian artist who has made a name for himself as a playback singer, songwriter, and composer, particularly in the Assamese film industry. His musical journey began with the formation of bands like Folk-Fusion and The East India Company, which showcased his unique blend of traditional and contemporary sounds. Papon's Bollywood repertoire includes notable films such as Sanju, Befikre, Sultan, and Dum Laga Ke Haisha, among others. His debut album, Junaki Raati, was released in his native Assamese language, and he has since gone on to release a string of successful albums, including Sinaaki Osinaaki, Rangphul, and Phagunor Gaan, demonstrating his eclectic range and artistic depth. With a diverse discography that also features albums like Gomseng, Chandamukhi, and Tokari songs, Papon has established himself as a talented and innovative musician with a wide-ranging appeal.

name: Jubin Nautiyal
about: Hailing from Dehradun, Jubin Nautiyal has emerged as a talented young singer in the Indian music scene. His breakthrough came in 2016 when he received the Upcoming Male Vocalist of the Year award at the eighth Mirchi Music Awards for his rendition of Zindagi Kuch Toh Bata (reprise) from the film Bajrangi Bhaijaan. Jubin Nautiyal's discography includes notable tracks like Zindagi from Bajrangi Bhaijaan, Bandeyaa from Jazbaa, Tu Itni Khoobsurat Hain Reloaded from Barkhaa, and Samandar - a duet with Shreya Ghoshal for Kis Kisko Pyaar Karoon. In 2016, he took the stage on MTV Unplugged Season 5, showcasing his vocal prowess. The following year, he became the lead singer for the Hrithik Roshan-starring film Kaabil, lending his voice to four songs, including the title track. He also sang The Humma Song for the movie Ok Jaanu, produced by Dharma Productions. Some of his recent releases include Mast Nazron Se, Kachiyaan Kachiyaan, and Devbhoomi, further solidifying his presence in the music industry.

name: Meet Bros
about: Harmeet Singh and Manmeet Singh, collectively known as Meet Bros, have been a driving force in the Indian music scene since 2005. Initially, the duo explored acting, making appearances in popular soap operas like Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi, while pursuing their studies in Mumbai. The brothers' transition to music composition and singing was marked by the success of their debut single, Jogi Singh Barnala Singh. This breakthrough led to composing opportunities for films like Isi Life Mein and Do Dooni Chaar. However, it was their work on Kyaa Super Kool Hain Hum and OMG – Oh My God! that brought them widespread recognition as composers. Meet Bros have since become synonymous with hit songs like Baby Doll from Ragini MMS 2 and Chittiyaan Kalaiyaan from Roy, which have garnered critical acclaim and commercial success. In addition to their composing work, the duo has also established their own recording studio, Meet Bros Recording Studio. Their discography includes popular tracks like Pink Lips, Hangover, and Party To Banti Hai. Recently, they have released songs like Yaaron Sab Dua Karo, Confessions, and Ishq Mein, further cementing their position in the Indian music industry.

name: Himesh Reshammiya
about: Himesh Reshammiya is a renowned Indian singer, celebrated for his iconic hits like Aashiq Banayae Aapne, Jhalak Dikhla Ja, and Tera Suroor. Born into a family of Gujarati instrumentalists, music was an integral part of his upbringing. Reshammiya's impressive career milestones include being the first Indian singer to take the stage at the prestigious Wembley Arena and the Heineken music hall in Amsterdam. His discography boasts an array of popular tracks, including Aashiq Banaya Aapne, Tera Suroor, Zara Jhoom Jhoom, Jhalak Dikhlaja, Andaz Apna Apna, Shakalaka Boom Boom, Hookah Bar, Chalao Na Naino Se, and Tandoori Nights. Recently, he has released new songs such as Terre Pyaar Mein, Surroor 2021, and Aajaa, which have been well-received by his fans. With his unique voice and style, Himesh Reshammiya continues to be a sought-after performer for live concerts, weddings, corporate events, and college festivals, making him an excellent choice to make any event unforgettable.

name: Aditya Narayan
about: Born into a family of talented artists, Aditya Narayan has naturally followed in the footsteps of his father, the renowned singer Udit Narayan. Aditya's journey in the entertainment industry began at a young age, when he started acting in films and singing. As a child artist, he demonstrated his versatility by performing in over 100 songs and releasing his own album, Aditya, under Polygram Music, now known as Universal Music. One of Aditya's most notable songs is Chhota Baccha Jaan Ke from the 1996 film Masoom, which remains a memorable hit. With his extensive experience in the industry, Aditya Narayan is a talented individual who can bring energy and excitement to various events, including college gatherings, wedding celebrations, and concerts. His unique blend of acting and singing abilities makes him a great fit for a wide range of performances and events.

name: Atul Purohit
about: In the heart of Gujarat, the spirit of Garba is deeply intertwined with the name Atul Purohit. For the people of this vibrant state, Navratri extends beyond a mere festival, embracing a way of life that resonates deeply. As a vocalist whose voice has become synonymous with Garba, Atul Purohit plays a significant role in the global phenomenon that Navratri has become, spreading its joy and energy far beyond Gujarat's borders.

name: Falguni Pathak
about: Falguni Pathak, affectionately known as the 'Dandiya Queen' of Mumbai, has become synonymous with Navratri celebrations in the city. Her powerful and soulful voice has captivated audiences, making her a staple of Garba events in Mumbai. Every year, during the festive season, Falguni Pathak takes to the stage at prominent venues like Kora Kendra, Mahavir Nagar, and other locations across the city, drawing in crowds from all walks of life, particularly the Gujarati community. Her performances are always highly anticipated and well-attended, with fans flocking to dance the night away to her iconic tunes. Some of her notable recent releases include 'Radha Ne Shyam' and 'Madhmithu Naam'. With her unique voice and infectious energy, Falguni Pathak is the perfect addition to any Garba event, guaranteed to create unforgettable memories for all in attendance.

name: Jaz Dhami
about: Jaz Dhami, whose full name is Jaswinder Singh Dhami, is a talented British-Indian singer, music producer, composer, and performer. Born on March 1, 1989, in a Punjabi Sikh family from Sandra Sodhia in the Hoshiarpur district, Jaz Dhami's musical roots run deep. As the son of Bikramjit Dhami, the lead vocalist of the Bhangra Band Sangam, music was an integral part of his upbringing. Jaz Dhami's musical journey began at the age of 9, when he started taking Indian classical music classes in Birmingham, England, under the guidance of his father. This early training laid the foundation for his future success. With a string of hit songs to his credit, Jaz Dhami has collaborated with notable artists such as Yo Yo Honey Singh, Neha Kakkar, and Raftaar. Some of his recent releases include Gal Sun, Bas, and Diva. As a native of Punjab raised in England, Jaz Dhami has made a name for himself in the music industry, earning awards such as the Best Bollywood Song 2016 at the PTC Awards and Best Male Act 2010 at the Brit Asia TV Music Awards. In addition to his musical pursuits, Jaz Dhami is also committed to social causes, including promoting football through the Football Association's Football Needs campaign. With his unique blend of traditional and contemporary styles, Jaz Dhami has established himself as one of the leading folkhop singers in India. His soulful voice and captivating stage presence have endeared him to fans across the globe. As a multifaceted artist, Jaz Dhami continues to inspire and entertain audiences with his music and passion.

name: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan
about: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan is a renowned vocalist, celebrated for his contributions to Qawwali and playback singing in both the Bollywood and Pakistani film industries. His musical journey began at the tender age of 11, when he started performing alongside his uncle, the legendary Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan, in the UK. This early start paved the way for a distinguished career, marked by collaborations with international artists, including Eddie Vedder of the American rock band Pearl Jam. A notable milestone in Rahat's career was his performance at the 2014 Nobel Peace Prize ceremony, where he became the first Pakistani artist to participate in a Nobel Prize concert. His soulful voice has earned him numerous awards, including the IIFA Award for Best Male Playback Singer for his iconic song Tere Mast Mast Do Nain. His discography also features recent releases such as Piya Ji Dekho, Bewafaiyan, and Sanson Ki Mala. With a career spanning multiple genres and geographical boundaries, Rahat Fateh Ali Khan continues to captivate audiences with his powerful voice and mesmerizing live performances. His music is a testament to his skill and dedication, making him a sought-after artist for various events and celebrations.

name: Sajjad Ali
about: Hailing from a family of musicians in Pakistan, Sajjad Ali's affinity for music was nurtured from a young age. With a strong foundation in instrumental music, he began his career by lending his voice to advertisements. In 1979, he made his mark with the release of his debut classical album, which garnered widespread critical acclaim. This success paved the way for Sajjad Ali to explore multiple facets of the entertainment industry, including singing, composition, acting, and direction for various film projects. His recent musical endeavors include the release of videos such as Aatish, Qarar, and Mahiwal, showcasing his continued passion for music.

name: LV Revanth
about: LV Revanth, the talented vocalist who took home the top prize in Indian Idol Season 9, has made a lasting impact on the music scene. His powerful voice can be heard in the hit song Manohari from the blockbuster film Baahubali: The Beginning. With a prolific career spanning over 200 songs in Telugu and Kannada cinema, Revanth has established himself as a sought-after playback singer. Revanth's journey in the music industry began in 2008, and he has since lent his voice to numerous films and projects, including the title track for Sabse Bada Kalakar. His impressive repertoire has earned him several prestigious awards, including the IIFA Utsavam Award for Best Playback Singer for his work on Manohari. Throughout his career, Revanth has consistently demonstrated his versatility and talent, solidifying his position as a leading voice in the industry. As a renowned singer, LV Revanth continues to captivate audiences with his live performances, bringing his unique energy and passion to every event. With his extensive experience and impressive discography, he is an excellent choice for weddings, corporate events, and other celebrations. His team is dedicated to ensuring that every performance is unforgettable, and they work closely with event organizers to create tailored experiences that exceed expectations.

name: Deepshikha Raina
about: Based in Delhi, Deepshikha Raina is a talented singer who collaborates with the Devotees group. With over a million views on her cover songs, she has garnered a significant following and admiration from her audience. One of her standout solo performances is her cover of Sab Kuch Bhula Diya, which has garnered the most views among her solo covers. Deepshikha's recent musical releases include soulful tracks like Kabhii Tumhhe, Ankhiyon ke Jharokhon Se, and Ye Ishq Hai, further showcasing her vocal prowess.

name: Ritviz
about: Ritviz is a talented Indian artist who has made a significant impact in the music scene. His rise to fame began after emerging victorious in the Bacardi House Party Sessions India, a notable achievement that propelled him to national recognition. Some of his most notable works include the viral hit Udd Gaye, which garnered an impressive 2 million views on YouTube in a remarkably short span of two weeks. Another standout track, Liggi, has amassed over 212 million views on the platform, cementing his popularity and devoted fan base. Ritviz's music is characterized by its distinctive blend of traditional eastern elements and contemporary beats, resulting in a refreshing sound. In 2016, he released his EP YUV, a 4-track collection that further highlighted his artistic range and signature style. As a performer, Ritviz is known for his infectious energy and captivating stage presence, making him an ideal choice for live events and music festivals. With a sizable and enthusiastic fan base, he continues to be a sought-after artist in the Indian music scene.

name: Sukhwinder Singh
about: With a career spanning over 100 films, Sukhwinder Singh has cemented his position as a renowned Indian playback singer. Born in Punjab, he underwent professional vocal training in the United States before making his mark in the Bollywood industry. His unique voice and impressive vocal range have made him a standout artist in the Indian film music scene. Sukhwinder Singh's passion for singing began at a young age, and he gained widespread recognition with his iconic song Chaiyya Chaiyya from the film 'Dil Se'. This critically acclaimed track earned him the prestigious Best Male Playback award at the 1999 Filmfare Awards. His notable discography includes hits like 'Jai Ho', 'Chak De India', and 'Haule Haule', which have been featured in films starring prominent actors such as Salman Khan, Shahrukh Khan, and Akshay Kumar. One of his most notable achievements is the song Jai Ho, composed by A. R. Rahman and written by Gulzar, which won the Academy Award for Best Original Song. This song also received the Grammy Award for Best Song Written for a Motion Picture, Television or Other Visual Media in 2010. Sukhwinder Singh's talent has been further recognized with the National Film Award for Best Male Playback Singer at the 62nd National Film Awards for his work in the 2014 film Haider, composed by Vishal Bhardwaj. His recent releases include songs like Saanwal and Chidiya Da Chamba, showcasing his continued contribution to the Indian music scene.

name: Adnan Sami
about: Adnan Sami is a multifaceted musician, skilled as a singer, pianist, and composer. His impressive talent allows him to seamlessly play instruments and sing with remarkable proficiency. Born in England, Adnan Sami launched his music career with a notable debut single, Run His Life, released in 1986. This English-language song, recorded for UNICEF, achieved significant success, topping the music charts in the Middle East. Throughout his career, Adnan Sami has produced numerous popular tracks, including Tere Bina Chain Mujhe Ab Aaye Na and Tera Chehra, showcasing his versatility and artistry. With a diverse range of songs to his credit, Adnan Sami has established himself as a talented and accomplished musician. His music continues to resonate with audiences, making him a sought-after performer for various events, including weddings and live concerts.

name: Zack Knight
about: Meet Zeekay, a talented British-Punjabi artist making waves in the music scene. With a diverse range of skills, he excels as a singer, songwriter, composer, and producer. One of his notable achievements is lending his voice to the hit track Bom Diggy from the movie Sonu Ke Titu Ki Sweety. Throughout his career, Zeekay has collaborated with an impressive array of artists, including Tinie Tempah, Arijit Singh, Ginuwine, Iyaz, Lil Twist, and Stylo G, co-creating and producing music, as well as penning lyrics. His solo releases have garnered significant attention, with multiple singles charting on the BBC's Official Asian Download Chart in the UK. Some of his recent notable tracks include Yaar Tu, Tum Ho, and Para Rum Pa. With his unique sound and style, Zeekay continues to captivate audiences and leave a lasting impression on the music industry. His versatile talent and experience make him an exciting performer to watch, with a wide range of live event opportunities on the horizon.

name: Daler Mehndi
about: Daler Mehndi, a trailblazing artist, has been instrumental in popularizing Bhangra music globally. Known for his energetic dance tracks, distinctive voice, and iconic style, which includes his signature turban and flowing robes, Mehndi has become a household name. His debut album, Bolo Ta Ra Ra, released in 1995, achieved unprecedented success, selling over 20 million copies and catapulting him to stardom. The following year, his second album, Dardi Rab Rab, surpassed the success of his first, solidifying his position in the music industry. In 1997, Mehndi released his third album, Balle Balle, which earned him six Channel V Awards and went multi-platinum, much like his previous albums. A year later, he launched Tunak Tunak Tun, a song that not only dominated the Indian music scene but also paved the way for his international success. With his high-energy Punjabi dance numbers, Daler Mehndi is the perfect choice to make any event an unforgettable experience. His unique sound and style have made him a beloved figure in the music world, and his contributions to popularizing Bhangra music have left a lasting impact.

name: Akriti Kakar
about: Akriti Kakar is a renowned Indian singer, best known for her catchy tracks like Saturday Saturday from the movie 'Humpty Sharma Ki Dulhaniya' and Iski Uski from '2 States'. Her musical expertise also extends to judging roles, as seen in Zee Bangla's popular show Sa Re Ga Ma Pa: Li'l Champs. In addition to her work in Bollywood, Akriti has explored solo projects, including the release of her self-titled album Akriti in 2010 under Sony Music India. The album featured compositions by Shankar Mahadevan and Akriti herself. She has also collaborated with other artists on tracks like Ring Diamond Di, which featured Santosh Singh and Madhuri. Her musical collaborations include working with notable artists such as Sonu Nigam, Sunidhi Chauhan, Kunal Ganjawala, Shreya Ghosal, Himesh Reshammiya, Shaan, and Hard Kaur. Akriti's recent music releases include songs like Thomkiya Thomkiya and Payal, demonstrating her continued presence in the music scene. With a diverse range of projects and collaborations under her belt, Akriti Kakar remains a talented and versatile singer in the Indian music industry.

name: Jasmine Sandlas
about: Jasmine Sandlas is a talented Indian singer with strong roots in the Punjabi music scene. In addition to her music career, she has also made appearances on television and at prestigious events like MTV Coke Studio and TEDx Talks. Her journey as a singer began in 2008 with the song Muskaaan, part of the collection 'The Diamond'. However, it was her Bollywood debut with the song Yaar Na Miley from the movie Kick that brought her more widespread recognition. Throughout her career, Jasmine has received numerous awards, including the PTC Punjabi Film Award for most recorded song of the year 2016 and the Screen Award for Best Female Playback Singer. Her latest music releases include popular tracks like Dil Tutteya, Bamb Aagya, and Koka, showcasing her continued growth and success in the industry.

name: Harshi Mad
about: Harshi Mad is a multifaceted artist, skilled in performing in multiple languages including Hindi, English, Gujarati, and Punjabi. Her talent has been recognized through numerous competition wins, notably in the UK edition of Indian Idol, and she has also appeared in the finals of Indian Idol 3 in India and Sa Re Ga Ma Pa. Growing up, Harshi Mad drew inspiration from her older brother, Paresh Madhaparia, who was a finalist in Sa Re Ga Ma 2005, representing the UK. This early exposure sparked her passion for singing, and she has since gone on to perform internationally, entertaining audiences in countries such as Japan, Hong Kong, the USA, Philippines, Egypt, Switzerland, Singapore, Africa, Thailand, Indonesia, Dubai, Malaysia, and Kuwait, in addition to her home bases in the UK and India.

name: Shweta Pandit
about: Shweta Pandit is a multifaceted talent in the Indian entertainment industry, with a career spanning singing, songwriting, performance, and acting. Her early start in the industry began with collaborating with renowned composer Ilayaraja on the acclaimed film Anjali, where she not only lent her voice to the Hindi version but also re-dubbed for the lead child character. Pandit's professional journey gained momentum when she worked with Yash Raj Films on the project Mohabbatein, released in 2000, singing five songs at the tender age of 14. Two years later, at 16, she released her debut album Main Zindagi Hoon with EMI Virgin Records, India, earning her the distinction of being one of India's youngest pop stars. Her contributions to the film industry have been recognized with prestigious awards, including a Filmfare Award for Best Female Playback Singer for her work on the Telugu film Kotha Bangaru Lokam, specifically for the song Nenani Neevani in 2009. Additionally, Pandit has appeared in a television commercial for Coca-cola, directed by Dibakar Banerjee and featuring Indian cricketer Gautam Gambhir, further showcasing her versatility in the entertainment sector. With a career that began at the age of 9, Shweta Pandit has established herself as a talented and enduring figure in Indian entertainment.

name: Rajal Barot
about: Hailing from Patan, Gujarat, Rajal Barot's musical journey was destined to begin early, given her upbringing as the daughter of renowned Gujarati folk instrumentalist Maniraj Barot. Now based in Ahmedabad, Rajal's fascination with music was sparked by watching her father perform, laying the groundwork for her future career. She formally entered the music scene in 2009, initially as a Gujarati folk singer. In a conversation with RDC Gujarati, Rajal shared that her father's friends played a significant role in encouraging her to explore singing. Her discography features a range of popular tracks and albums, including Aai Jawani Aai and Gujarati No Craze, showcasing her talent and versatility. With her roots in traditional Gujarati music, Rajal Barot has established herself as a notable figure in the industry, known for her captivating performances.

name: Kailash Kher
about: Kailash Kher is a highly acclaimed Indian vocalist, renowned for his soulful Bollywood playback, Sufi, and classical renditions. As a distinguished instrumentalist, he has been conferred with the prestigious Padma Shri award, a rare honor bestowed upon him. With a vast repertoire of over 700 songs in more than 9 languages, Kailash Kher's distinctive voice has captivated audiences nationwide. His breakthrough song, Allah ke Bande, from the film Waisa Bhi Hota Hai Part II, catapulted him to fame, establishing him as a prominent singing sensation in Bollywood. He went on to lend his voice to a multitude of songs in the Bollywood film Mangal Pandey: The Rising. Other notable tracks, such as O Sikander from Corporate and Teri Deewani from his band Kailasa's eponymous album, have garnered significant attention. The song Ya Rabba from the film Salaam-e-Ishq: A Tribute to Love also achieved remarkable sales. As the lead vocalist of Kailasa, Kailash Kher has performed over 1,000 live concerts globally, including a notable performance at the Kennedy Center in Washington, D.C., as part of the Maximum India festival in March 2011. He also had the privilege of performing at the closing ceremony of the 2010 Commonwealth Games in Delhi. Throughout his career, Kailash Kher has accumulated an impressive array of awards, including the Filmfare Award for Best Playback Singer and the Indian Telly Award for Best Title Song. His recent song releases include Anaadi Ananta, Devon ke Dev, Chand Se bhi Jyada Sona Mukhda Tera, among others.

name: Zaeden
about: Sahil Sharma, known professionally as Zaeden, has made a name for himself as a talented singer and record producer hailing from Gurgaon. His breakout moment came when his remix of Coldplay's Magic caught the attention of Hardwell, who featured it on his radio show. This exposure paved the way for Zaeden to share the stage with renowned artist David Guetta in Mumbai in 2016. With his unique sound and style, Zaeden has become a favorite among young Indians, and his fashion sense has also earned him a spot on GQ's prestigious 'Best Dressed List 2016'. His recent release, 5 am, demonstrates his growth as an artist, captivating audiences with its enchanting melody. Zaeden's live performances are highly sought after, bringing a perfect blend of soul and energy to various events, from intimate club gatherings to grand weddings and corporate functions. With his music continuing to resonate with fans, Zaeden remains a popular choice for those looking to add a touch of excitement to their events.

name: Mehtab Virk
about: Mehtab Virk is a prominent figure in the Punjabi music scene, renowned for his captivating voice and impressive discography. With a consistent stream of memorable tracks, he has built a loyal fan base that appreciates his unique sound. Throughout his career, Mehtab Virk has partnered with several esteemed record labels, including T-Series, Jass Records, White Hill Music, and Gabruu, among others. One of his notable achievements is the success of his song Peek A Boo, which has garnered over 3 million views on YouTube. His recent musical offerings include Ilahi, Bebe Di Nuh, and Haan, showcasing his continued growth and artistic evolution as a singer.

name: Inder Chahal
about: Hailing from the vibrant state of Punjab, Inder Chahal has established himself as a prominent figure in the Punjabi music scene. With a distinctive voice and a penchant for delivering emotionally charged lyrics, he has garnered a massive following. Inder Chahal's discography boasts an impressive array of songs that have resonated with audiences, garnering over 10 million views on YouTube. He has collaborated with renowned music labels such as T-Series Punjabi, Speed Records, JukeDock, Jass Records, and Art Attack to produce his music. Some of his notable recent releases include Sajjna Ve Sajjna, Dream, and Suit Purane, which have further solidified his position in the industry.

name: Prakriti Kakar
about: Prakriti Kakar is a talented vocalist who has made a name for herself in the Bollywood playback scene. Her journey in the music industry began with the film Tutiya Dil, marking the start of her successful career. Born into a family of musicians, Prakriti has been exposed to the world of music from a young age. She has performed at numerous national and international events, often sharing the stage with her twin sister, Sukriti Kakar. Prakriti's discography includes a range of popular Bollywood films, such as Batti Gul Meter Chalu, Stree, and Azhar, showcasing her versatility as a singer. With her powerful voice and energetic performances, she has established herself as a sought-after singer in the Indian music industry.

name: Armaan Bedil
about: Armaan Bedil is making waves in the Punjabi music scene as a talented up-and-coming singer. He has recently collaborated with Speed Records, lending his voice to two tracks that have garnered over a million views on YouTube. Beyond his recorded work, Armaan has also built a reputation for delivering captivating live performances at concerts and events. His unique vocal style, often described as crystalline, and impressive vocal range have earned him a loyal following. Some of his notable releases include Deewana, Tenu Chad Ta, and Praise, which have helped establish him as a promising new voice in the industry.

name: Harbhajan Mann
about: With a career spanning over three decades, Harbhajan Mann has established himself as a prominent figure in the Punjabi music industry. His extensive experience and impressive discography have earned him a reputation as one of the most skilled and respected Punjabi vocalists. Throughout his career, Harbhajan Mann has collaborated with renowned music labels, including Tips and T-Series, to produce a wide range of songs. He has also had the opportunity to share the stage and studio with legendary Punjabi artists, such as Gurdas Maan and Jaidev Kumar, among others. Some of his recent notable releases include Dil Tod Gaye, Wanga Satrangiyan, and Dheeyan, which have contributed to his ongoing success and popularity in the music scene.

name: Upkar Sandhu
about: With a promising career already underway, Upkar Sandu has established himself as a notable figure in the Punjabi music scene. As a Crown Records artist, he has built an impressive discography, with his tracks garnering over 20 million views on YouTube. Upkar's vocal range and style have earned him recognition as a versatile talent in the industry. His popularity stems from a string of successful releases, including Ajj Fire Kadne, Gabru Fever, and Laggi Hove Ghutt. These songs have contributed to his growing fame, making him a familiar name among fans of Punjabi music.

name: Sachin-Jigar
about: Meet Sachin-Jigar, the dynamic music composer duo comprising Sachin Sanghvi and Jigar Saraiya. Their journey began when they crossed paths while working under the guidance of renowned composer Pritam. This chance encounter laid the foundation for their future collaboration. In 2009, they joined forces to create music for the film Life Partner, marking the start of their successful partnership. Over the years, Sachin-Jigar have made significant contributions to the Indian music scene. In 2018, they established White Noise Studios, a platform dedicated to nurturing emerging talent and providing opportunities for growth in the music industry. Their impressive discography includes compositions for films like Stree, Gold, Angrezi Medium, Chandigarh Kare Aashiqui, Bhoot Police, Bhediya, Govinda Naam Mera, Zara Hatke Zara Bachke, Munjya, and Vicky Vidya Ka Woh Wala Video. With a diverse range of projects under their belt, Sachin-Jigar continue to make their mark on the music landscape. Their passion for creating innovative and captivating soundtracks has earned them a reputation as one of the most sought-after composer duos in the industry.

name: Lakhbir Singh Lakha
about: Lakhbir Singh Lakha is a revered figure in the Punjabi music scene, particularly in the realm of religious singing. With a career spanning decades, he has established himself as a master instrumentalist and vocalist. His extensive discography includes numerous devotional songs and kathas that have resonated with audiences across the region. As a seasoned Punjabi folk singer, Lakhbir Singh Lakha enjoys immense popularity in the northern states of India. His contributions to the genre have earned him a legendary status, with many considering him one of the greatest singers in the Punjabi music industry. One of his most notable works is the bhajan 'Bigdi Meri Bana De Devi Bhajan', which has garnered over 95 million views. This impressive feat is a testament to his enduring appeal and the impact of his music on fans. With a legacy built on authentic and soulful performances, Lakhbir Singh Lakha continues to inspire and influence new generations of music enthusiasts.

faq.question: What are the Booking Price of Lakhbir Singh Lakha
faq.answer: To get the exact booking price for Lakhbir Singh Lakha, please share your event details with us, and we will provide you with all the necessary information, including his fees, travel, accommodation, and other requirements.

name: Anmol Gagan Mann
about: Anmol Gagan Mann is a versatile Punjabi singer who has made a mark in the industry with her soulful voice. She has lent her vocals to a range of songs, from traditional Punjabi folk to contemporary hits. With her unique talent, Anmol has established herself as one of the most sought-after singers in the Punjabi music scene. In addition to her singing prowess, Anmol is also a skilled songwriter. Her work has been recognized with several prestigious awards, including the Punjabi Music Award for Best Folk Singer for her song Sohni in 2014, and subsequent awards for Shoukeen Jatt in 2015 and Kala Sher in 2016. Anmol's talent was also acknowledged in 2013 when she was crowned Miss Mohali Punjaban at the Miss World Punjaban pageant. Her recent discography includes popular tracks like Veham, Sherni, and Pasand Teri, showcasing her continued growth and success in the music industry.

name: Sonu Kakkar
about: Born in Rishikesh, Sonu Kakkar's musical journey began at a young age. As the elder sister of renowned singer Neha Kakkar, Sonu was exposed to the world of music from an early start. When her family relocated to Delhi, she started performing at jagrans at just five years old, laying the foundation for her future career. A pivotal moment in her life came when she moved to Mumbai, where she caught the attention of composer Sandeep Chowta during a singing competition on Channel V's Indian Pop Star. This led to her breakthrough with the song 'Babuji zara dheere chalo'. Sonu Kakkar has since lent her voice to several notable tracks, including the popular 'London Thumakda' from the film 'Queen'. Her recent discography includes releases such as 'Mera Dil Bhi kitna Pagal Hai', 'Electro Folk: Chamba', and 'Kalank', showcasing her continued growth and versatility as a playback singer in Bollywood.

name: Zubeen Garg
about: Hailing from Meghalaya, Zubeen Garg is a multifaceted artist who has made a lasting impact on the music and film industries. As a skilled instrumentalist, producer, director, and vocalist, he has established himself as a prominent figure in the entertainment scene. With a career spanning multiple languages, including Assamese, Bengali, and Hindi, Zubeen Garg has built a devoted fan base across the region. Zubeen Garg's musical journey began in 1992, and over the years, he has released a string of popular tracks, including his recent videos, Monore Koina, Saati, and Mur Boxonto. A notable milestone in his career came in 2006 when he lent his voice to the song 'Ya Ali' from the film Gangster, earning him widespread critical acclaim. This standout performance also led to him receiving the prestigious Global Indian Film Award for Best Playback Singer, solidifying his reputation as a talented and accomplished artist.

name: Rupali Jagga
about: Rupali Jagga's musical journey began at a tender age of five, and by six, she was formally trained in classical music under the guidance of Nidhi Narang. This early start paved the way for her participation in numerous community and national-level competitions, which she consistently won from 2007 onwards. As she honed her craft, Rupali transitioned into a professional singing career in 2015, performing at various stage shows for prominent brands such as Times of India, Airtel, and Videocon. Her artistic prowess extends beyond singing, as she is also skilled in contemporary dance and sitar playing. Rupali's online presence is notable, with over 63,000 subscribers and 5 million views on her YouTube channel. Initially, she focused on singing bhajans and religious songs, but has since gained recognition as a popular Bollywood cover artist. One of her notable achievements was winning the national title at the Sangam Kala Group, an award presented by renowned musicians Sonu Nigam and Sajid Wajid. Her recent musical releases include songs like Aajaa Bheeg Le Piyyaa, Majboor, and Tere Piche, showcasing her growth and versatility as an artist. Rupali's talent and dedication earned her a spot as a finalist on Zee TV's Sa Re Ga Ma Pa 2016, further solidifying her position as a rising star in the music industry.

name: Sonu Nigam
about: With a career spanning multiple decades, Sonu Nigam has established himself as a prominent figure in the Bollywood music scene. Often regarded as the modern embodiment of legendary singer Rafi, Nigam has showcased his versatility by singing in a wide range of languages, including Hindi, English, Bengali, Manipuri, Gujarati, and Marathi. As one of the highest-paid Indian singers, Nigam has demonstrated his ability to adapt to various genres and styles, earning him a reputation as a highly skilled and flexible artist in the Hindi film industry. His global appeal has led to performances in numerous countries, including those in North America, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, Asia, and Australia. In 2007, he participated in the esteemed Incredibles tour alongside notable artists Asha Bhosle, Kunal Ganjawala, and Kailash Kher. Nigam's musical journey began with the release of his debut song O Aasman Wale from the film Aaja Meri Jaan in 1993. In addition to his singing career, he has also explored acting and hosting roles in various television shows. Beyond his artistic pursuits, Nigam is committed to social work and is widely recognized for his charitable efforts. His recent music releases include songs like Main Ki Karaan?, Baat Saaf Hai, and Kaisi Baatein Karte Ho, further solidifying his position as a talented and influential artist in the industry.

name: Kulbir Jhinjer
about: Kulbir Jhinjer is a notable figure in the Punjabi music scene, with a growing presence in the industry. He has collaborated with several prominent labels, including VehliJanta Records and Speed Records, to produce a range of songs. Through his work with VehliJanta Records, Kulbir has released tracks such as Main Sohni, Jind Mahi, Chak Asla, and Black Picka, among others. His music often explores themes rooted in the vibrant heritage of Punjabi and Jatt cultures. As a contributor to the Punjabi music landscape, Kulbir is part of a larger community of artists, including Anmol Gagan Maan and the renowned Harbhajan Mann, who have collectively helped elevate the genre's profile both domestically and internationally.

name: Jass Bajwa
about: Originally from Chandigarh, Punjab, Jass Bajwa has made a name for himself in the Punjabi music scene. With a career spanning back to September 2014, he has quickly become a prominent figure, delivering Punjabi songs that have resonated with audiences. His rapid rise to fame has cemented his position as a leading singer in the industry.

name: Rajdeep Chatterjee
about: With a strong foundation in classical music, Rajdeep Chatterjee's musical journey began at a young age. Under the guidance of renowned musician Pandit Shri Chandrakant Apte, he honed his skills and developed a deep appreciation for the art form. Rajdeep's talent soon gained recognition on a national level, as he secured a fourth-place ranking on Indian Idol in 2008. Two years prior, he had already made a name for himself as a top finalist on the popular Zee TV show Sa Re Ga Ma Pa L'il Champs. His hometown of Jharkhand has been particularly supportive, with the Symbiosis group acknowledging him as a Jharkhand Icon alongside acclaimed film director Imtiaz Ali. Throughout his career, Rajdeep has performed at over 200 events across India and internationally. His recent discography includes releases such as The Mad Boys, Laal Ishq, and Anjaana, showcasing his continued growth and creativity as an artist. With a diverse range of experiences and achievements, Rajdeep Chatterjee has established himself as a talented and versatile musician.

name: Sandeep Batra
about: Sandeep Batra, a talented vocalist, rose to prominence after claiming the top spot on SaReGaMaPa. With a strong foundation in Hindustani Classical Music, courtesy of his training under the guidance of Pt. Baldev Raj Verma, Sandeep's unique voice has captivated audiences across the Indian music scene. Before pursuing music full-time, Sandeep earned a degree in software engineering from Delhi University. His big break came when he secured a spot among the top 5 contestants on Sony TV's Fame Gurukul, where he impressed renowned judges Shankar Mahadevan, Javed Akhtar, and KK with his performances. Sandeep has since lent his voice to various remix albums, television serials, and commercials for prominent brands such as Dabur and DHL. His recent discography includes releases like Dil Jaaniya and Do Lafzon Ki, further solidifying his position as a skilled playback singer.

name: Dhvani Bhanushali
about: Dhvani Bhanushali is a rising star in the entertainment industry, known for her captivating voice and on-screen presence. She took her first major step in the music scene at just 19, performing on MTV Unplugged Season 7. Dhvani initially created content on her YouTube channel, launched in 2012, before transitioning to a music career in 2017. Her rendition of Humsafar from the film Badrinath Ki Dulhania marked the beginning of her musical journey. She soon made her film debut with the song Ishtehaar in Welcome To New York, released in 2018. Singles like Leja Re and Main Teri Hoon further solidified her position in the industry, garnering widespread recognition. A notable milestone was achieved with Dilbar, a song featuring Nora Fatehi, which became the first Hindi language track to break into the Billboard Top Ten. Dhvani Bhanushali's talent and dedication have made her a sought-after artist, with a promising career ahead.

name: Thomson Andrews
about: Thomson Andrews is a versatile vocalist with a unique ability to sing in multiple languages, including Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu. His talents have recently been showcased on the Amazon Prime original series The Remix, highlighting his skills as a contemporary Indian playback singer and live performer. With a strong foundation in music, Thomson holds a certification from the prestigious Trinity College of Music in London, recognizing his expertise as a performing vocalist.

name: Pretty Bhullar
about: Emerging from the heart of Punjab, Pretty Bhullar has transitioned from penning lyrics for prominent artists like Ammy Virk to crafting his own unique sound. This talented individual is making waves in the Punjabi music scene, garnering attention from fans and industry insiders alike. Originating from a humble village in Mansa District, Pretty Bhullar's creative journey has been marked by notable collaborations, including writing the song 'Verschae' for fellow Punjabi singer Mankirat Aulakh. One of his standout originals, 'Chandigarh Police', has resonated with audiences, amassing an impressive 9 million views on YouTube and solidifying his position as a rising star in the industry.

name: Nimrat Khaira
about: Nimrat Khaira has established herself as a prominent figure in the Punjabi music and film scene, showcasing her talents as both a playback singer and actress. Her journey to stardom began after winning season 3 of the esteemed Voice of Punjab competition. However, it was the release of her popular tracks Ishq Kacheri and Salute Wajde in 2016 that catapulted her to widespread recognition. Throughout her career, Nimrat has consistently delivered hit singles, including Rohab Rakhdi and Designer, demonstrating her versatility and skill as a vocalist. Her standout performance in the duo Dubai Wale Sheikh earned her the prestigious Best Female Vocalist award at the Brit Asia Awards. Some of Nimrat's most notable works include the songs SP De Rank, Dubai Wale Sheikh, and Suit, which have resonated with audiences and solidified her position in the industry. Her live performances, such as the one at Saras Mela in Bathinda, have also been well-received, showcasing her ability to engage and entertain crowds. With her talent and charisma, Nimrat Khaira continues to make a lasting impact on the Punjabi entertainment scene.

name: Rasika Shekar
about: Rasika Shekar is a talented musician who seamlessly blends her Indo-American heritage with her passion for traditional Indian instruments, particularly the bansuri, a traditional bamboo flute.
