Rasika's professional journey began in 2011 when she was invited to join legendary ghazal artist Ustad Ghulam Ali Khan on tour as a vocalist, performing a range of classic ghazals. The following year, she made her mark in the Bollywood music scene with her playback singing debut in the film Dekh Indian Circus, courtesy of acclaimed composers Shankar-Ehsaan-Loy. This opportunity led to collaborations with the trio in their live concerts, further establishing her presence in the industry. Her Bollywood playback credits also include notable films such as 2 States, Kill Dil, Katti Batti, and Love Games. With a strong foundation in both Carnatic and Hindustani classical music, Rasika's early training was influenced by her family, including Carnatic vocal lessons from her aunt Vaishali Shankar and violin instruction from her grandmother Gowri Ramakrishnan.

name: Karan Sehmbi
about: Hailing from Chandigarh, Karan Sehmbi has emerged as a talented young voice in the Punjabi music scene. His notable stint as a finalist on Voice Of Punjab Season 2 marked a significant milestone in his career, catapulting him to widespread recognition. With a strong work ethic and down-to-earth demeanor, Karan has built a loyal following that transcends geographical boundaries, resonating with audiences across India and globally.

name: Anveshi Jain
about: With a multifaceted career spanning six years, Anveshi Jain has established herself as a versatile talent in the entertainment industry. As a television host, singer, anchor, actress, and model, she has showcased her impressive range and adaptability. In addition to her on-screen presence, Anveshi is also a human behavior analyst, offering a unique perspective on the complexities of human nature. Her YouTube channel serves as a platform for her to share knowledge and expertise, where she regularly posts tutorial videos and provides valuable tips to her audience, further solidifying her position as a knowledgeable and engaging personality.

name: Altamash Faridi
about: Hailing from Saharanpur, Uttar Pradesh, Altamash Faridi has established himself as a talented vocalist. Born in 1989, Altamash's early interests in music led him to participate in various shows, including a notable performance on Doordarshan that earned him the title of Best Performer. His big break came when he was selected for the Mumbai auditions of Sa Re Ga Ma Pa, ultimately making it to the top 18 in the 2010 season. As his career progressed, Altamash gained widespread recognition for his singing talents. One of his earliest notable projects was lending his voice to the movie No Problem, which marked a turning point in his career and caught the attention of prominent singers like Kailash Kher and Shaan. Altamash has since contributed to the soundtracks of several films, including Shatu and Agent Vinod. More recently, he has worked on the movie Do Lafzon Ki Kahani, starring Kajal Aggarwal and Randeep Hooda. With a career spanning multiple projects, Altamash Faridi has solidified his position as a skilled and accomplished artist in the music industry.

name: Jasleen Aulakh
about: Polly Saghera and her daughter Jasleen Aulakh have joined forces to create 'Just ittefaaq', a musical endeavor that brings together the talents of a mother and daughter who share a passion for crafting meaningful songs. With Polly at the helm of lyrics and Jasleen taking the lead as singer and director, this collaborative project is driven by a desire to produce music that resonates with listeners without being preachy. Following their well-received debut in the Bollywood scene with the song 'Chamba', the duo has had the opportunity to work with talented instrumentalists, further enriching their musical experience. Their artistic journey has now led to the release of their debut album, 'Polly's Diary', a culmination of their creative efforts. With a growing reputation for captivating audiences, Polly and Jasleen are eager to continue performing at events that nurture their artistic expression.

name: Ami Mishra
about: Hailing from Madhya Pradesh, Ami Mishra's musical trajectory has been shaped by his experiences in both his hometown and Mumbai. Before diving into the music scene, Ami earned his MBA from the Indore Management Institute. It was during his post-graduate studies that his passion for music began to take hold. As a college student, Ami was part of a local band that actively performed at events and shows in and around Indore, laying the groundwork for his future endeavors in the music industry.

name: Aditi Paul
about: Hailing from Kolkata, Aditi developed her singing skills from a young age, inspired by her family's musical roots. Her mother played a pivotal role in encouraging her to pursue a career in music, while her aunt and Pt. Chakraborty, disciples of the renowned Ustad Munawar Ali Khan Sahab, served as her foundational influences. Aditi's journey took a significant turn when she moved to Mumbai and participated in the inaugural season of Indian Idol, ultimately securing a spot among the top 6 contestants. The show's winner, Abhijeet Sawant, was a fellow competitor. Following her appearance on the show, Aditi began working on advertisement jingles for various brands. Her breakthrough in Bollywood came with the song Rang Laga De from the film Goliyon ki Rasleela Ram-Leela. She also lent her voice to the 2014 film Lingaa. As a testament to the platform provided by Indian Idol, Aditi, along with artists like LV Revanth, has successfully transitioned to singing Bollywood tracks. Notably, Aditi has also contributed to the soundtrack of the epic film Baahubali.

name: Shraddha Pandit
about: Growing up in a family of talented instrumentalists and actors, Shraddha Pandit, sister of renowned singer Shweta Pandit, was naturally drawn to music from a young age. Her early foray into singing led to opportunities to work on films like Khamoshi, Sangharsh, and Raju Chacha, which helped establish her presence in the industry. Under the guidance of her grandfather, the late Sangeet Acharya Pandit Pratap Narayan, Shraddha trained in Hindustani Classical Music, laying the foundation for her future success. She has had the privilege of collaborating with some of the biggest names in music, including A. R. Rahman, Amit Trivedi, Salim-Sulaiman, Badshah, and Meet Bros. In 2008, Shraddha released her album Teri Heer through Sony Music, showcasing her skills as a songwriter and composer. The album featured songs penned and composed entirely by her, demonstrating her versatility as an artist. Some of her most popular tracks include Pehli Pehli Bar Baliye, Ae Shivani, Rang Deeni, and Sasural Genda Phool, among others. More recent hits like Pani Wala Dance and Aaj Raat Ka Scene have solidified her position as a talented and enduring voice in the music industry.

name: Kanwar Grewal
about: Kanwar Grewal has established himself as a prominent figure in the Punjabi folk music scene. His distinctive appearance is often regarded as quintessentially Punjabi, setting him apart from his peers. Alongside notable singers like Harbhajan Mann, Anmol Singh Mann, and Kulbir Jhinjer, Kanwar Grewal has carved out his own niche in the industry. He has showcased his talent on various reality shows, including the unplugged version of Voice of Punjab and Awaz Punjab Di. Kanwar's discography includes releases under renowned labels such as T-Series Apna Punjab, with songs like Ticketan Do Lay Layi. He has also collaborated with other prominent music labels, including PTC Punjabi, Panj-aab Records, PTC Punjab Gold, and Speed Records. Additionally, Kanwar Grewal has released songs through Finetone Music, including popular tracks like Raula and Ishq Bulleh Nu Nachave. His recent repertoire features songs such as Sikh Kaum Da Itihaas and Baavre Faqir, further solidifying his presence in the Punjabi music landscape.

name: Harshdeep Kaur
about: Harshdeep Kaur is a renowned vocalist from India, celebrated for her versatile performances in Bollywood, Punjabi, and Sufi music. Her rise to fame began when she emerged as the winner of the singing competition Junoon–Kuch Kar Dikhaane Ka, which aired on NDTV Imagine in September 2008. Kaur's entry into the Bollywood scene was marked by notable songs such as Katiya Karoon from the film Rockstar, Heer from Jab Tak Hai Jaan, and Dilbaro from Raazi, among others. Throughout her career, Kaur has accumulated an impressive array of awards and accolades. In 2018, she received recognition at the Star Screen Awards and Zee Cine Awards. The following year, she was honored with the Best Female Playback Singer award at the IIFA Awards for her soulful rendition of Dilbaro from the movie Raazi. Recently, Kaur has released a string of new songs, including Tenu Pyaarr Kardaa, Jallianwala, and Jannat, further solidifying her position in the music industry.

name: Kaur B
about: Kaur B has established herself as a prominent figure in the Punjabi music scene, renowned for her captivating voice and versatility. With a repertoire that spans both Punjabi and Hindi songs, she has garnered a significant following across various platforms. Her talent has been recognized by notable labels such as T-Series Apna Punjab and Speed Records, with whom she has collaborated. Kaur B's online presence is impressive, with her YouTube videos accumulating over 100 million views. In addition to her vocal prowess, she is also a skilled instrumentalist, joining the ranks of other talented young musicians like Karan Sehmbi, Pretty Bhullar, and Ammy Virk. Her discography boasts a range of popular tracks, including recent releases like Teri Jatti, Ishqe Viche Aukha, and Lahore Da Paranda, which have contributed to her growing fan base and solidified her position in the industry.

name: Amrinder Gill
about: Born on May 11, 1976, in Punjab, India, Amrinder Singh Gill is a multifaceted talent, excelling as a singer, songwriter, actor, and music producer in the Punjabi entertainment industry. Before pursuing a career in the arts, Gill completed his academic degree in agricultural science and went on to work as a manager at the Ferozepur Central Cooperative Bank. His musical endeavors have been widely recognized, with his album Judaa earning a prestigious Brit Asia Music Award for Best Album. Some of his most notable singles include Supna, Heerey from the film Love Punjab, Kurta Suha from Angrej, Akhar from Lahoriye, and Aisi Taisi, all of which have garnered him numerous accolades. Gill's acting career took off in 2009 with a supporting role in the Punjabi film Munde UK De, alongside prominent actors Jimmy Shergill and Neeru Bajwa, marking the beginning of his successful journey in the film industry.

name: Fazilpuria
about: Rahul Yadav, famously known by his stage name Fazilpuria, has made a significant mark in the Bollywood and Punjabi music scene. Born in Fazilpur, his moniker is a nod to his hometown. Fazilpuria comes from a prominent business family and often performs with a security detail. With a substantial online presence, boasting over a million followers across Facebook and Instagram, he has established himself as a notable singer. His discography includes collaborations like Chul with Badshah, as well as recent releases such as Balam Ka System, Haryana Roadways, and Lala Lori, which have contributed to his growing reputation in the industry.

name: Deepak Dhillon
about: Deepak Dhillon is a prominent figure in the Punjabi music scene, known for his distinctive and soothing voice. With a career marked by collaborations with esteemed Punjabi singers, he draws inspiration from legendary artists like Harbhajan Mann. His musical journey has been shaped by working alongside notable industry professionals, contributing to his unique sound. Deepak Dhillon's online presence is impressive, with over 40 million views on YouTube. He has partnered with reputable record labels, including Speed Records, VS Records, and Jass Records, among others. As an active social media user, he regularly shares updates about his latest songs and projects. Alongside artists like Kulbir Jhinjer and Kanwar Grewal, Deepak Dhillon has played a significant role in shaping the Jatt Music genre in recent years. Some of his notable recent releases include Zamanat 2, Nijjar: Velly, and Anty Bande Song, which have garnered attention from fans and critics alike.

name: Sujatha Mohan
about: With a career spanning over four decades, Sujatha Mohan has established herself as a prominent figure in the South Indian music scene, with a repertoire that encompasses Tamil, Malayalam, Telugu, and Hindi. Her impressive discography boasts over 10,000 songs, solidifying her position as one of the most prolific singers in the Malayalam music industry. Sujatha's musical journey began at a young age, with early performances alongside the legendary Yesudas, taking her to stages around the world. She made her recording debut while still in the 6th grade, marking the beginning of a long and illustrious career. As a leading vocalist in the South Indian music industry, Sujatha has had the opportunity to collaborate with renowned composers, including A.R. Rehman, with whom she worked extensively in the 1980s and 1990s. Her Tamil film debut came with the song Kalai Paniyil from the 1978 film Gayathri, featuring Sridevi and Rajinikanth, with music by the iconic Ilaiyaraja. Throughout her career, Sujatha has garnered numerous awards, including Asianet Film Awards, Kerala State Film Awards, and Tamil Nadu Film Awards. One of her notable Hindi songs is Rafta Rafta Haule Haule from the movie Hulchul. With over 5,000 live shows under her belt, Sujatha holds the distinction of being the only female playback singer to have performed so extensively worldwide.

name: Ananya Nanda
about: Born in Odisha, Ananya Nanda's remarkable vocal abilities catapulted her to stardom when she won Indian Idol Junior, earning praise from esteemed judges Salim Merchant and the acclaimed music director duo Vishal-Shekhar. As one of India's youngest and most promising playback singers, she has made a name for herself in both the Odia and Hindi film industries. Ananya's musical foundation was laid under the guidance of distinguished Hindustani music gurus, Pandit Dr. Chitta Ranjan Pani and Nilamani Ojha, who helped her refine her craft. Additionally, she has had the opportunity to learn from singer and conductor Amaal Malik, which has further expanded her musical horizons. Her discography features contributions to notable films such as M.S. Dhoni: The Untold Story and Baby. With her impressive range and captivating stage presence, Ananya Nanda is an exciting talent to watch, bringing a fresh energy to the world of Indian music. Her performances are a testament to her dedication and passion for her art, making her a sought-after artist for various events and occasions.

name: Azim Naza
about: With a storied career, Azim Naza stands as a prominent figure in the world of Qawwali music, widely regarded for his exceptional talent. Through online platforms, notably YouTube, he has played a significant role in elevating the genre's global presence. His Qawwali performances have garnered an impressive viewership of over 30 million on the platform. In addition to his digital success, Azim Naza has also had the opportunity to perform at numerous live events and shows across India and Asia, further solidifying his reputation as a leading Qawwali artist.

name: Gurvinder Brar
about: Gurvinder Brar is a household name among Punjabi music enthusiasts, celebrated for his exceptional talent in the Punjabi Folk genre. With a distinct repertoire of popular tracks, he has established himself as a prominent figure in the industry. Known for his gentle and melodious voice, Gurvinder Brar has garnered a reputation for his impressive classical singing skills. He has collaborated with notable music labels such as Anand Music and Amar Audio, among others. His music has resonated with a wide audience, earning him over 50 million views on YouTube, a testament to his enduring popularity.

name: Sreya Jayadeep
about: At just 14 years old, Sreya has already made a name for herself as a talented Indian playback singer from Kerala. With a focus on the Malayalam language, she has lent her voice to various music albums and films. Her early appearances on reality TV shows, including Star Singer on Surya TV and Sun Singer on Sun TV, helped launch her career. Sreya's introduction to the music industry began with her contribution to the Christian devotional album Hitham, followed by the release of her own album, Sreyam. Her love for singing started at a remarkably young age - just two years old - when she would harmonize with songs playing on the TV and radio. As she grew older, her talent only blossomed, earning her top honors in kids' contests like Star Singer on Surya TV in 2013 and Sun Singer on Sun TV in 2014. Her breakthrough as a playback singer came with the Malayalam film Weeping Boy, where she sang the songs Chema Chema Chemanoru and Thaaraattupattum. Sreya has also been involved in the Kerala government's Harithasree initiative, singing the environmentally themed duet Oru Thai Nadaam. Recently, she has released a string of new songs, including Oru Karimukil, Gagana nee, and Nagumo, further showcasing her vocal talents.

name: Veet Baljit
about: Veet Baljit is a talented Punjabi singer and music producer who has made a significant impact on the music scene. With his youthful energy and passion for music, he has established himself as a notable figure in the Punjabi music industry. Veet's soulful voice has been the key to his success, resonating with listeners and setting him apart from his peers. He has collaborated with prominent music labels such as State Studio and White Hill Music, releasing a string of popular songs. His tracks on State Studio have garnered over 30 million views, while his releases on White Hill Music have exceeded 20 million views. This impressive viewership is a testament to his talent and dedication to his craft. Veet's music has caught the attention of several music labels, who have recognized his exceptional vocal abilities and skill as a music producer. His recent releases, including 21 te 18, Shy-sang Lagdi Aa, and Fauji Di Razai, have further solidified his position in the industry. With his unique sound and style, Veet continues to make waves in the Punjabi music scene, leaving a lasting impression on his audience.

name: Gaurav Dutta
about: Originating from Jammu and Kashmir, Gaurav Dutta has emerged as a talented young artist, deeply rooted in traditional music. His unique sound has been making waves in the contemporary music scene, inspiring a new generation of musicians. With his hometown of Jammu as his foundation, Gaurav has established himself as a notable singer, influencing and motivating other aspiring artists. His impressive list of achievements includes winning the Jammu and Kashmir Idol in 2012, as well as being a three-time winner of the prestigious Golden Guitar Festival and a champion of the Pandit Uma Dutt Sangeet Mahotsav, among other notable awards. Gaurav's soulful voice and captivating performances have made him a sought-after artist for various events, including weddings, parties, and live concerts. With his talent and charisma, he is sure to leave a lasting impression on his audience, making any occasion a memorable one.

name: Goldie Sohel
about: Growing up in a musical family, Goldie Sohel's early life was filled with the sounds of his grandfather's singing on All India Radio. This exposure sparked a deep passion for music within him, and he was encouraged to explore his creative side from a young age. With a strong family legacy in music, Goldie's natural inclination towards the art form was nurtured and supported. As he grew older, Goldie's talent and dedication to music only intensified. He has recently released several notable songs, including Aaj Sajeya, Akhiyaan Na Akhiyaan, and Kasam, which have showcased his unique sound and style. With a background rooted in music and a drive to create, Goldie Sohel is an exciting talent to watch in the industry. His performances are a testament to his skill and charisma, making him a great fit for various events, including weddings and corporate functions.

name: Hariharan
about: With a career spanning over four decades, Hariharan has left an indelible mark on the Indian music scene. As a trailblazer in fusion music, his collaborative project, Colonial Cousins, with renowned musician Lesle Lewis, has successfully blended Indian flavors with international pop sensibilities. Hariharan's musical journey is rooted in his heritage, being the son of esteemed Carnatic vocalists, Alamelu and H.A.S. Mani. Born in Kerala and raised in Mumbai, he has inherited his parents' musical legacy, emerging as a prominent figure in Indian ghazal singing and composition. His extensive discography boasts over 30 albums, showcasing his artistic prowess. Throughout his illustrious career, Hariharan has garnered numerous accolades, including the prestigious Padma Shri award. He has also received the National Award for Best Male Playback Singer, among other notable honors such as the Kerala State Award, Swaralaya-Kairali Award, and the Yesudas Award. His impressive collection of awards is a testament to his enduring impact on the music industry.

name: Harish Moyal
about: Harish Moyal's music career took off when he competed in Indian Idol Season 1, sharing the stage with notable contestant Abhijeet Sawant. Although Abhijeet Sawant ultimately won the competition, Harish's talent and dedication earned him a spot as a finalist. Since 2006-2007, Harish has been actively creating music, collaborating with prominent record labels such as Times Music, Saregama Music, and Zee Music Company, among others. His discography includes solo albums, with one of his notable tracks, Mere Saiyaan, receiving the prestigious Big Star IMA Award for Best Sufi Song of the Year. Throughout his career, Harish has consistently produced high-quality music, solidifying his position as a top artist in the contemporary music scene. From his early days as a contestant on Indian Idol to his current success as a solo artist, Harish has made significant strides in the music industry.

name: Meghna Mishra
about: Meghna Mishra's rise to prominence began with her powerful performance in the 2017 film Secret Superstar. With a voice that conveys deep emotion, she has established herself as a talented singer to keep an eye on. Meghna's singing career took off in 2014 when she collaborated with Meet Bros on the Bengali film Kkoli: A Journey of Love. Since then, she has lent her voice to songs in multiple languages, including Bengali, Marathi, and Hindi. Her breakout moment came with the movie Secret Superstar, where she sang several notable tracks, including Main Kaun Hoon, Meri Pyaari Ammi, Nachdi Phira, Sapne Re, and O Re Manwa. It was acclaimed music composer Amit Trivedi who gave her the opportunity to showcase her talent in the film. Meghna's impressive vocals earned her numerous prestigious awards, such as the Filmfare Award for Best Playback Singing, Films of India Online Awards, and the IIFA award for Best Playback Singing, as well as the News 18 Reel Movie award for Best Playback Singer, among others.

name: Shashwat Singh
about: Shashwat Singh is a talented vocalist who has been making waves in the music industry. With a strong foundation in Western Classical music, courtesy of his training at AR Rehman's prestigious KM Music Conservatory in Chennai, he has developed a unique sound that sets him apart. Shashwat's journey in the film industry began with the movie Tamasha, where he had the opportunity to collaborate with the legendary AR Rehman. Since then, he has lent his voice to several notable films, including Mohenjo Daro and Sanju. His versatility as a singer is evident in the diverse range of genres he has explored, from pop and indie to upbeat and folk. Along the way, he has had the chance to share the mic with renowned artists such as Shalmali Kholgade and Arijit Singh, further honing his craft and establishing himself as a rising star in the music scene.

name: Akanksha Sharma
about: Hailing from Jaipur, Rajasthan, Akanksha Sharma embarked on her singing career at a remarkably young age. She initially gained recognition by participating in several reality TV shows, including Amul Star Voice of India, Chote Ustad, and Jo Jeeta Wohi Superstar, where she emerged as the winner of the former and a finalist in the latter. As her career progressed, Akanksha began performing at events and weddings across India. She also lent her voice to various Bollywood films, such as Rustom, Beinmaan Love, Traffic, and Shaadi Mein Zaroor Aana, among others. Her versatility as a singer has allowed her to explore different genres, with a special affinity for Rajasthani Folk songs. Akanksha's popularity soared with her collaborations with prominent music labels, including KS Records, Zee Music Company, and Sony Music India, on YouTube. With an impressive viewership of over 50 million, she has established herself as a prominent Rajasthani Folk Singer. Her discography includes notable songs like Jogi, Paani Paani Rajesthani, Jugnu, and Baaju Band. In addition to her singing career, Akanksha has also made a mark as a voice-over artist, bringing to life characters like Shinchan. She has had the opportunity to collaborate with esteemed artists, such as Darshan Raval, further cementing her position in the music industry. With her unique voice and diverse range, Akanksha continues to captivate audiences with her soulful melodies.

name: Shrey Singhal
about: Shrey Singhal has established himself as a notable figure in the music scene, with a strong online presence centered around his YouTube channel. This platform has allowed him to share his creative work with a vast audience, garnering over 300 million views to date. His music resonates deeply with younger listeners, who have come to appreciate his unique sound and style. As part of a new wave of talented young artists, including Pretty Bhullar, A Kay, and Karan Sehmbi, Shrey Singhal has helped shape the contemporary Punjabi music landscape. For Shrey, music extends beyond a professional pursuit - it's an all-consuming passion that drives his creative endeavors. His recent releases, such as Dangerous, Fallin For You, and Aankhein Meri, showcase his artistic growth and dedication to his craft. Through his work, Shrey continues to connect with fans and leave a lasting impact on the music industry.

name: Shashwat Sachdev
about: Shashwat's musical journey began at the tender age of three, with a foundation in Hindustani classical vocals and rhythm. As he grew, so did his passion for music, leading him to pursue professional training in classical music and instruments. This early start paved the way for a career that would take him to Hollywood, where he honed his skills in music production. Shashwat's breakthrough in the Indian film industry came with the movie Phillauri, marking the beginning of a successful streak in Bollywood. He went on to compose the title song for the 2018 black comedy film Kaalakaandi, starring Saif Ali Khan. His versatility as a composer is evident in his work on films like Veere Di Wedding, where he contributed to several songs. In addition to his film work, Shashwat has also made a mark in the world of streaming services, composing music and scores for the Netflix series Selection Day. One of his most notable projects is the 2019 film Uri: The Surgical Strike, for which he created the music. The film's soundtrack received widespread acclaim, and his background score was so well-received that it was released separately due to popular demand. Shashwat has had the opportunity to collaborate with some of the biggest names in the music industry, including Sunidhi Chauhan, Nakash Aziz, Arijit Singh, Neha Kakkar, and Daler Mehndi, among others. His recent releases include songs like Shades of Cashmera, Attack Theam-LA LA LA, and Chal Hatt, showcasing his continued growth and creativity as a composer.

name: Javed Ali
about: With a versatile voice that transcends linguistic boundaries, Javed Ali has established himself as a prominent figure in the Indian music landscape. His repertoire boasts an impressive array of songs in multiple regional languages, catering to diverse audiences across the country. Beyond his singing career, Javed has also made a mark as a television personality, having judged several notable reality shows, including Sa Re Ga Ma Pa L'il Champs, Great Music Gurukul, and Indian Idol. His talent has been recognized with prestigious awards, such as the IIFA Award in 2009 for his soulful rendition of Jashn-E-Bahara from the film Jodhaa Akbar, and the Screen Award in 2012 for the title track of the Bollywood movie Ishaqzaade.

name: Ajay-Atul
about: Ajay-Atul, a sibling duo, has emerged as a driving force in the music industry, leaving an indelible mark on both Marathi and Hindi cinema. Their musical journey began during their school days, when they developed a passion for music that eventually led them to experiment with various forms. Although their family didn't directly encourage their musical pursuits, they didn't discourage them either. This freedom allowed the brothers to learn and grow through their experiences. They befriended musicians who owned instruments like harmoniums and dhol, which they couldn't afford at the time. This exposure helped shape their musical style and skills. Their big break came with the international non-film album Vishwavinayaka, which opened doors to the Indian music industry. The duo then worked on numerous commercial jingles, ballets, and advertisements to establish their presence. Their work on Naṭarang showcased their ability to blend traditional Marathi folk music with modern sounds. Ajay-Atul's filmography includes composing music for Hindi movies like Singham, Bol Bachchan, Agneepath, and Brothers. They also contributed to the soundtrack of the Aamir Khan-starrer PK. In 2016, they collaborated with Nagraj Manjule on the critically acclaimed Marathi film Sairat. The movie's soundtrack, particularly the song Zingaat, has become synonymous with the duo's signature style. This iconic track has cemented their reputation as one of the most renowned music duos in the industry.

name: A Kay
about: Amrinder Singh, known to his fans as A Kay, has made a name for himself in the Indian Punjabi music scene. His journey in the industry began with the release of his debut single, Kalyug, which resonated with teenagers and young adults, earning him a dedicated following. A Kay's subsequent tracks showcased his versatility as an artist. His song THE LOST LIFE, produced by Sukhe Musical Doctorz and written by Preet Hundal, highlighted his diverse personalities, introducing him to a broader audience. Other notable releases, such as Munda-Mon-Khmer iPhone Warga, garnered significant attention, with the latter surpassing 10 million views on YouTube. As his popularity grew, so did his discography. Tracks like Kuriyan ya maape further solidified his position in the industry, with over 7 million views on YouTube. A Kay's recent releases, including Amli Drip, Queen, and Gallan Dogaliyan, have cemented his status as a rising star and one of the most talented singers in Punjabi music. With a growing fan base and an impressive body of work, A Kay continues to make his mark in the Punjabi music industry.

name: Amit Trivedi
about: Amit Trivedi is a multifaceted artist, exceling as a music director, singer, composer, producer, and lyricist. His foray into film composition began with the 2008 movie Aamir, followed by his breakthrough work in Dev.D (2009), which garnered significant attention for its innovative tracks. Notably, Amit Trivedi has performed at high-profile events, including the wedding celebration of Anant and Radhika Ambani. His talent has been recognized with prestigious awards, such as the Filmfare R. D. Burman Award for New Music Talent and the Best Background Score at the 55th Filmfare Awards. He also received his first nomination for the Filmfare Award for Best Music Director and later won the National Film Award for Best Music Direction. Amit's musical prowess was further showcased through his participation in Coke Studio@MTV, where he created captivating compositions across seasons 2, 3, and 4. His discography boasts an array of popular songs, including Namo Namo from Kedarnath, Iktara from Wake Up Sid, and Shubhaarambh from Kai Po Che, featuring Shruti Pathak. With a diverse and extensive repertoire, Amit Trivedi continues to be a prominent figure in the music industry.

name: Kulwinder Billa
about: Kulwinder Billa is a multifaceted artist, excelling as both an actor and a prominent singer in the Punjabi music scene. His vocal talent has earned him a notable reputation within the industry. Billa's musical journey began with the release of his albums Koi Khaas and Punjab, which marked the starting point of his successful career. As a contemporary of fellow singers Fazilpuria, Sartaaj, and Kamaal Khan, he has established himself as a leading voice in Punjabi music. To date, he has released three albums, comprising a total of 31 tracks. His online presence is impressive, with his YouTube videos garnering over 300 million views. Some of his recent notable releases include Adore You, Uche Uche Paunche, and Laala Laala, further solidifying his position as a rising star in Punjabi music.

name: Akhil
about: Akhil, a prominent figure in the Punjabi music scene, has established himself as a versatile singer with a repertoire spanning multiple genres, including Pop. His musical journey began with the release of his debut single Khaab, which garnered widespread acclaim and earned the prestigious Most Romantic Ballad of the Year award at the 2017 PTC Music Awards. Since his inception, Akhil has accumulated numerous accolades, solidifying his position in the industry. His soulful voice and charismatic persona have captivated audiences, contributing to a substantial and devoted fan base. As a notable artist, Akhil's collaborations with esteemed labels such as Crown Records, Speed Records, and Geet MP3 have resulted in a plethora of popular tracks on YouTube, amassing over 400 million views across various channels. Akhil cites Harbhajan Mann as a key inspiration for his singing career, drawing motivation from the veteran artist. His recent discography includes hits like Kalla Sohna Nai, Aashiq Mud Na Jaawe, and Deewana, further cementing his reputation as a talented and prolific singer in the Punjabi music landscape. With a distinctive voice and an ever-growing fan base, Akhil continues to make his mark on the industry.

name: Vidya Vox
about: Vidya Iyer, professionally known as Vidya Vox, has emerged as a notable figure in the pop music scene. Born in Chennai, India, she relocated to the United States at a young age and currently resides there with her family. Vidya Vox's musical journey began in 2015 when she launched her YouTube channel, where she started creating innovative blends of popular Indian songs and English pop and rock tracks. Over the years, her channel has garnered an impressive following of over 5 million subscribers and accumulated more than 600 million views. Her early success was fueled by her rendition of the song Leon, which quickly gained traction and propelled her to fame. Since then, she has continued to produce and share captivating remixes on her channel. In 2017, Vidya collaborated with her sister and boyfriend to explore a fusion of bhangra, pop, jazz, and hip-hop sounds. As a celebrated singer and artist, Vidya Vox has built a significant following, particularly among the Indian youth. Her YouTube channel has played a pivotal role in her rise to popularity, with a strong fan base in India and beyond. Vidya Vox has also performed live in various cities across the globe, including the USA, England, UK, Netherlands, Europe, and multiple cities in India, as well as Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and other international destinations. With her unique sound and energetic performances, Vidya Vox has established herself as a talented and versatile artist in the music industry.

name: Amitabh Bhattacharya
about: Amitabh Bhattacharya, a prominent figure in the Indian music scene, was born in 1971 in Lucknow. With a career spanning over a decade, he has established himself as a talented lyricist and playback singer, contributing to the new wave of Bollywood music. Bhattacharya's journey in film music began in 2008, and he continues to make his mark as a leading music artist. His rise to fame came with the song Emotional Atyachar from the film Dev D, which showcased his skill as a lyricist. Since then, he has penned lyrics for numerous Hindi movies, also lending his voice to some of the tracks. Some of his notable works include Channa Mereya, Ae Dil Hai Mushkil, Bulleya, Kabira, Balam Pichkari, and Gerua, among others. Amitabh Bhattacharya's talent has been recognized with several prestigious awards. He won the National Award for the song Agar Zindagi from the movie I Am, and a Filmfare award for Abhi Mujh Mein Kahin. His song Channa Mereya has garnered an impressive nine awards, a record for the most awards won by a single song. He has also received numerous other awards, including GiMA Awards, IIFA Awards, Mirchi Music Awards, and Screen Awards, solidifying his position as a respected and accomplished artist in the Indian music industry.

name: Anusha Mani
about: In the vibrant world of Bollywood music, female vocalists have long been the driving force behind the industry's success. Anusha Mani, a talented and emerging singer, has been making waves since her debut in 2007. With a strong foundation in Carnatic music, Anusha's early training paved the way for her future accomplishments. Anusha's entry into the Bollywood scene was marked by her collaboration with composer Amit Trivedi on the film Dev D. This partnership has yielded six albums to date, showcasing her versatility and talent. One of her notable works is the song Lehrein, penned by renowned lyricist Javed Akhtar, which was featured in the movie Aisha. Anusha has also had the opportunity to share the stage with other prominent female vocalists, such as Shalmali Kholgade and Jasmine Sandlas, on the MTV show Angels of Rock. This unique show, which took the form of a road trip, aimed to inspire women across the country through original compositions and performances. Throughout her career, Anusha has lent her voice to a range of films, including Johnny Gaddaar, Thoda Pyaar Thoda Magic, Dev D, Aisha, Don 2, Chennai Express, and Shandaar. With her distinctive voice and collaborative spirit, Anusha Mani has established herself as a talented and influential singer in the Bollywood music industry.

name: Asees Kaur
about: Originating from Panipat, Asees Kaur has made a notable transition from local music circles to the mainstream Bollywood scene. With a passion for singing, she has explored various platforms, including reality TV shows like Indian Idol and Awaz Punjab Di, where she has showcased her vocal talents as a playback artist.

name: Charu Semwal
about: With a notable stint as a finalist on the esteemed Indian Idol reality show, Charu Semwal is poised to make her mark on the Bollywood music scene. Her powerful voice has been making waves in the industry, captivating audiences with her unique sound. Charu has built a significant online presence, garnering over 5 million views on her YouTube covers. This impressive feat has solidified her position as a rising talent in the music world. Her extensive performance portfolio boasts an impressive 1000 shows globally, with destinations spanning India, the USA, and beyond. Having broken into the industry with her appearance on Indian Idol, Charu has successfully carved out a niche for herself, earning a loyal fan base and establishing a reputation as a talented singer with a promising future ahead.

name: Prateek Kuhad
about: Prateek Kuhad has established himself as a prominent figure in the Indian music scene, effortlessly transitioning between English and Hindi lyrics. His debut album, In Tokens and Charms, released in 2015, marked the beginning of his international recognition. During his time studying in the United States, Prateek discovered his passion for music, which eventually led him to pursue a career in the field. As a teenager, he began learning to play the guitar and experimenting with songwriting. In addition to his solo work, Prateek has also lent his voice to several Bollywood films, including Baar Baar Dekho and Karwaan, both of which feature his soulful contributions. With a career spanning over a decade, Prateek has released four solo albums, with his most recent one, cold/mess, being released in 2018. Based in Delhi, he frequently tours both within India and internationally, showcasing his talent to a diverse audience. Throughout his journey, Prateek has remained committed to his craft, consistently producing high-quality music that resonates with listeners.

name: Gaurav Iyer
about: Gaurav Iyer has established himself as a notable figure in the realm of Carnatic and Indian Classical music, earning a spot among the prominent Indian artists of his generation. Hailing from a musically inclined family, Gaurav's introduction to music was largely influenced by his mother, who encouraged him to take up Carnatic music lessons in Kerala at the age of six. This early exposure sparked a passion that would eventually drive his career. As he honed his craft through dedicated training and experience, Gaurav began to produce and create remarkable music. His debut single, 'Paapi Kal Ka', created in collaboration with Apernit Singh, garnered recognition from esteemed artists. Gaurav's subsequent collaborations with renowned performers such as Arijit Singh, Shankar Mahadevan, and Kailash Kher further solidified his position in the industry. He received the Best Singer award from Kailash Kher, a testament to his talent. Additionally, Gaurav was a contestant on Indian Idol Season 6, where he secured a spot among the top 50. He has also had the opportunity to perform live with the acclaimed music director duo Vishal-Shekar at the NSCA in Mumbai.

name: Siddharth Basrur
about: Siddharth Basrur is a multifaceted musician from India, known for his work as a vocalist, composer, and playback singer. His journey in the music industry began with his inaugural band, Kinky Ski Munky, which marked his entry into the independent music scene. As the lead vocalist of the progressive metal band Goddess Gagged, based in Mumbai, Basrur has continued to make his mark. His contributions to the Bollywood film industry are also notable, with credits in movies such as Haunted 3D, Players, and David, showcasing his versatility as a musician.

name: Rabbi Shergill
about: Gurpreet Singh Shergill, professionally known as Rabbi Shergill, is a talented Indian musician who gained widespread recognition with his self-titled debut album and the hit single Bullah Ki Jaana in 2005. His distinctive sound blends elements of rock and Punjabi music, showcasing his unique artistic style.

name: Javed Bashir
about: With a career spanning over two decades, Javed Bashir has established himself as a notable Qawwal and Sufi singer from Pakistan. Born with a gift for classical music, he has been making waves in the industry since his debut in 2001. Hailing from Pakistan, Javed's musical journey began in his home country, where he has rendered over 100 songs. His big break came when he joined forces with the renowned Mekaal Hasan Band, catapulting him to fame not only in Pakistan but also across the Indian Subcontinent. Javed's collaborations with esteemed artists, including the likes of Shankar Mahadevan, have further cemented his reputation as a talented vocalist. His discography boasts an impressive array of Bollywood soundtracks, including Cocktail, Bhaag Milkha Bhaag, Bombay Talkies, Rush, and Kahaani, among others.

name: Shankar Mahadevan
about: As a pivotal member of the renowned trio Shankar-Ehsaan-Loy, Shankar Mahadevan has left an indelible mark on the Indian Film Industry with his distinctive and melodious compositions. His musical journey began at a tender age, with him starting to play the Veena at just five years old. With a strong foundation in both Hindustani Classical and Carnatic music, Shankar Mahadevan's vocal prowess has been showcased in various languages, including Hindi, Tamil, Kannada, Marathi, and Telugu. His impressive discography features iconic songs like Maa from Tare Zameen Par, Koi Kahe Kehta Rahe from Dil Chahta Hai, and Sur Niragas Ho from the Marathi film Katyar Kaljat Ghusali, among many others. Recent performances have seen Shankar Mahadevan take the stage at high-profile events, including the wedding of Anant and Radhika Ambani in 2024, as well as a special performance at the Isha Yoga Center to commemorate MahaShivratri in 2024.

name: Siddharth Mahadevan
about: Siddharth Mahadevan, the 26-year-old son of renowned Indian singer Shankar Mahadevan, has carved out his own path in the music industry while drawing inspiration from his father's legacy. With his soulful voice, he has made a name for himself as a talented singer, particularly with his renditions of Zinda and the rock version of Bhaag Milkha from the film Bhag Milkha Bhaag. His powerful performances earned him the Most Entertaining Male Singer award in 2013, solidifying his position as a rising star in the Indian music scene.

name: Sharry Mann
about: Sharry Mann is a versatile artist who has made a name for himself in the Punjabi music scene as a singer, songwriter, and actor. His career took off with the release of his debut album Yaar Anmulle in 2011, which marked the beginning of a successful journey that would see him produce a string of popular tracks appealing to both Punjabi and broader audiences.

name: Shahid Mallya
about: Hailing from Rajasthan, singer Shahid Mallya brought his unique vocal style to Mumbai in 2002, seeking to make a mark in the Bollywood music scene. His early career took off with singing roles in Indian TV serials, which resonated with audiences of the time and left a lasting impression. With his soulful voice, Shahid Mallya has become a sought-after performer for various events, including college functions, corporate gatherings, and wedding celebrations.

name: Tulsi Kumar
about: Tulsi Kumar's musical roots run deep, courtesy of her father, the late Gulshan Kumar, a legendary figure in the music industry and founder of T-Series. Her own musical journey began at the tender age of 6, with formal training in classical music at Suresh Wadekar's esteemed academy. As she honed her craft, Tulsi also had the privilege of learning from renowned masters, including Pt. Vinod Mishra and Pt. Satyanarayan Mishra, further refining her skills and artistic expression. With a strong foundation in classical music and a familial legacy that spans the entertainment industry, Tulsi Kumar has grown into a talented singer with a unique voice and style.

name: Amit Tandon
about: Amit Tandon's journey to stardom began with his appearance on Indian Idol Season 1, where his powerful vocals captivated audiences and earned him a loyal fan base. This early success paved the way for his transition into acting, with notable roles in popular television shows such as Kaisa Ye Pyar Hai, Dill Mill Gayye, and Yeh Hai Mohabbatein. As he established himself as a familiar face on TV, Amit's charisma and on-screen presence resonated with viewers, making him a beloved figure in Indian entertainment. Despite his accomplishments in acting, music remains Amit's first love, and he continues to nurture this passion through regular live performances and song releases. With his unique ability to evoke emotions and energize crowds, Amit Tandon delivers memorable experiences through his music. His dedication to his craft has allowed him to build a versatile career, seamlessly navigating the worlds of television and music. Amit's enduring talent and appeal have solidified his position as a respected and sought-after artist in the Indian entertainment industry.

name: Umesh Barot
about: Umesh Barot is a talented artist from Gujarat, known for his soulful voice and captivating performances as a folk singer, actor, and entertainer. His recent Gujarati single, Baby Ne Bournvita Pivdavu, has taken the music scene by storm, garnering an impressive 84 million views on YouTube. With a passion for traditional Gujarati music and dance, Umesh has been entertaining audiences with his energetic Garba programmes, Dandiya nights, and Dairas in numerous cities across Gujarat and around the world. His ability to connect with diverse crowds has made him a sought-after performer for cultural events and festivities. Umesh Barot's music and performances continue to resonate with fans, making him a popular choice for events that celebrate Gujarati heritage and culture.

name: Rakesh Barot
about: Rakesh Barot is a renowned figure in Gujarati folk music, known for his captivating performances as a singer, actor, and entertainer. His recent release, Ram Jane, has garnered significant attention, amassing over 10 million views on YouTube in a remarkably short span. Rakesh Barot's live shows, often accompanied by his band, are a staple at traditional Garba and Dandia nights, as well as Dairo events. With his unique talent and charisma, he continues to be a sought-after artist for various cultural and social gatherings. For those interested in learning more about his performances and availability, further information can be obtained through official channels.

name: Dhaval Barot
about: Dhaval Barot is a talented artist from Gujarat, known for his soulful voice and captivating stage presence as a folk singer, performer, and actor. His recent release, the Gujarati single Tame Aavsho Tyare Hu Nahi Rahu, has garnered significant attention, amassing over 5 million views on YouTube in a remarkably short span. With a career spanning performances at various events such as Dandiya nights, Dairas, and Garba programmes, Dhaval has entertained audiences in multiple cities across Gujarat and internationally. His energetic live performances have made him a sought-after artist for cultural events and festivals.

name: Nooran Sisters
about: Hailing from Jalandhar, India, Jyoti Nooran and Sultana Nooran, collectively known as the Nooran Sisters, have established themselves as prominent voices in Sufi music. Their musical roots are deeply embedded in the Sham Chaurasia Gharana tradition, a classical music lineage that informs their soulful performances.

name: Abhijeet Bhattacharya
about: Abhijeet Bhattacharya, also known by his full name Abhijeet Dhirendranath, has made a name for himself in the Indian film industry as a prominent playback singer, simply referred to as Abhijeet in Bollywood circles.

name: Ankush Bharadwaj
about: With a voice that has captivated audiences, Ankush Bharadwaj has made a name for himself in the music scene. His talent has been showcased on various reality singing competitions, including the tenth season of Indian Idol, where he finished as a strong first runner-up.

name: Vibhor Parashar
about: Vibhor Parashar is a rising star in the Indian music scene, having gained momentum through his appearance on Indian Idol. As one of the most recognizable young faces in the industry, he has quickly made a name for himself, showcasing his talent and charisma to a wide audience.

name: Gurnam Bhullar
about: Hailing from the village of Kamal Wala in Punjab, Gurnam Bhullar is a multifaceted talent who has made a mark in the Punjabi entertainment scene as a singer, model, songwriter, and actor. Born on February 8, 1995, Bhullar's rise to fame can be attributed to his popular song Diamond, which was penned by Vicky Dhaliwal and released under the Jass Records label. Before venturing into the world of entertainment, Bhullar was an avid sports enthusiast and was part of his school's under-14 basketball team, showcasing his versatility from a young age.

name: Vinay Nayak
about: Vinay Nayak is a multifaceted artist from Gujarat, known for his captivating voice and energetic performances as a folk singer, actor, and stage presence. His recent Gujarati single, Bhagvan Pan Bhulo Padyo, has taken the music scene by storm, garnering an impressive 60 million views on YouTube in a remarkably short span. With a career spanning performances at Garba events, Dandiya nights, and traditional Dairas, Vinay has entertained audiences in numerous cities across Gujarat and around the world. His latest musical offering, Gori Radha To Kala Kan Ni Deewani, was released on the Rudra Originals YouTube channel, featuring a talented cast, including Samarth Sharma and Neha Suthar.

name: Yaseer Desai
about: Born on November 15, 1989, in Mumbai, Maharashtra, Yasser Desai is a talented Indian vocalist. His musical journey began when he was just 11 years old. Yasser's introduction to the Bollywood music scene came in 2016 with the film Beiimaan Love, where he lent his voice to two notable tracks: Main Adhoora and Mere Peeche Hindustaan Hai. In addition to his Bollywood contributions, Yasser has also released several private albums, including Khuda Kare, Aaaj Mile Hain, and Tu Jo Kahe, all of which emerged in 2017.

name: B Praak
about: Hailing from the vibrant Punjabi Music scene, B Praak has established himself as a talented singer and music composer. His journey in the industry began behind the scenes, crafting music for other artists before stepping into the spotlight as a vocalist with the release of his debut single, Mann Bharrya. Frequently collaborating with esteemed lyricist Jaani, B Praak's career has continued to flourish, with notable forays into Bollywood in 2019. That year, he lent his voice to two film soundtracks, Kesari and Good Newwz, both starring Akshay Kumar, and also made a mark as a guest composer in the comedy film Bala.

name: Parmish Verma
about: Parmish Verma is a multifaceted talent who has made a significant impact on the Punjabi entertainment scene. Initially, he worked behind the camera as a video director, before transitioning to singing and eventually acting. His breakthrough role came with the film Rocky Mental, marking his debut as an actor. As a singer, Verma has garnered widespread recognition for his hit track Gaal Ni Kadni. His singing career took off in 2018 with the release of Le Chakk Mai Aa Gaya, a song that drew inspiration from his personal experiences in Australia. The song's massive success catapulted him to stardom, establishing him as a rising talent in the Punjabi music industry. Verma has since been featured in a string of popular songs, including Shada, Kache Pakke Yaar, and Diamond Da Challa. With his unique blend of talent and dedication, he continues to leave a lasting impression on his audience.

name: Hans Raj Hans
about: Hans Raj Hans is a renowned Punjabi vocalist, with his music career kicked off by the release of his debut song, Shaheed-E-Azam Bhagat Singh Di Ghori. Notably, he collaborated with the legendary Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan on the soundtrack for the film Kachche Dhaage, showcasing his talent alongside one of the industry's greatest.

name: Diljit Dosanjh
about: Diljit Dosanjh is a multifaceted artist, active in both Punjabi and Hindi film industries as a singer and actor. His music career took off with the release of his debut album, Ishq Da Uda Ada, in 2004, courtesy of Finetone Cassettes, a subsidiary of T-Series. Some of his notable tracks include 'Born To Shine', 'Lover', and the collaborative effort 'Hass Hass' with Sia, showcasing his versatility as a musician. His discography has garnered significant attention and acclaim. Dosanjh's acting career began with a lead role in the Punjabi film The Lion of Punjab in 2011, where his soundtrack 'Lak 28 Kudi Da' gained substantial popularity. He later transitioned to Bollywood with Udta Punjab, earning the prestigious Filmfare Award for Best Male Debut. With a diverse range of musical styles and cinematic roles under his belt, Diljit Dosanjh continues to captivate audiences with his talent. His performances are a testament to his dedication to his craft, leaving a lasting impression on fans and critics alike.

faq.question: What are the Booking Price of Diljit Dosanjh?
faq.answer: To get the exact booking price for Diljit Dosanjh, please share your event details with us, and we will contact you with all the necessary information, including his fees, travel, accommodation, and other requirements.

faq.question: How much Diljit Dosanjh Charges for Live Concert?
faq.answer: It depends on the Concert type, Let us know your event type and we will get back to you with charges!

name: Satinder Sartaj
about: Satinder Sartaj is a highly acclaimed singer, poet, and actor known for his work in the Punjabi language and Sufi genre. His career gained momentum in 2008 when he performed at a gig in Toronto, Ontario. The following year, he released his debut album Tere Qurbaan, although it didn't initially receive much attention. However, his 2010 album Sartaaj proved to be a breakthrough, particularly with the popular track Sai. Sartaj's acting career took off in 2017 when he portrayed Maharaja Duleep Singh in the film The Black Prince. Throughout his career, he has received numerous awards, including the Best International Act at the Brit Asia TV Music Awards in 2011. He also won Best Songwriter at the 2017 BAMA and Music Video of the Year at the 2018 BAMA for his song Udaarian. With his unique talent and accomplishments, Satinder Sartaj continues to be a prominent figure in the Punjabi music and film industry.

name: Lucky Ali
about: Lucky Ali is a multifaceted talent from India, with a career that spans both acting and music. While he has made appearances on the big screen, it's his soulful voice that has truly captured the hearts of audiences, earning him widespread recognition as a singer.

name: Gurnazar
about: Gurnazar is a talented Indian singer who has made a name for himself in the music industry. His journey began in 2012 as part of a live band, where he honed his craft and developed his unique sound. Today, he is known for his soulful Punjabi songs, which have gained a massive following on YouTube. With a discography that includes popular tracks like Koi Vi Nahi, Izhar, and Bewafa, Gurnazar has proven his ability to create music that resonates with listeners. His song Koi Vi Nahi, in particular, has been a huge success, garnering over 70 million views on YouTube. Through his music, Gurnazar continues to entertain and inspire fans, leaving a lasting impression on the Indian music scene.

name: Sukriti Kakar
about: Hailing from a family of talented vocalists, Sukriti Kakar has established herself as a prominent Indian playback singer and performer. Born into a musical household with sisters Akriti and Prakriti, who are also well-known playback singers, Sukriti's entry into the industry was perhaps inevitable. Her rise to prominence began with the title track of the 2013 film Boss, starring Akshay Kumar. Further solidifying her presence, her song 'Kar Gyi Chul' from the movie Kapoor & Sons garnered significant attention, with its YouTube views surpassing 100 million, a testament to her growing fan base.

name: Pav Dharia
about: Pav Dharia is a multifaceted artist from Australia, with a diverse range of talents that span singing, composition, music production, and cinematography. He has gained significant recognition and acclaim within the Punjabi entertainment scene.

name: Vasundhara Das
about: Vasundhara Das is a versatile talent from South India, known for her distinctive voice and captivating on-screen presence. With a career spanning multiple facets, she has made a name for herself as a skilled singer, actress, composer, and songwriter. Additionally, she is a passionate environmental advocate and a sought-after speaker. Her filmography includes notable roles in movies such as Hey Ram, Monsoon Wedding, Citizen, Ravana Prabhu, and Lankesh Patrike. Classically trained under the guidance of renowned mentors Lalita Kaikini and Pandit Parameshwar Hegde, Vasundhara has lent her voice to numerous songs in various languages, contributing to the rich musical landscape of the Indian Film Industry.

name: Dev Negi
about: Dev Negi is a talented vocalist with a strong foundation in Hindustani Classical music, which he studied under the guidance of renowned Guru Shri Vinod Verma Ji. Drawing inspiration from the legendary Late Shri Mohammad Rafi, Dev Negi has carved out a niche for himself in the music industry. His professional journey began with the song Aaja Ab Jee Le Zara, featured in the 2013 film Ankur Arora Murder Case. Since then, he has lent his voice to various films, albums, and television shows. Some of his notable recent releases include Sabki Baaratein Aayi, Is Tarah Ashiqui Ka, and Saat Samundar Paar. With his versatility and experience, Dev Negi is well-equipped to entertain audiences at diverse events, including corporate functions, college gatherings, weddings, and private parties.

name: Antara Mitra
about: Antara Mitra, the vocalist behind the hit song Gerua, has established herself as a talented singer in the Indian Film Industry, renowned for her captivating voice. With a versatile repertoire, she effortlessly sings in various languages, including Hindi, Urdu, Bengali, and English. Her journey in the music world began when she participated in the popular singing reality show Indian Idol 2, followed by another stint in the reality show Junoon, which helped launch her career.

name: Jasleen Royal
about: With a unique voice and natural talent, Jasleen Royal has made a name for herself as a skilled Indian singer, songwriter, and music composer. Notably, she is self-taught, having never received formal music training, and has developed a distinctive style that blends languages such as Punjabi, Hindi, Gujarati, and English. Her discography features a range of popular tracks, including Love You Zindagi, Nachde Ne Saare, and Jahan Tu Chala, as well as the entirety of the soundtrack for the film Hichki.

name: Nikhita Gandhi
about: Nikhita Gandhi has established herself as a versatile vocalist, seamlessly transitioning between recording playback tracks and captivating audiences with her live performances. Her distinctive voice gained widespread recognition with the popular title track Raabta, and she has continued to make waves with her more recent release, the viral hit Aao Kabhi Haveli Pe.

name: Tushar Joshi
about: Tushar Joshi's musical foundation is rooted in his formal training as a Visharad in classical music, which he earned from the prestigious Bhatkhande Sangeet Mahavidyalaya. He further expanded his skills by pursuing studies at the School of Audio Engineering in Mumbai. Joshi's professional journey began with a notable stint as an assistant to the acclaimed composer Pritam Chakraborty, where he gained invaluable experience and insight into the craft.

name: Aaman Trikha
about: Mumbai-based Aaman Trikha has established himself as a prominent figure in the Bollywood playback singing scene. His musical journey is rooted in the traditional teachings of Hindustani classical music, which he studied under the guidance of renowned guru Ustad Maqbool Hussain Khan from the esteemed Rampur, Sahaswaan Gharana. Aaman's vocal versatility has allowed him to explore a wide range of languages, including Hindi and English, showcasing his adaptability as a singer. One of his notable contributions was lending his voice to the 2014 Loksabha Election anthem, Achhe din aane waale hain, for the Bharatiya Janata Party. Interestingly, Aaman's introduction to music began with self-taught keyboard playing, which eventually paved the way for his singing career.

name: Pritam Chakraborty
about: Pritam Chakraborty is a multifaceted talent in the Indian music industry, excelling as a composer, vocalist, and music producer for numerous Bollywood films.

name: Tanishk Bagchi
about: Tanishk Bagchi is a multi-faceted talent in the music industry, excelling as a composer, lyricist, singer, and producer. He has gained widespread recognition for his unique ability to breathe new life into classic songs. Some of his notable recent works include 'Raataan Lambiyan', 'Lut Gaye', 'O Saki Saki', and 'Teri Baaton Mein Aisa Uljha Jiya', among others. These tracks showcase his skill in crafting and composing memorable songs. With a distinctive approach to music, Tanishk Bagchi continues to make his mark in the industry. His versatility and creativity have earned him a loyal following, and his music remains a staple in many playlists.

name: Juggy D
about: Born Jagwinder Singh Dhaliwal, Juggy D is a talented singer from Southall, London, who embarked on his musical journey at the tender age of 14. His early career was marked by collaborations with notable artists, including Jay Sean, with whom he shared a promising start. Juggy D's versatility has led him to work with an array of renowned instrumentalists, such as Madonna, Ricky Martin, Mary J. Blige, and Craig David. His foray into Bollywood is also noteworthy, with collaborations like Hum Tum, where he teamed up with Veronica Mehta and Rishi Rich. He made a guest appearance in the movie Kya Kool Hai Hum alongside Veronica Mehta and Jay Sean. Juggy D's self-titled debut album, released in 2004, made history as the first Punjabi language album to feature on the UK National Chart. His contributions to the music scene were recognized with a UK Asian Music Award for Best Act in 2006, solidifying his position as a talented artist in the industry.

name: Yashraj Kapil
about: Hailing from Faridabad, India, Yashraj Kapil has made a name for himself in the music scene. His talent was recognized when he took home the top prize in the reality show Sitaron Ko Choona Hai. Yashraj has also showcased his vocal skills on other prominent music platforms, including Sur Kshetra and Indian Idol 5, further solidifying his presence in the industry.

name: Nawab Kumhar
about: Hailing from the vibrant state of Punjab, Nawab Kumhar Inayat Kotia, affectionately known as Jatt Nawab, has established himself as a talented Punjabi singer and songwriter. With a impressive portfolio of work, he has written, directed, and lent his voice to numerous Punjabi tracks. One of his standout hits is the popular song Expert Jatt, which has garnered significant attention. Recently, he has been making waves with his newest releases, including Kartoos, Nawabzaadi, and Rani Haar, further solidifying his presence in the music scene.

name: Stebin Ben
about: With a voice that resonates with emotion, Stebin Ben has established himself as a talented singer and captivating live performer. His musical journey began with soulful renditions of popular tracks like Bheegi Bheegi Raaton Mein and Yeh Jo Halka Halka Suroor Hai. Stebin's entry into playback singing was marked by his contributions to the 2017 Hindi web series Class of 2017, among others. Prior to that, he had already made a notable debut with his single Zindagi, released under the esteemed T-Series label in 2015, setting the stage for a promising career in music.

name: Mohammed Irfan
about: Mohammed Irfan is a versatile vocalist from India, with a primary focus on Hindi playback singing. His linguistic range extends to other prominent Indian languages, including Tamil, Odia, Telugu, Bengali, and Marathi. Some of his notable recent works include the songs Dil Mera and Belafz Baatein, showcasing his continued presence in the music scene.

name: Naitik Nagda
about: Naitik Nagda's musical journey began at a remarkably young age, with his first live performances taking place when he was just 10 years old. As he honed his craft, he had the opportunity to collaborate with an impressive array of composers and musicians, including those who have worked with notable artists such as Kailash Kher, Sona Mohapatra, Hard Kaur, and Farhan Akhtar. One of the highlights of his career was performing on the theme song for the Common Wealth Games, a project that brought him together with the acclaimed composer AR Rahman. Naitik's talent has been recognized through various awards, including the prestigious MTV ROCK ON and the Kutch Ratna Award, solidifying his position as a skilled and accomplished instrumentalist.

name: Jasraj Jayant Joshi
about: Jasraj Joshi is a versatile vocalist from India, with a repertoire that spans multiple languages, including Hindi and several regional dialects. Notably, he has made a significant impact in the Marathi film industry, where his dynamic performances have earned him a distinct reputation.

name: Dileish Doshi
about: Based in Mumbai, Maharashtra, Dileish Doshi is a skilled musician who seamlessly blends instrumental and vocal talents. His unique interpretations of Bollywood songs have captivated audiences across the country. With a career spanning several years, Dileish has established himself as a dynamic performer, bringing his signature energy to numerous venues throughout India. His authentic voice and infectious stage presence have earned him a reputation as a talented artist who can get crowds moving and grooving to his music.

name: Binny Sharma
about: With a captivating stage presence, Binny Sharma has established himself as a talented singer and performer. As the founder of the band NotJustBinny, he has had the opportunity to showcase his skills in over 500 live performances across the world. Wherever he goes, Binny has a way of drawing in crowds and leaving a lasting impression with his infectious music, making it impossible for audiences to resist moving to the beat.

name: Devang Patel
about: Devang Patel is a multifaceted talent, seamlessly transitioning between acting, performing, directing, and comedic singing. His unique claim to fame lies in his humorous parodies of popular songs, which have entertained audiences across various television shows and music albums.

name: Farhan Sabri
about: Hailing from a family steeped in musical heritage, Farhan Sabri's roots run deep in the Bollywood industry. His grandfather, Rafiq Ahmed, was a respected harmonium player from Saranpur, while his younger uncle, Haji Aslam Sabri, gained recognition as a skilled qawwal, laying the foundation for Farhan's own journey in the entertainment world.

name: Raja Hasan
about: Born in December 1979, in the vibrant city of Bikaner, Rajasthan, India, Raja Hasan is a talented Indian playback singer. His singing career gained momentum after participating in the popular music reality show Sa Re Ga Ma Pa Challenge 2007, where he emerged as a strong contender, ultimately securing the runner-up position behind Aneek Dhar.

name: Kushal Chokshi
about: Kushal Chokshi is a multifaceted artist, balancing his talents as a vocalist with a knack for crafting compelling music productions.

name: Bhavin Dhanak
about: Bhavin Dhanak is a talented Indian singer with a focus on Bollywood cinema. His discography includes notable films such as Alone and Always Kabhi Kabhi, showcasing his vocal skills in the Indian film industry. One of his notable recent releases was the 2015 film Alone, which featured his singing contributions.

name: Renu Nagar
about: Renu Nagar is a multifaceted artist, skilled in the realms of playback singing, live performance, and instrumental music, showcasing her versatility in the entertainment industry.

name: Nirali Fozdar
about: Hailing from Ahmedabad, Gujarat, Nirali Fozdar has established herself as a skilled vocalist. With a diverse range of singing styles, she has gained recognition as a finalist on the prestigious Indian Idol platform. Nirali's musical journey began at the tender age of four, when she started training under the guidance of Devendrabhai Patni. As she progressed, she further honed her skills with Aniket Khandekar after completing her Visharad, a testament to her dedication to the craft.

name: Sohini Mishra
about: Hailing from Cuttack, Odisha, Sohini Mishra is a talented playback singer who has made Mumbai, India her home. Her rise to prominence began with her notable appearance on the popular reality show Indian Idol 6, broadcast on Sony TV, where she successfully secured a spot among the top six contestants.

name: Sanchari Bose
about: Hailing from Mumbai, the economic hub of India, Sanchari Bose has established herself as a skilled vocalist. Her musical repertoire spans a diverse range of styles, including Indian classical, Bollywood, and Indian pop, as well as rock. Notably, her talent was recognized by the Government of Madhya Pradesh, which honored her with the prestigious Lata Mangeshkar Award in 2000.

name: Shuchita Vyas
about: With a lifelong passion for music, Shuchita Vyas has established herself as a talented playback singer and captivating live performer. Her journey in the entertainment industry began at a remarkably young age, with her first stage appearances taking place when she was just four years old. As she grew older, her skills and confidence continued to flourish, earning her a win on the popular show Khelo Gaao Jeeto, broadcast on DD1. Shuchita's talent also caught the attention of a wider audience when she participated in season 2 of India's Got Talent, where she was judged by a panel of renowned celebrities, including Kirron Kher, Sonali Bendre, and Sajid Khan. Recently, she has been making waves with her video releases, including the popular tracks Dhara Nagar Thi Utari Maa Ambe Kaali and Shreenathji Hamare Aise Rasiya.

name: Anamta Khan
about: Hailing from the vibrant music scene of Punjab, Anamta Khan has emerged as a talented vocalist, bringing her unique voice to the forefront of Punjabi music.

name: Nikita Ahuja
about: Nikita Ahuja is a multi-talented musician, known for her vocal and songwriting abilities.

name: Nishtha Sharma
about: Hailing from Sultanpur, Uttar Pradesh, Nishtha Sharma is a talented vocalist who rose to fame after taking home the top honor in the inaugural season of The Voice India Kids in 2016, where she was mentored by renowned singer Neeti Mohan. Her impressive vocal abilities also led to her participation in the popular Sony TV reality show Superstar Singer, further showcasing her skills to a wider audience.

name: Gaman Santhal
about: Gaman Santhal is a renowned vocalist from Gujarat, known for his captivating music that has garnered widespread acclaim across the state. Some of his notable releases include the songs Jannat, Sita ne Ram, and Juvaru, which have been well-received by audiences in Gujarat and beyond.

name: Yo Yo Honey Singh
about: Yo Yo Honey Singh is a multifaceted talent, excelling as a composer, songwriter, and singer in the Indi-pop genre. His career trajectory began with stints as a session and recording artist, eventually leading him to make a mark as a prominent bhangra music producer. Over time, he has diversified his portfolio by venturing into music production for Bollywood films. Some of his notable recent releases include the videos for Designer, Boom Boom, and Saiyaan Ji, which have contributed to his growing discography.

name: Nancy
about: Nancy Jewel McDonie is a multifaceted talent, blending her Korean and American heritage to carve out a unique path in the entertainment industry. Born to a Korean mother and American father, Nancy's early start in show business began with appearances on various South Korean reality TV programs, including Hello Counselor, The Unlimited Show, Mak Ee Rae Show, and Olala School 2. These experiences laid the groundwork for her future success as a singer, actress, and host. As a key member of the popular K-pop group Momoland, formed in 2016, Nancy played a significant role in the group's rise to fame. Her vocals were featured on several of the group's hit singles, including BBoom BBoom and BAAM, which topped the charts and solidified Momoland's position in the K-pop scene. Prior to joining Momoland, Nancy had already showcased her talent on Korea's Got Talent in 2011 as part of the group Cutie Pies. Her beauty and charm have also been recognized, with Nancy ranking first on the list of The Most Beautiful Faces of 2023. With her diverse background and experience, Nancy Jewel McDonie continues to be a notable figure in the entertainment industry.

name: Bela Shende
about: Bela Shende is a talented Indian vocalist who has made a mark in the entertainment industry. With a diverse range of projects under her belt, she has lent her voice to numerous films, including Bollywood productions and regional cinema. Some of her most notable works include the soulful Mann Mohana from the historical epic Jodhaa Akbar, as well as Su Che from the astrologically-themed What is Your Raashee?. Her contributions to the Marathi film Natarang, particularly Wajle Ki Baara and Apsara Aali, have also garnered significant attention and acclaim.

name: Vaishali Samant
about: Vaishali Samant is a multifaceted talent in the music world, excelling as a composer, lyricist, and playback singer. She has made a significant mark in the Marathi film and music scene, showcasing her versatility and skill. In addition to her work in music, Vaishali has also had a notable presence on television, where she has shared her expertise as a judge on several reality-based singing competitions.

name: Shivangi Bhayana
about: Shivangi Bhayana is a vocalist known for her work in the music industry as a singer who lends her voice to film soundtracks.

name: Abhijeet Srivastava
about: Abhijeet Srivastava is a multifaceted talent, showcasing his skills as a vocalist, arranger, and wordsmith. His early career saw him competing in the prestigious Sa Re Ga Ma Pa Lil Champs, where he successfully secured a spot as a finalist, marking a notable milestone in his musical journey.

name: Vishal Dadlani
about: With nearly two decades of experience in the Indian film industry, Vishal Dadlani has established himself as a talented singer and composer. In collaboration with Shekhar Ravjiani, he has built a reputation for creating memorable soundtracks. Some of his notable works include the films Ra.One, Om Shanti Om, and Chennai Express, which have showcased his musical prowess and versatility.

name: Shekhar Ravjiani
about: Shekhar Ravjiani's journey in the entertainment industry began with a stint in advertising. As a renowned Indian composer and record producer, he has made a lasting impact on the Bollywood music scene. Since 1999, he has been one half of the dynamic music duo Vishal-Shekhar, creating memorable soundtracks for numerous films. Throughout their career, the duo has had the opportunity to judge talented contestants on popular music reality shows like Sa Re Ga Ma Pa in 2007 and 2010. As a vocalist, Ravjiani has lent his voice to several hit tracks, including Tujhe Bhula Diya, Bin Tere, and Meherbaan. His recent musical endeavors include video releases such as Sheykhar Rang, Boonda Baandi, and Is This That Feeling, showcasing his continued passion for creating engaging and catchy music.

name: Abhiruchi Singh
about: With a versatile voice and skilled guitar playing, Abhiruchi Singh has established herself as a talented solo artist. She often teams up with fellow musicians and bands to create engaging live performances at various events. Abhiruchi's musical style defies categorization, effortlessly transitioning between soulful ballads, upbeat party anthems, Bollywood hits, and popular English tracks, showcasing her impressive range and adaptability as a performer.

name: Sophie Choudry
