about: Sophie Choudry's musical journey began at a young age, with her first foray into singing as a 12-year-old backup vocalist. Her breakthrough came in 2000 with the hit song Yeh Dil Sun Raha Hai, performed alongside her band Samsara. This marked the beginning of her successful pop career, which soon led to solo endeavors with popular tracks like Habibi, Le Le Mera Dil, and Aaj Naiyo Sauna. In addition to her music, Sophie has also made a name for herself in the Bollywood film industry, with notable roles in movies such as Shaadi No. 1, Pyaar Ke Side Effects, Speed, and Once Upon a Time in Mumbai Dobaara. She has also made special appearances in films like Money Hai Toh Honey Hai, Kidnap, and Shootout at Wadala. Sophie's pop album Sajan Main Nachugi was released in 2016, showcasing her vocal range and ability to craft infectious dance tracks perfect for events and parties. More recently, she has released new videos, including Hungama Ho Gaya and Raat Akeli Hai, further solidifying her position as a talented and versatile artist in the entertainment industry.

name: Sugandha Mishra
about: With a strong foundation in classical music, courtesy of her grandfather, the esteemed Pt. Shankar Lal Mishra, Sugandha Mishra's musical journey began on a promising note. She further honed her skills by earning a Master's degree in Music. Her versatile voice has been featured in several Bollywood films, including Shree and Kamaal Dhamaal Malamaal. Sugandha's talent also led her to be a finalist on the popular reality show Hero Honda – Sa Re Ga Ma Pa Singing Superstar. In addition to her singing prowess, she has gained recognition for her impressive impersonation of the legendary Lata Mangeshkar.

name: Akriti Kakkar
about: Delhi-born Akriti Kakar has established herself as a versatile singer in the Indian music industry. Her discography features a range of popular tracks, including the catchy Saturday Saturday from the movie Humpty Sharma Ki Dulhania and Iski Uski from the film 2 States. In addition to her singing career, Akriti has also made appearances on television, serving as a judge on the music competition show Sa Re Ga Ma Pa: Li'l Champs. She has released her own solo album, aptly titled Akriti, which showcases her skills as a Bollywood playback singer. Other notable releases include the song Ring Diamond Di. Akriti has also demonstrated her talents beyond singing, participating in the seventh season of the dance-based television series Jhalak Dikhhla Jaa.

name: Anmol Gagan Maan
about: Anmol Gagan Maan's music journey began in 2014 with the release of her debut single, Royal Jatti. Growing up, Anmol demonstrated a natural aptitude for music and dance, laying the foundation for her future career. Prior to her singing debut, she made a notable impression in the pageant world, earning the title of Miss Mohali Punjaban at the Miss World Punjaban competition in 2013. Anmol has also honed her skills in playing the Tumbi, thanks to training from renowned artist Ustad Mundri Ji. Her 2015 album, Punjabi, proved to be a significant milestone, featuring a string of popular tracks including Kundi Muchh, Maa, Shokeen Jatt, Kala Sher, Patandar, Velly, Nakhro, Pullan Wali Gaddi, Ghant Purpose, and Patola, which collectively contributed to the album's success.

name: Gagan Kokri
about: Hailing from Amritsar, Punjab, Gagan Kokri has established himself as a talented singer. Born Gagan Sandhu, he adopted 'Kokri' as a tribute to his ancestral village, Korki Kalan, in Moga, Punjab. After pursuing a degree in hospitality management in Australia, Kokri went on to build a successful business portfolio, which includes Desi Cuts, a popular salon in Melbourne, and Azooba the Food Wonderland, a renowned Indian buffet restaurant in Australia. Despite his entrepreneurial endeavors, music remains a passion for Kokri. He made his mark in the industry with the hit song 'Tera Cheta' in 2012, which catapulted him to fame. Since then, he has performed at numerous concerts globally, entertaining audiences in Australia, New Zealand, Canada, and India. Kokri's live shows are a testament to his energy and dedication, with sets lasting anywhere from 90 to 150 minutes. In recent years, Kokri has released several notable videos, including 'Blessings of Brother' and 'Blessings of Sister', further solidifying his presence in the music scene. With his unique blend of business acumen and artistic talent, Gagan Kokri continues to inspire and entertain fans worldwide.

name: Khan Saab
about: Born on August 8th in Bhandal Dona, Kapurthala, Punjab, India, Khan Saab has established himself as a prominent figure in the Indian pop scene, particularly within the Punjabi film industry. His entry into the music world began with the release of his debut song, Rim Jhim, which was launched in collaboration with Garry Sandhu and Fresh Media. The song's lyrics were penned by Lal Autholi Wala, who also happens to be Khan Saab's uncle. Khan Saab's musical influences include legendary artists such as Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan, Salamat Ali Khan, and Ustad Hussain Baksh Gullo. He also underwent harmonium training under the guidance of Pandit Hardev Sahib, which has contributed to his unique sound. Garry Sandhu has been a key mentor in Khan Saab's career, providing valuable support and guidance. One of Khan Saab's most notable successes is his 2018 single, Zindagi Tere Naal, which garnered an impressive 20 million views on YouTube in a remarkably short span. His online presence is equally impressive, with a sizable following of over 120,000 fans on Instagram. With a net worth of $52 million at just 25 years old, Khan Saab's accomplishments are a testament to his dedication and talent. His recent releases, including Tod Gayi, Sohniyan Shaklan, and Kalakar, have further solidified his position in the music industry.

name: Ananya Birla
about: Born on July 17, 1994, in Mumbai, India, Ananya has established herself as a multifaceted talent, excelling as a singer, songwriter, entrepreneur, and mental wellness advocate. Her musical journey began with a record deal with Universal Music India, leading to the release of several notable tracks. Ananya's solo discography boasts an impressive collection of singles, including Meant To Be, Livin the Life, Hold On, Circles, and Better, which have collectively garnered over 150 million streams across platforms. This achievement is particularly significant, as she became the first Indian artist to earn a platinum certification in India for an English-language single. In 2019, Ananya unveiled her debut EP, Fingerprint, in collaboration with prominent artists from India and Nigeria. Released through Universal Music Group and Island Records UK, this project marked a significant milestone in her career, showcasing her artistic versatility and global appeal.

name: Babul Supriyo
about: Babul Supriyo is a multifaceted Indian artist, born on December 15, 1970. With a career spanning various fields, he has established himself as a talented playback singer, charismatic live performer, television host, actor, and politician. Supriyo's rise to fame began with the song Dil Ne Dil Ko Pukara from the 2000 film Kaho Naa… Pyaar Hai. This breakthrough led to widespread recognition and acclaim. Some of his notable tracks include Pari Hai Ek Pari from Hungama, Hum Tum from the film of the same name, and Chanda Chamke from Fanaa. As a recording artist, Supriyo has released a diverse range of albums, showcasing his versatility. His discography includes Monoroma Tilottama (1997), Tomari Jannya (1999), Sochta Hun (2003), Kuch Aisa Lagta Hai, Sunnah (2008), and several collections of Rabindra Sangeet, such as Kotobaar O Bhebechinu and Jodi Jantem. More recent releases include Babul Baul (2014), Mone Robe (2011), Just Tomake, What The Folk, Timeless, and the Odia-language album Suna Pharma (2016), among others.

name: Tarsem Jassar
about: Hailing from the vibrant state of Punjab, India, Tarsem Jassar is a multifaceted artist who has made a significant impact on the Punjabi film and music scene. Born and raised in Punjab, Tarsem developed a passion for writing and singing at a young age, often showcasing his talents during his school days. His journey as a professional artist began to take shape with the release of his song 'College Di Yaad' in 2013, which marked a pivotal moment in his career. Tarsem's discography boasts an impressive array of hit songs, including 'Galwakdi', 'Creez', 'Over Under', 'Cool', 'Ghaint Bande', 'Illuminati', 'Mardan Di Shaan', 'Rehmat', 'Sardara', and 'Rangle Chubare'. In addition to his music, he has also ventured into acting, featuring in notable Punjabi films such as 'Sardar Mohammad', 'Rabb Da Radio', 'Afsar', 'Daana Paani', 'Uda Aida', and 'Rabb Da Radio 2'. As a producer, Tarsem is the founder of Vehli Janta Records, a platform that showcases his creative endeavors. His recent music releases, including 'No Count', 'Rose Bud', and 'Happiness', demonstrate his continued growth and artistic expression. With a career spanning music, film, and production, Tarsem Jassar has established himself as a talented and influential figure in the Punjabi entertainment industry.

name: Satyajeet jena
about: At just 14 years old, Satyajeet Jena has already made a name for himself as a talented Indian singer and YouTuber. Hailing from Bhubaneswar, Odisha, Satyajeet's journey into the music scene began with his appearance on the popular reality show Sa Re Ga Ma Pa Little Champ, which aired on Zee TV back in 2017. His powerful audition performance of Milo ho tum hum ko quickly gained widespread attention, garnering millions of views online. Although health issues forced him to leave the show prematurely, with doctors advising him to take a break from singing, Satyajeet's passion for music persisted. His YouTube channel has since become a hub for his soulful voice, with hits like Chahunga Main Tujhe Hardam racking up an impressive 200 million+ views. More recently, Satyajeet has released new videos, including Hum Yaad Aayenge and Khabar Meri Maut Ki, further showcasing his vocal talent and dedication to his craft.

name: Shehnaaz Kaur Gill
about: Shehnaz Gill has made a lasting impression as a contestant on the latest season of Bigg Boss, leveraging her talents to captivate audiences. With a strong background in the Punjab entertainment scene, she has showcased her versatility as a singer and actress. Her social media presence has experienced significant growth since entering the Bigg Boss house, with an impressive 1.5 million-plus followers on Instagram. Shehnaz's journey in the entertainment industry began with her feature in the song Shiv Di Kitaab by Gurvinder Brar. However, it was her collaborations with notable artists like Garry Sandhu, Kanwar Chahal, and Guri that brought her widespread recognition. One of her notable music videos, Veham, has garnered over 20 million views on YouTube, demonstrating her ability to connect with a large audience. In addition to her music career, Shehnaz has also ventured into acting, making her film debut in Kala Shah Kala alongside Sargun Mehta and Binu Dhillon. As she continues to participate in Bigg Boss, her popularity is on the rise, and she is now a strong contender for the top spot. With her increased visibility, there are rumors of a potential reality show, which may be hosted by Siddharth Shukla. Her recent music releases, including Tu Yaheen Hai, Habit, and Waada Hai, have further solidified her position in the entertainment industry.

name: Vishal Mishra
about: Vishal Mishra is a versatile Indian artist, excelling as both a singer and composer. His work primarily focuses on Hindi songs, contributing to the soundtracks of Bollywood films and albums. Mishra's journey in the music industry began with a stint on a television reality singing show broadcast on DD National. This early exposure paved the way for numerous opportunities as a composer in both the Hindi and Marathi film industries. Mishra's discography includes compositions and songs for films such as Munna Michael, Friendship Unlimited, Tutak Tutak Tutiya, and Qarib Qarib Single. He has also had the opportunity to work on high-profile projects, including Salman Khan's Race 3, the title track for Yamla Pagla Deewana Phir Se, and the soundtrack for Salman Khan's Notebook. Additionally, his compositions have been featured in films like Veere Di Wedding, Anurag Kashyap's Sand Ki Aankh, and Kabir Singh. Recently, Mishra has released several video singles, including Rubaru, Darbadar, and Kya kar diya, further showcasing his artistic range.

name: Pranav Chandran
about: With a string of notable achievements under her belt, this talented artist has made a lasting impression in the entertainment industry. Her journey to stardom began with a win at the prestigious Bombay Times Fresh Face competition, followed by a notable appearance as a finalist on MTV's Colors of Youth. One of her most recognizable works is the popular song Kya Hua Tera Wada, which has garnered an impressive 66 million views and counting. She also had the opportunity to work on the official remake of Raja Ko Rani in collaboration with Venus Records. Her versatility as an artist is evident in her work on the Hindi dubbed version of Avengers: Infinity War, where she lent her voice to the song Aa Dekha Zara. Additionally, she has made her mark in the South Indian film industry, specifically in Sandalwood, with her contribution to the movie Jiilka.

name: Haricharan
about: Born on March 20, 1987, in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India, Haricharan has established himself as a versatile Indian vocalist, effortlessly navigating the realms of Carnatic music, playback singing, and instrumental performance. His linguistic versatility spans Tamil, Kannada, Malayalam, and Telugu, showcasing his remarkable musical range. Haricharan's musical journey began under the guidance of esteemed instrumentalists, including Smt. Sethu Mahadevan, K. V. Narayanaswamy, T. M. Prabhavathi, and P. S. Narayanaswamy, who helped shape his Carnatic music foundation. His professional career took off with his debut Tamil film song in the movie Kaadhal, followed by three more songs in the same film. Since then, Haricharan has lent his voice to numerous films across Tamil, Kannada, Telugu, and Malayalam languages, leaving an indelible mark on the Indian music scene. His talent has been recognized with prestigious awards, including the Filmfare Award for Best Male Playback Singer, IIFA Utsavam Awards, and Asianet Film Awards, solidifying his position as a leading vocalist in the industry.

name: Parthiv Gohil
about: Hailing from Bhavnagar, Gujarat, Parthiv Gohil is a gifted vocalist with a diverse range of credits to his name. His playback singing career has included notable films such as Devdas, Saawariya, Saheb Biwi Aur Gangster, and Kissan. At just 14 years old, Parthiv demonstrated his early talent by winning the prestigious Pandit Omkarnath Thakur Competition. Parthiv's experience in the music industry extends to television, where he participated in and later hosted the popular reality show Sa Ra Ga Ma, even finishing as a runner-up. His breakthrough as a playback singer came with Sanjay Leela Bhansali's film Saawariya. Additionally, he has lent his voice to the iconic national song Phir Mile Sur Mera Tumhara. On the international stage, Parthiv has contributed to the esteemed music project Coke Studio on MTV, collaborating with renowned artists like Ustad Rashid Khan and Richa Sharma. He has also hosted Sa Ra Ga Ma on the Zee channel, further solidifying his presence in the music industry. In 2021, Parthiv was invited to perform at the Isha Foundation's Maha Shivratri Celebration, showcasing his talent to a wide audience. With his extensive experience and versatility, Parthiv Gohil continues to be a prominent figure in the music world.

name: Seema Mishra
about: With a voice that embodies the spirit of Rajasthan, Seema Mishra has established herself as a talented singer deeply rooted in the region's traditional music. Her discography boasts an impressive array of albums, including Ghumar, Chand Chado Gignar, Kuve par Ekli, Balam Chhoto So, Chude Chamka, and Kurja, which have been recorded in collaboration with renowned music labels such as Veena, T-series, Venus, Classic, and Mayur. Through her songs, Seema Mishra offers a glimpse into the rich cultural heritage and folk traditions of Rajasthan, making her a beloved figure in the world of Rajasthani music.

name: Babbal Rai
about: Born on March 3, 1985, in Samrala, Punjab, India, Babbal Rai has established himself as a talented Indian Punjabi singer, songwriter, and actor. His entry into the music scene began with the YouTube-hit video Australian Challa, which garnered significant attention. However, it was his subsequent release, Nikki Jehi Jind, that catapulted him to fame. In addition to his music career, Babbal Rai has also made a mark in the film industry, starring in the well-received movie Mr & Mrs 420. His debut album, SAU PUTT, marked the beginning of his successful journey in the Punjabi music industry. The single Sohni further solidified his position, achieving considerable success. Babbal Rai's discography includes singing for the Punjabi film Rangeelay and releasing the album Kudi Tu Pataka, which resonated with audiences. He has since released several notable albums, such as Girlfriend Youngster Returns. Recently, he has released videos like Tun Meri Aan and Khyaal, showcasing his continued presence in the music scene. With a career spanning multiple facets of the entertainment industry, Babbal Rai has built a reputation as a versatile and talented artist.

name: Dhinchak Pooja
about: Born on December 28, 1993, Dhinchak Pooja is a multifaceted Indian artist who has made a name for herself as a YouTube personality, singer, and songwriter. Her journey in the entertainment industry began with the release of her song video Swag Wali Topi in 2015, which garnered an impressive viewership on the platform. This initial success paved the way for a string of subsequent song releases, including Daaru (2016), Selfie Maine Leli Aaj (2017), Dilon Ka Shooter (2017), Baapu Dede Thoda Cash (2017), and Aafreen Fathima Bewafa Hai (2017), as well as Naach ke Pagal (2019). These songs have resonated with audiences and become hugely popular on YouTube. In addition to her music, Pooja has also explored acting, appearing in a serial alongside notable personalities like Nakash Aziz and Karishma Tanna. Her versatility has further been showcased through her participation in reality TV shows such as Bigg Boss 11 and Entertainment Ki Raat.

name: Dhruv Sangari
about: Born in 1981, Dhruv Sangari, also known as Bilal Chishty Sangari, is a versatile artist with expertise in Sufi and Classical Indian music. As the son of esteemed scholar Kumkum Sangari and acclaimed painter Mahendra 'Manu' Sangari, Dhruv's artistic inclinations were nurtured from a young age. His musical journey began at the age of seven, with training in Hindustani classical music under the guidance of Shahana Bannerjee, followed by mentorship from Ustad Iqbal Ahmad Khan. Additionally, he honed his skills in tabla with Pandit B.S. Ramanna. Dhruv's fascination with Sufism and Sufi music led him to learn qawwali from Ustad Meraj Ahmed Nizami at the revered dargah of Nizamuddin Auliya in Delhi, a hub of the Qawwal-Bachhe Gharana tradition. His contributions to Sufi-Bhakti music have earned him recognition and awards from prestigious institutions, including the Rotary Club, Amir Khusro Foundation, Smithsonian Institution, and the University of Baroda.

name: Kairavi Buch
about: Kairavi Buch has become an iconic figure in the world of traditional Gujarati Garba, particularly as the voice of the esteemed United Way of Baroda Garba event. This grand celebration brings together over 100,000 people daily, creating a vibrant atmosphere that showcases the rich cultural heritage of Gujarati Garba. Kairavi has had the privilege of sharing the stage with renowned singer Atul Purohit, and their joint performances at the United Way of Garba Baroda have been highly acclaimed. The event has also earned a prestigious place in the Guinness Book of World Records for hosting the largest gathering of people dancing simultaneously at one location. Kairavi's performances extend beyond this event, as she regularly entertains audiences at festivals and corporate events in various countries. Her online presence is equally impressive, with a large following on YouTube, where her popular Garba songs like Hove Hove Mashup, Haiye Rakhi Hom, Radha Rani Lage, and Taro Maro Saath have garnered significant attention. One of her most notable songs, Kana Mane Dwarika Dekhad, has gained global recognition and contributed to her widespread fame. With her captivating voice and energetic performances, Kairavi Buch is a talented artist who can bring a unique touch to any event.

name: Raghav Chaitanya
about: Delhi-based singer Raghav Chaitanya has made a name for himself in the Bollywood music scene with his emotive live performances. His soul-stirring voice has captivated audiences at weddings, corporate events, and college festivals across India. A notable highlight of his career is winning the Filmfare Award for Best Male Playback Singer at the 66th Filmfare Awards for his heartfelt song Ek Tukda Dhoop from the film Thappad. With a substantial online presence, Raghav Chaitanya has garnered over 600,000 subscribers on YouTube. His recent discography includes popular tracks like Hua Main from the movie Animal, a duet with Varun Jain titled Tum Se from the film Teri Baaton Mein Aisa Uljha Jiya, and Dil from Ek Villain Returns. His earlier works, such as Gustakhiyaan, Paheli from the web series Panchayat, Lamhe, Anjaan, Parwaah, and Baatein, have also received widespread acclaim. Music enthusiasts often flock to his YouTube channel to listen to his reimagined classic songs and medleys. Raghav Chaitanya's soulful voice and engaging live performances have earned him a devoted fan base. His ability to bring a touch of melody and emotion to any event has made him a sought-after artist in the industry.

name: Amit Kumar
about: Amit Kumar's entry into the world of entertainment was practically destined, being the son of the renowned Indian singer, actor, composer, and filmmaker, the late Kishore Kumar. Growing up, Amit developed a passion for singing and acting, often performing at Durga Puja pandals during his childhood. Amit's professional journey as a singer began in 1974 with the song Apne Bas Ki Baat Nahin for the film Badthi Ka Naam Daadi. Over the years, he has established himself as a talented playback singer, actor, producer, and director in the Indian film industry. His extensive discography boasts over 209 songs, and he has acted in more than six films. Recently, Amit has released several videos, including Mujhko Yeh Zindagi, Yeh Kaisi Saza, and Humein Aur Jeene Ki, which have garnered significant attention. His popular songs, such as Bole Chudiyan, Isse Pahle Ke Yaad Tu Aayee, and Bade Achhe Lagte Hai, have racked up millions of views on YouTube. With a career spanning decades, Amit Kumar has become a household name in Indian entertainment. His versatility and talent have made him a sought-after figure in the industry, with a wide range of contributions to film and music.

name: Danish Sabri
about: Hailing from Saharanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India, Danish Sabri is a talented singer and lyricist who has made a name for himself in the Bollywood film industry. His lyrical contributions can be seen in films such as Suraj pe mangal bhari, Dabaang 3, and Pagalpanti. As a playback singer, Danish has lent his voice to numerous movies, with one of his notable hits being Radha Nachegi. His discography also includes songs from films like Housefull 4, Julie 2, Freaky Ali, Happy Bhaag Jaayegi, and Bullet Raja. Recently, Danish has released music videos for songs like Chaap Tilak and Tera Yun. With his soulful voice and creative lyrics, Danish Sabri continues to entertain audiences with his work in the Bollywood music scene. His music showcases his versatility and talent, making him a sought-after artist for various events and appearances.

name: Aditya Gadhvi
about: Meet Aditya Gadhvi, a talented folk singer from Ahmedabad, Gujarat, who has made a name for himself in the music industry. With an Oscar nomination and a win on the 'Lok Gayak Gujarat' show under his belt, Aditya has been gaining momentum with his popular single 'Gotilo'. As a key figure in the Gujarati film industry, Aditya has lent his voice to numerous hit songs, including 'Hansala Halo ne Have', 'Amber gaje', and 'Mahadev'. His playback singing credits include films like 'Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen', 'Gujjubhai-most wanted', 'Ventilator', 'Hellaro', and 'Luv ni love story'. One of the highlights of his career was performing as a backing vocalist for the renowned composer A.R. Rahman. Aditya has also had the honor of representing the 'Gujarati Tableau' at the Indian Republic Day Parade, where he performed in front of distinguished guests, including former US President Barack Obama and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi. His recent music releases, such as 'Aavi Rudi Ajwaali Raat', 'Vaatadiyu', and 'Mahahetvali', have been well-received by audiences. With his unique voice and style, Aditya Gadhvi continues to make a lasting impact in the world of folk music.

name: Khesari Lal Yadav
about: Khesari Lal Yadav, born Shatrughan Kumar Yadav, is a multifaceted Indian entertainer who has made a name for himself as an actor, singer, dancer, and model. His recent projects include music videos such as Nathuniya, Dil Deewana, and Unke Dil Mein, which have been well-received by his audience. With his diverse range of talents, Khesari Lal Yadav has established himself as a prominent figure in the Indian entertainment industry.

name: Pawan Singh
about: Pawan Singh, affectionately known as the Power Star, has established himself as a multifaceted talent in the Bhojpuri entertainment industry, excelling as a singer, actor, and music composer. His journey in the performing arts began at a young age, with early experiences in singing and stage performances, often accompanied by his harmonium playing in musical concerts. Singh's professional singing career took off with the release of his debut album, 'Odhaniya Wali', in 1997. This was followed by a string of successful albums, including 'Lollypop Lagelu' and 'Kaanch Kasailli', which showcased his musical prowess. As his career progressed, Singh transitioned into acting, making his lead role debut in the film 'Rangli Chunariya Tohre Naam' in 2007. Since then, he has appeared in numerous films, further cementing his position in the industry. In 2020, he expanded his reach by entering the Bollywood scene. Throughout his career, Singh has garnered recognition, including two prestigious International Bhojpuri Film Awards. With his diverse talent and experience, he continues to be a prominent figure in the entertainment world.

name: Akshara Singh
about: Akshara Singh is a talented Bhojpuri actress and singer who has made a name for herself in the entertainment industry. Her film credits include notable roles in Tabadala, Sarkar Raj, and Satya. She kicked off her acting career with a debut role opposite Ravi Kishan in Satyamev Jayate, released in 2010. Akshara's transition to Hindi television was marked by appearances on Zee TV's Kaala Teeka and Service Wali Bahu in 2015. As a playback singer, Akshara has lent her voice to several popular tracks, including collaborations with Avinash Jha on Bolat Chalat Bam Bam Bam in 2018. Her discography also features solo hits like Holi Hindustan Ke (2018), Ail Gail Dekho Baba Nagariya (2019), Call Kare Kya (2020), and Falanwa Ke Beta Sapanwa Me Aata Hai (2021). Some of her most recognizable songs include IDHAR AANE KA NAHI, Call Karen Kya, and Teej Ke Vrat. With a diverse range of projects under her belt, Akshara Singh continues to be a sought-after figure in the world of Bhojpuri cinema and music.

name: Dinesh Lal Yadav
about: Dinesh Lal Yadav, popularly known by his stage name Nirahua, has made a significant mark in the Bhojpuri entertainment scene as a talented singer and actor. His iconic song 'Nirahua Satal Rahe' and memorable performance in 'Nirahua Hindustani' have endeared him to fans across the region. With a knack for captivating audiences, Dinesh Lal has built an impressive discography of Bhojpuri songs, including crowd-pleasers like 'Aawa Ae Amarpali Nirahua Rang Dali', 'Nai Jhulni Ke Chhaiya', and 'Jad Ke Jogad Kake Ja'. His music has garnered millions of views on YouTube and other streaming platforms, solidifying his position as a beloved figure in Bhojpuri music. Dinesh Lal Yadav's appeal extends to various events, where his presence is highly sought after, making him a great fit for weddings, college festivals, public gatherings, and guest appearances. His availability and performance details can be obtained upon request, for those interested in featuring him at their upcoming events.

name: Jigardan Gadhavi
about: Hailing from Ahmedabad, Gujarat, Jigardan Gadhavi is a multifaceted artist who has established himself as a prominent playback singer, lyricist, performer, and music composer in the Gujarati film industry. His claim to fame came with the hit song 'Vahlam aavo ne', followed by other notable tracks like 'Mane kahi de' and 'It's time to party'. Professionally known as 'Jigrra', he has garnered a significant following on YouTube, where his recent releases, including 'Mogal Taro Aasro', 'Odhaji', 'Maro Sona No X Kanudo Shu Jaane', and 'Dhimo Varsad', have been well-received. Jigrra's latest video releases, such as 'Vela Milan Ni', 'Vrindavan', and 'Shakti Nonstop Garba', showcase his continued creativity and talent. With a diverse range of songs to his credit, Jigardan Gadhavi is a sought-after artist for events and celebrations, bringing energy and excitement to the stage with his performances.

With a versatile range, Nahid Afrin's performances are well-suited for a variety of events, such as weddings, corporate functions, college festivals, and live concerts. name: Pramod Ranade
about: Pramod Ranade is a notable figure in the Indian music scene, specifically within the Marathi sector, where he has established himself as a skilled playback singer and music arranger.

about: Raja Narayan Deb is a multifaceted musician who has made a name for himself as a skilled composer and music director, bringing his unique creative vision to various projects.

name: Shriram Iyer
about: Shriram Iyer is a talented vocalist with a diverse portfolio of work in Bollywood. His playback singing credits include films such as No One Killed Jessica, Udaan, Iqbal, and Shaadi Ke Side Effects, among others. In addition to his film work, Iyer has also lent his voice to title tracks for several television serials, including Shabaash India, Titan Antakshari, and Hero Honda Sa Re Ga Ma Pa. His collaborations with composer Amit Trivedi have resulted in notable tracks like Yatra and Bari Bari for MTV Coke Studio. As the lead singer of the fusion band OM – The Fusion Band, Iyer has had the opportunity to perform his unique blend of music globally, with tours spanning over 14 countries and more than 2000 shows under his belt. With his extensive experience in delivering high-energy performances, Iyer is well-suited to entertain audiences at various events, from college festivals to corporate gatherings and weddings. His music is a testament to his versatility and ability to connect with diverse audiences.

name: Anaida
about: Anaida is a vocalist known for her work in playback singing, bringing her voice to various projects, and also takes the stage as a live performer.

name: Talat Aziz
about: Based in Hyderabad, Talat Aziz is a multifaceted artist who has made a name for himself as a Ghazal singer, music composer, and actor. His music is characterized by its calming quality, leaving a lasting impression on his audience. Aziz's musical journey began with training in the Kirana Gharana tradition, followed by guidance from esteemed musicians such as Ustad Samad Khan, Ustad Faiyyaz Ahmed Khan, and the legendary Mehdi Hassan. His debut album, released in 1980 under the mentorship of Jagjit Singh, marked the beginning of a prolific career. Aziz has since released numerous albums, collaborating with a range of talented artists, including Sonu Nigam, Lata Mangeshkar, Asha Bhosle, Ghulam Ali, Hariharan, and Pankaj Udhas. In addition to his work in music, Aziz has also composed scores for various television serials, such as Deewar, Baaz, Adhikaar, Ghutan, Sailaab, Aashirwad, and Noorjahan. His work in film includes composing music and singing for the feature film Majaz: Ae Gham-e-Dil Kya Karun. Some of his most notable songs include 'phir chhidi raat', 'yeh ishq nahin asan', and 'chahenge tujhe par kabhi'. With a diverse range of creative pursuits, Talat Aziz continues to be a prominent figure in the music industry.

name: Sooraj Santhosh
about: Sooraj Santhosh is a multifaceted artist with a diverse range of skills, including singing, songwriting, producing, and composing. His extensive discography boasts over 300 songs in eight languages. He first ventured into playback singing with the 2010 film Darling, lending his voice to the song Inkaa Etho. Two years later, he collaborated with Austrian rock band Ashram Oriental Rock, even joining them on tour across Europe. From 2014 to 2019, Sooraj took on the role of frontman and producer for the band Masala Coffee. His talent earned him the Kerala State Film Award for Best Playback Singer in 2016 for his work on the song Thaniye. That same year, he founded his own five-piece band, Sooraj Santhosh Live, which has since performed at various national and international venues. With his unique sound and energetic live performances, Sooraj Santhosh is a sought-after artist for events of all kinds, from college gatherings to corporate functions, weddings, and private parties. His versatility and talent make him an excellent choice for those looking to add a special touch to their events.

name: Rakesh Pandit
about: Rakesh Pandit is a renowned vocalist from India, known for his captivating voice and memorable performances. With a career spanning various genres, he has established himself as a talented artist in the music industry. His unique sound and style have garnered attention from audiences nationwide, making him a sought-after figure for events and appearances.

name: Unoosha
about: Hailing from the island nation of the Maldives, Fathimath Unoosha Ahmed has made a name for herself as a gifted vocalist and composer. With a repertoire that includes popular tracks like Dil Udeyaa, Jaadhoovee Moonu, and Themunas Hevey, she has showcased her musical prowess and versatility.

name: Anup Jalota
about: Anup Jalota is a renowned singer and musician, celebrated for his contributions to the Bhajan and devotional music genres, which have resonated with audiences across generations. His musical journey began as a chorus singer at All India Radio, eventually earning him the nickname Bhajan Samraat. Jalota's impressive career has been marked by notable achievements, including the prestigious Padma Shri award in 2012, recognizing his outstanding contributions to the music industry since 2004. His discography features a wide range of popular bhajans, such as 'Aisi Lagi Lagan', 'Main Nahi Makhan Khayo', 'Rang De Chunariya', and 'Jag Me Sundar Hai Do Naam', among others. In addition to his music, Jalota has also ventured into acting, appearing in recent Bollywood films like Rock Star Binni, Satya Sai Baba, and Kartoot. With his extensive experience and versatility, Anup Jalota is an excellent choice for a variety of musical events, including Bhajan and ghazal evenings, live concerts, and more. His performances are highly sought after, and his music continues to inspire and captivate audiences of all ages.

name: Sadhana Sargam
about: Sadhana Sargam's musical journey began at a tender age in the 1970s. Her early performances include a notable appearance at the Sawai Gandharva music festival at just four years old, followed by singing the iconic song 'Ek Anek Aur Ekta' for Doordarshan when she was only six. Her breakthrough in Hindi cinema came with the song 'Saat Saheliyan' in Subhash Ghai's 1982 film 'Vidhaata'. However, it was her rendition of 'Har Kisiko Nahin Milta' in the 1986 film Janbaaz that marked a significant milestone in her career, and the song remains a fan favorite to this day. Throughout her illustrious career, Sargam has garnered numerous prestigious awards, including the National Film Award and Filmfare Awards South. She has also received accolades from state-level film awards, including five Maharashtra State Film Awards, four Gujarat State Film Awards, and one Orissa State Film Award. With her incredible vocal range and versatility, Sargam is an ideal performer for a wide range of events, from college festivals and corporate gatherings to weddings and live concerts. Her ability to captivate audiences of all ages has made her a sought-after artist in the entertainment industry.

name: Teesha Nigam
about: Teesha Nigam is a talented Indian vocalist, hailing from a family with a rich musical legacy - she is the sister of renowned Bollywood singer Sonu Nigam. With her own unique voice and style, Teesha is making a name for herself in the music industry, particularly in the realm of playback singing.

name: Balram Yadav
about: Balram Yadav is a rising talent in the music scene, captivating audiences with his unique sound and infectious stage presence. His musical style blends traditional and contemporary elements, creating a distinctive fusion that sets him apart from other artists. With a voice that is both soulful and energetic, Yadav has a way of drawing in listeners and keeping them engaged. On stage, Yadav exudes a confident and charismatic energy, effortlessly connecting with his audience and creating a sense of community and shared experience. His performances are a testament to his passion for music and his dedication to his craft, leaving a lasting impression on all who witness them. Yadav's music appeals to a wide range of listeners, from fans of traditional music to those who enjoy more modern and experimental sounds. His ability to blend different styles and genres has helped him build a diverse and loyal fan base, with audiences appreciating his authenticity and creativity. As he continues to grow and evolve as an artist, Balram Yadav is sure to make a lasting impact on the music scene, inspiring and entertaining listeners with his unique talent and captivating stage presence. With his talent and dedication, Yadav is an artist to watch in the years to come.

With a distinct style that showcases his technical prowess and musical depth, he has established himself as a leading figure in the Indian classical music scene. His performances are highly sought after for various events, including weddings, corporate functions, college festivals, and live concerts, where he mesmerizes audiences with his captivating stage presence and mastery of the sitar. name: Jankee Parekh
about: With a career spanning multiple genres and collaborations, Jankee Parekh has established herself as a talented singer. Her performances have seen her share the stage with renowned Indian artists such as Atif Aslam, Shreya Ghoshal, and Shankar Ehsaan Loy, as well as international acts like Sean Paul, T-Pain, and Kelly Rowland. Early on, Jankee lent her voice to various TV commercials, working with prominent brands like Fair & Lovely, Parachute, Rexona, and Lifebuoy. Her journey in the music industry also included participating in Indian Idol Season 4 in 2008, where she received valuable guidance from the legendary Asha Bhosle. In 2018, Jankee released her music video 'Raas Garba', a collaborative effort with Arpan Mahida, which garnered significant attention on YouTube with over 10 million views. With her versatility as a singer, stage performer, and voice-over artist, Jankee Parekh continues to make a mark in the entertainment industry. Her extensive experience and talent make her an ideal choice for a wide range of events, from wedding sangeet and live concerts to voice-over projects.

name: Kavita Krishnamurti
about: With a career spanning decades, Kavita Krishnamurti has become an iconic figure in the Indian music landscape. Having recorded an impressive 50,000 songs in 45 different Indian languages, her talent and versatility are undeniable. Born with a passion for music, Krishnamurti took a bold step at the age of 14, moving to Bombay to pursue her dreams of becoming a playback singer in the Hindi film industry. While attending St. Xavier College, she landed her first major opportunity, recording a song for the 1971 Bengali film Shriman Prithviraj alongside the legendary Lata Mangeshkar. Her professional journey as a singer began in earnest with the 1976 film Kadambari, where she had the chance to work with renowned composer Vilayat Khan. Over the years, Krishnamurti has taken her unique fusion sound to audiences worldwide, touring extensively across the globe, including the US, UK, UAE, Europe, Africa, Australia, East Asia, the Middle East, and South America. Her numerous accolades include the prestigious Best Singer of the Millennium award in 2000 and the Padma Shri in 2005, cementing her status as one of India's most respected and beloved artists.

name: Kushagra Thakur
about: Kushagra Thakur is a multifaceted Indian personality, known for his talents as a singer, model, and social media influencer. With a strong presence on platforms like TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube, he has built a notable following across various online channels. His versatile career showcases his creativity and charisma, making him a recognizable figure in the entertainment industry.

name: Harrdy Sandhu
about: Harrdy Sandhu has established himself as a prominent figure in the Punjabi music scene, captivating audiences with his charismatic presence and emotive songwriting. His music career began with the release of his debut album, 'This is Harrdy Sandhu', in 2012. However, it was his subsequent singles, 'Soch' and 'Joker', released in 2013 and 2014, that brought him widespread recognition. Harrdy's talent soon transcended regional boundaries, as his hit tracks 'Naah' and 'Kya Baat Ay' were remade for Bollywood audiences. The singer also ventured into acting, making his Bollywood debut in the sports drama film 83. With a discography that includes popular songs like 'Yaar Ni Milyaa', 'Bijlee Bijlee', and 'Titliaan', Harrdy Sandhu is a sought-after performer for live events, including concerts, college functions, and private celebrations such as wedding sangeets and corporate gatherings. His versatility and appeal make him an excellent choice for a wide range of occasions. For those interested in learning more about Harrdy Sandhu's performance schedule and availability, further information can be provided.

name: Kunal Ganjawala
about: Kunal Ganjawala's journey as a playback singer began with lending his voice to catchy jingles. His entry into Bollywood came with the 1996 film 'Saajan Chale Sasural', marking the start of a prolific career. Over the years, he has contributed to numerous Bollywood soundtracks, showcasing his versatility. Additionally, Kunal has made a name for himself in various Indian languages, including Kannada, Bengali, Telugu, Odia, and Marathi, among others. One of his standout hits is 'Bheege Honth Tere', released in 2004, which garnered significant acclaim and earned him multiple awards, including IIFA, Filmfare, Star Guild, Bollywood Movie, and Zee Cine Awards for Best Playback Singer. With his impressive body of work, Kunal Ganjawala is a talented artist with a wide-ranging appeal, making him a great fit for diverse events. For information on his performances and availability, Kunal's team is available to provide details.

With a unique sound that spans multiple genres, Shweta Subram brings a distinctive energy to her live performances. name: Tochi Raina
about: Hailing from a musically inclined family, Tochi Raina's early life was surrounded by the sounds of his father's harmonium, his grandmother's sitar, and his uncle Ratan Singh's violin. This rich musical heritage paved the way for Raina's own career, which began to take shape with his Bollywood debut in the 2008 film A Wednesday!, where he lent his voice to the song 'Bulleshah'. Over the years, Raina has established himself as a talented singer, delivering memorable tracks such as Pardesi, Kabira, Iktara, Saibo, and Aali Re. His discography also includes a music album titled 'Tochinaamah', featuring songs like Akela, Saaiyaan, and Jamoora. As the lead of his band, Band of Bandagi, Raina creates and performs soulful Sufi music that resonates with audiences. With his unique voice and style, Tochi Raina brings a distinctive energy to live events, making him a great fit for a variety of performances.

name: Alisha Chinai
about: Meet Alisha Chinai, a trailblazing figure in the Indian pop music scene. Her journey in Hindi film music began under the guidance of renowned music director and composer Bappi Lahiri, with whom she created a string of iconic disco hits. Alisha's solo career took off with the release of her debut album 'Jadoo' in 1985, marking the start of a successful run of hit releases. Her accomplishments include winning the prestigious International Billboard Award in 1995. Alisha has also received the esteemed Freddie Mercury Award for Artistic Excellence and a Screen Award for Best Indian Pop Album in 1996, thanks to the massive success of her song 'Made in India'. Additionally, her collaboration on the hit track 'Kajra Re' from the 2005 film Bunty Aur Babli earned her further accolades. With a career spanning decades, Alisha Chinai continues to be a sought-after performer, bringing her unique energy to live concerts and events. Her extensive repertoire and captivating stage presence make her an ideal choice for a wide range of occasions, from college gatherings to corporate functions.

name: Shipra Goyal
about: Hailing from New Delhi, India, Shipra Goyal is a talented Indian actress and singer. She laid the foundation for her music career by studying classical music at Hindu College in Delhi. In 2013, she made the move to Mumbai, where she quickly launched her singing career with the notable duo Vishal-Shekhar on the song Ishq Bulaava. The following year, her debut religious song Vela Aa Gaya Hai for the film Chaar Sahibzaade gained significant popularity. Since her initial success, Shipra has expanded her discography with a range of songs in both Bollywood and Pollywood. Some of her notable tracks include Angreji Wali Madam, Ungli, Tutti Bole Wedding Di, Yadaan Teriyaan, Lovely VS PU, Mainu Ishq Lagaa, and Paro. With a unique ability to seamlessly transition between languages and genres, Shipra's vocal range spans from Punjabi and English to Hindi, as well as various styles such as Sufi, Rock, Classical, and Western. This versatility has established her as a sought-after singer in the industry.

name: Payal Dev
about: Payal Dev is a renowned Indian singer and composer, celebrated for her eclectic voice and heartfelt performances. Her career took off with the song Ab Tohe Jane Na Doongi from the 2015 film Bajirao Mastani. Recently, she has released videos for songs like Kuch Baatein, Bepanah Ishq, and Baarish Ban Jaana. In 2020, Payal and her husband Aditya Dev launched Apni Dhun, an independent music platform that has brought together talented artists such as Altaf Raja, Kunaal Vermaa, B Praak, and Ankit Tiwari. Payal's work on Bajirao Mastani earned her two awards at the 2016 Mirchi Music Awards, including Upcoming Female Vocalist of the Year and Album of the Year. With her unique sound and style, Payal Dev is a great addition to various events, including college gatherings, weddings, corporate functions, and live concerts, offering a fresh blend of music to entertain audiences.

name: Hiphop Tamizha
about: Based in Chennai, Hiphop Tamizha is a dynamic musical duo comprising Rangadhithya Adhi Ramachandran Venkatapathy and R. Jeeva. Initially gaining recognition for their hip-hop and rap music, the duo expanded their creative scope in 2013 by venturing into film music production. Their rise to fame can be attributed to the viral hit Club le Mabbu le, released in 2011, which catapulted them to the spotlight. The duo's debut music album, also titled Hiphop Tamizha, holds a significant place in Indian music history as the country's first Tamil hip-hop album, introduced by Hip-hop Sanjay. One of their notable achievements includes the song Ezhuvoam Vaa being selected as the official anthem for Tamil Nadu's state elections in 2011. With their unique sound and energetic performances, Hiphop Tamizha has established itself as a prominent force in the Tamil music scene.

By the time she was 14, Monali had already received recognition for her singing, winning the Best Playback Singer Award at the Anandalok Awards for the Bengali children's song 'Choi Choi Choi Tipi Tipi'. Monali's introduction to the Bollywood scene came in 2008 with the film 'Race', where she lent her voice to the popular tracks 'Khwab Dekhe' and 'Zara Zara Touch Me'. However, it was her 2013 song 'Sawar Loo' that brought her widespread acclaim and earned her the Filmfare Award for Best Female Playback Singer. This song remains one of her most beloved and successful releases to date. With a repertoire that includes hits like 'Moh Moh Ke Dhaage' and 'Tune Mari Entriya', Monali Thakur has established herself as a talented and versatile singer in the Indian music industry.

Other notable recognitions include the Mohammed Rafi Award, Mother Teresa Award for Lifetime Achievement, and the Lata Mangeshkar Award from the Madhya Pradesh Government. Anuradha Paudwal's music career began in 1973 with the film Abhiman, composed by the legendary SD Burman. Her remarkable contributions to the world of music have earned her affectionate titles such as 'Bhajan Queen' and 'Melody Queen'.
