As a dedicated advocate for women's empowerment, she proudly represents the Beti Bachao Beti Padhao initiative. Hargun's musical repertoire spans from captivating performances on reality TV to crafting original compositions that showcase her artistry. Her story is one of perseverance and passion, making her a compelling performer for various events, including live concerts, college festivals, wedding celebrations, and corporate gatherings. Hargun Kaur's unique sound and charismatic stage presence are sure to leave a lasting impression on audiences.

about: Born in Indore and currently residing in Mumbai, Aakanksha Jachak is a vibrant vocalist with a knack for delivering mesmerizing performances. Her impressive career milestones include receiving a prestigious National Award and setting a Guinness World Record for the longest solo live vocal concert at the tender age of 16. With her exceptional talent and infectious energy, Aakanksha Jachak is a sought-after performer for high-profile events, including wedding celebrations and other grand festivities, where her powerful voice and captivating stage presence never fail to leave a lasting impression.

name: Sharad Sharma
about: Sharad Sharma has made a name for himself in the Bollywood music scene, notably as the second runner-up of the prestigious Zee TV show Sa Re Ga Ma Pa. His distinctive voice and charismatic on-stage demeanor have earned him a reputation as a compelling performer. With his unique sound, he is well-suited to entertain at a variety of events, including live concerts, wedding celebrations, and corporate functions, leaving a lasting impression on his audiences.

name: Chetan Fefar
about: Hailing from Morbi, Gujarat, and now residing in Mumbai, Chetan Fefar has established himself as a versatile artist with a knack for captivating audiences. As the distinctive voice behind Satrangi Re, he delivers high-energy performances that get crowds moving. With a talent for crafting engaging live shows, Chetan is an ideal fit for various events, including wedding sangeets, garba nights, and corporate functions. His performance portfolio boasts an impressive array of international live events, with shows in India, the UAE, and Hong Kong. With his unique blend of energy and charisma, Chetan Fefar is sure to bring an unforgettable musical experience to any celebration.

name: Shahzad Santoo
about: Shahzad Santoo Khan Qawal is a renowned vocalist dedicated to the art of Qawwali, bringing a profound sense of spirituality to his performances. His distinctive voice has captivated audiences, and he remains committed to upholding the traditions of Sufi music. Through his energetic and emotive live shows, Shahzad Santoo Khan Qawal honors the heritage of Qawwali, creating a deep connection with listeners. His music is a perfect fit for intimate gatherings, cultural events, and concerts that seek to inspire and uplift the spirit.

name: Ishita Mitra
about: Ishita Mitra is an enchanting singer and live performer with a gift for bringing warmth and vibrancy to every occasion. Whether it's a heartfelt wedding serenade or an electrifying live performance, her captivating voice elevates events into unforgettable experiences. Ishita's recent release, a captivating blend of Rajasthani folk melodies featuring Ghoomar, Chaudhary, and Pallo Latke, highlights her versatility and deep appreciation for traditional Indian music. As a sought-after performer for weddings, sangeets, and corporate events, Ishita brings her unique energy to each engagement, crafting a truly immersive musical experience that lingers long after the final note.

name: Rajashri Bag
about: Rajashri Bag has established herself as a promising vocalist, gaining widespread recognition after securing the 1st Runner-Up position in Sa Re Ga Ma Pa 2021-22. Her journey to stardom began when she impressed audiences as a finalist in Sa Re Ga Ma Pa Lil Champs 2017, and further showcased her talent by emerging victorious in the Battle Round of The Voice India Kids 2016. With her commanding voice and captivating stage presence, Rajashri is making a name for herself in the Indian music industry. Her performances are highly sought after for various events, including college festivals, wedding celebrations, and live concerts, where she continues to enchant audiences with her remarkable talent.

name: Mayabhai Ahir
about: Mayabhai Ahir has garnered widespread recognition for his captivating 'Dayra' events. As a renowned Gujarati writer and comedian hailing from Gujarat, he has established himself as a beloved figure across various age groups. With his unique brand of humor and literary talent, Mayabhai Ahir has become a household name, entertaining and inspiring audiences with his distinctive style and charisma. His presence at an event is sure to leave a lasting impression, making him a sought-after personality in the world of entertainment.

name: Zakir Khan
about: Zakir Khan is a multifaceted artist, known for his work in comedy, poetry, and acting. His journey began with a win on India's Best Stand Up Comedy, which aired on Comedy Central. This breakthrough marked the start of his successful career in stand-up comedy. Khan has since released four hour-long specials on Amazon Prime Video, each offering a unique perspective on life and relationships. These specials include Haq Se Single, Kaksha Gyarvi, Tathastu, and Mannpasand.

name: Rohan Joshi
about: Rohan Joshi's claim to fame stems from his involvement with the renowned comedy collective, AIB. As one of the group's four founding members, Joshi has played a pivotal role in shaping the outfit's unique brand of humor. Since its inception in 2012, AIB has catapulted to widespread acclaim, with Joshi and fellow member Ashish Shakya being integral to its success. As a driving force behind AIB, Joshi has consistently pushed the boundaries of comedy, earning recognition as a trailblazer in the Indian comedy scene. Beyond his work with AIB, Joshi has established himself as a talented stand-up comedian, with a slew of notable performances under his belt. He has taken the stage on prominent platforms like TLC, in addition to other shows and events. Fans can catch his latest videos, including Why Rohan Joshi Doesn't Want to Get Married, Nirmala Tai Vs Archna Tai, and Rohan Joshi Se Kya Nahi Hoga? on his YouTube channel, where he continues to showcase his comedic prowess and entertain audiences with his witty observations and humor.

name: Abish Mathew
about: Abish Mathew has carved out a niche for himself in the comedy world, effortlessly balancing his career as a stand-up comedian and a popular YouTuber. His notable collaborations with All India Bakchod have been well-received, and he's also made a name for himself as the mastermind behind the engaging late-night show, Son of Abish, as well as the thought-provoking series, Journey Of A Joke.

name: Aishwarya Mohanraj
about: Aishwarya Mohanraj is a talented comedian who has gained widespread recognition for her impressive performances as a contestant on Amazon Prime's popular comedy show, Comicstaan. With her unique perspective and witty sense of humor, she has captivated audiences and earned a reputation as a rising star in the Indian comedy scene.

name: Atul Khatri
about: Atul Khatri has made a name for himself in the comedy world, both as a skilled stand-up comedian and a popular YouTube presence. His talents have earned him recognition as one of India's top comedians, according to CNN-IBN. Notably, he has taken his comedy global, becoming the first Indian comedian to perform at the prestigious Hong Kong International Comedy Festival. Additionally, his skills have been acknowledged in other areas, as he was crowned the winner of Season 1 of CEO's Got Talent.

name: Anirban Dasgupta
about: Anirban Dasgupta has made a name for himself in the comedy world as a skilled stand-up comedian and writer. One of his notable projects is the comedy series 'Afsos', which is available to stream globally on Amazon Prime.

name: Biswa Kalyan Rath
about: Biswa Kalyan Rath is a multifaceted Indian entertainer, excelling in the realms of stand-up comedy, writing, and online content creation. His rise to fame was largely fueled by the popular YouTube series, Pretentious Movie Reviews, a collaborative project with fellow comedian Kanan Gill that showcased his unique brand of humor.

name: Gaurav Kapoor
about: Gaurav Kapur is a multifaceted Indian personality who has made a name for himself in the entertainment industry as an actor and presenter. He's particularly notable for his work on Indian television and as a cricket presenter, where he's had the opportunity to engage audiences with his unique blend of charm and humor. As the face of the Indian Premier League's pre-match show, Kapur has developed a distinct ability to craft compelling narratives and find the interesting in everyday moments, making him a beloved figure in Indian entertainment.

name: Kenny Sebastian
about: Hailing from the southern Indian state of Kerala, Kenny's upbringing was marked by a unique blend of cultures, as his family relocated to various cities across the country due to his father's career in the Navy.

name: Kanan Gill
about:
Kanan Gill, an engineer turned comedian from Uttar Pradesh, has carved a niche for himself in the Indian stand-up comedy scene. Born into a household of Navy Officers, Gill's background laid the foundation for his unique blend of wit and humor. Prior to diving into comedy full-time, he worked as a software engineer and even had a stint in a musical band, where he wrote and performed humorous songs.

Gill's transition to comedy was marked by his triumph in the Punch Line Bangalore Competition, which served as a catalyst for his professional career. Alongside Biswa Kalyan Rath, he co-created Pretentious Movie Reviews, a YouTube show that not only gained popularity but also allowed the duo to hone their comedic skills. This successful collaboration propelled Gill to become one of India's most recognizable faces in the stand-up comedy circuit.

A seasoned performer with over a thousand shows under his belt, Gill has successfully toured globally with his solo acts, including Feeling with Kanan and All Correct Opinions. His latest comedy special, Keep It Real, received widespread critical acclaim, solidifying his reputation as a skilled comedian. In addition to stand-up, Gill has also ventured into format comedy, exploring different aspects of the genre.

Gill's foray into the world of Bollywood began with his debut in the 2017 film Noor, followed by the launch of his Amazon Video series Keep It Real. He has also served as a judge on Comicstaan, a popular comedy platform that brings together talented comedians and industry experts.

name: Kunal Kamra
about: Kunal Kamra brings a distinctive voice to the world of standup comedy, leveraging his quick wit to tackle the everyday absurdities that surround us. From the complexities of modern politics to the quirks of living solo and the often-ridiculous world of television advertising, his humor offers a refreshingly honest perspective on the things that make life both relatable and ridiculous.

name: Kaneez Surka
about: Hailing from South Africa, Kaneez has made a name for herself in the Indian stand-up comedy scene. Her career took off with CNN-IBN's satirical show, The Week That Wasn't, where her sharp wit and humor quickly gained her a large following. As a pioneering female improv comedian, Kaneez has performed at numerous venues globally, conducting workshops and leaving audiences in stitches with her impressive improv skills. Her talent has taken her to cities like Seattle, Toronto, Amsterdam, and Berlin, where she's been invited to perform. Kaneez was also part of the popular Amazon Prime comedy show Comicstaan, alongside notable comedians like Biswa Rath, Kenny, Kanan Gill, and Sapan Verma. She currently hosts The General Fun Game Show, which features a star-studded lineup of comedians, including Kanan Gill, Biswa Kalyan Rath, Tanmay Bhat, and Zakir Khan. Since 2014, Kaneez has been instrumental in growing India's improv scene through her workshops, and she now hosts Improve All Stars: Games Night on Amazon Video, further cementing her position as a leading figure in Indian comedy.

name: Nishant Suri
about: Nishant Suri's career path has been a winding one, with stints in banking, photography, and other fields. However, he's finally found his footing in the world of comedy. As the champion of Amazon Prime Video's Comicstaan in 2018, Nishant has established himself as a rising star in the Indian comedy scene. With a background in engineering and a brief foray into banking, Nishant took a detour into wedding photography before discovering his true calling in stand-up comedy. Over the past few years, he's been honing his craft, earning accolades at prestigious competitions like IIT Delhi, Pajamafest, and Comedy Central's Chuckle Hunt. Known for his high-energy stage presence, Nishant's performances are marked by his unapologetic humor and uniquely expressive gestures. His passion and dedication to his craft have made him a compelling figure in the comedy world, and he continues to make a name for himself with his sharp wit and irreverent style.

name: Naveen Richard
about: Naveen Richard leads a double life, balancing his career as a lawyer with a passion for comedy. As the driving force behind the comedy collective Them Boxer Shorts, Naveen has been on a quest to make a name for himself in the entertainment industry. His early days with the group saw him bring to life quirky characters like Uncle Francis and the Malayali Land Lady, laying the groundwork for a successful career in comedy. A chance meeting with fellow comedians Kanan and Kenny in Bangalore marked the beginning of a fruitful collaboration, as they collectively created a wealth of humorous content. Naveen's journey into the world of comedy also led him to become a prominent YouTuber, with a trajectory that he fondly recalls. His rise to fame was swift, and soon he found himself sharing the judge's panel on Comicstaan alongside a talented ensemble of comedians, including Kaneez, Kenny, Kanan Gill, Sapan, and Biswa Kalyan. Today, Naveen is widely regarded as one of the most popular and beloved comedians in the industry.

name: Nishant Tanwar
about: Nishant Tanwar is a multifaceted entertainer, exceling as both a comedian and actor. With a strong presence in the Indian stand-up comedy circuit, he has successfully performed in Mumbai and extended his reach to international audiences. His appeal transcends local borders, making him a recognizable figure in Delhi and surrounding areas. Having taken the stage in over 14 countries, Nishant Tanwar's impressive experience and global perspective have cemented his position as a prominent figure in the world of comedy.

name: Niveditha Prakasam
about: Niveditha Prakasam has solidified her position as a rising star in the comedy world, thanks in part to her triumphant win on TLC's Queens of Comedy. This notable achievement marked the beginning of her journey to becoming one of the most sought-after comedians in the industry. As a contestant on Queens of Comedy, Niveditha impressed a panel of esteemed judges, including Rohan Joshi and Kaneez Surka, with her unique brand of humor. Her standout performance earned her the top spot, paving the way for a successful career in comedy. Since her win, Niveditha has seamlessly transitioned from the show to performing live, showcasing her talents through various acts and performances that have continued to entertain and captivate audiences.

name: Prashasti Singh
about: Prashasti Singh's journey to becoming a prominent figure in Mumbai's comedy scene is a remarkable one. Born in Amethi, she grew up as a diligent student, devoted to her academic pursuits from a young age. With a strong educational foundation in engineering, Prashasti initially pursued a conventional career path, working in cities like Bangalore and Hyderabad before making her way to Mumbai. However, she eventually took a bold leap into the world of comedy, defying expectations and discovering a new passion. Her talent and charm have since earned her a spot among the most admired young comedians in India. Notable appearances, including her participation in Comicstaan and performances alongside esteemed comedians like Rohan Joshi, have cemented her position in the industry, leaving a lasting impression on audiences and fans alike.

name: Shankar Chugani
about: Shankar Chugani is a witty stand-up comedian known for his engaging performances and relatable humor. His YouTube channel has become a popular destination for fans of comedy, with recent video releases like "Selling My Self Short," "Sports & Movies," and "My Childhood" showcasing his unique take on everyday life.

name: Sorabh Pant
about: Sorabh Pant has established himself as a prominent figure in the Indian comedy scene, leveraging his quick wit and incisive commentary on contemporary issues to entertain audiences. With a bold and unapologetic style, he tackles a wide range of subjects, often pushing boundaries and sparking conversations. His impressive resume boasts a multitude of performances at esteemed comedy clubs, high-profile events, and festivals, both within India and on the global stage.

name: Sumukhi Suresh
about: Hailing from India, Sumukhi Suresh is a multifaceted talent who has made a significant impact on the country's comedy scene. With roots in theater, she transitioned into stand-up comedy, where her distinctive voice and offbeat perspective resonated with audiences, setting her apart as a rising star in the industry.

name: Sonali Thakker
about: With a background in engineering, Sonali Thakker took an unconventional path to become a renowned Indian stand-up comedian. Her journey into comedy was driven by a passion that eventually overshadowed her initial career choice, propelling her to the forefront of India's vibrant comedy landscape. Sonali's stand-up routines are characterized by their refreshing candor and humor, which resonates deeply with her audience. By weaving together clever observations, personal anecdotes, and distinctive viewpoints on everyday life, she has established herself as a compelling voice in the Indian comedy circuit.

name: Sumaira Shaikh
about: Sumaira Shaikh has made a name for herself in the world of comedy, showcasing her talents as a stand-up comedian. Fans can catch her latest hilarious takes on life in videos like RoadTrip In Ambulance, Reason To Love Gangsters, and Bhai Hai Relationship Main!, all of which can be found on her official YouTube channel.

name: Sejal Bhat
about: Sejal Bhat has established herself as a rising talent in the world of comedy, bringing her unique perspective and humor to the stage as a stand-up comedian.

name: Vaibhav Sethia
about: Hailing from Kolkata, India, Vaibhav Sethia has carved out a niche for himself in the Indian comedy scene with his distinctive brand of humor. By weaving together relatable anecdotes, clever insights, and humorous takes on daily life, he has become a recognizable figure in the world of stand-up comedy. His comedic approach often delves into the mundane, extracting humor from ordinary experiences and the people in them, making his performances both entertaining and thought-provoking.

name: Chirayu Mistry
about: With a background in engineering, Chirayu Mistry took an unconventional turn to pursue his passion for comedy. Since joining The Comedy Factory in 2015, he has established himself as a notable figure in the stand-up comedy scene. Chirayu's comedic talents have taken him to various destinations worldwide, including the USA, Canada, UAE, and Australia, with over 200 performances under his belt. In addition to his stage presence, he has also showcased his writing skills by crafting content for prominent brands like Sprite. His acting credits include appearances in Gujarati films such as Chor bani Thangaat Kare and Gujjubhai Most Wanted. Furthermore, Chirayu has shared his insights through a Josh Talk, which can be found on YouTube, offering a glimpse into his thoughts and experiences.

name: Gaurav Sharma
about: Hailing from Mumbai, Gaurav Sharma has established himself as a versatile performer, seamlessly blending comedy and poetry. His journey in the entertainment industry began with a notable appearance on the Great Indian Laughter Challenge, which aired on Star One. A highlight of his career was sharing the stage with Indian comedy legend Johny Lever in Toronto, showcasing his talent to a global audience. With four years of stage experience under his belt, Gaurav's comedic style often tackles political satire and social issues, offering a unique perspective on the world around us. He has also made notable appearances on shows like Deewane Anjane, alongside Jay Phatak, on BIG Magic, and has had the opportunity to share the spotlight with some of India's most renowned poets at Hasya Kavi Sammelans. Gaurav's brand of humor is characterized by its offbeat style and clever one-liners, which have resonated with audiences and cemented his position as a rising star in the comedy scene.

name: Rajeev Nigam
about: Rajeev Nigam has established himself as a notable figure in the Indian comedy scene, bringing laughter to audiences through his distinctive brand of humor. With a career rooted in stand-up comedy, he has developed a signature style that combines witty observations of everyday life with clever satire. As a seasoned performer, Nigam has taken the stage at various comedy clubs, events, and TV shows, entertaining crowds with his relatable stories and quick-witted one-liners. His appearances on popular comedy reality shows and TV programs have further solidified his reputation as a talented comedian. Notable performances on shows like The Great Indian Laughter Challenge and Comedy Circus have earned him significant recognition. Nigam's impressive mimicry skills and versatility in portraying different characters have become a hallmark of his acts, often featuring humorous impersonations of well-known personalities with a unique twist.

name: Sapan Verma
about: Sapan Verma's journey into the world of comedy began at a young age, laying the foundation for a successful career as a stand-up comedian and writer. As a key figure in the Indian comedy scene, he co-founded the renowned collective East India Comedy, also known as EIC. With a distinct voice and humor that resonates with audiences, Verma has built a reputation for his original take on comedy, often finding inspiration in everyday life and observations.

name: Karan Talwar
about: Karan Talwar, better known by his alias Bollywood Gandu, has established himself as a multifaceted talent in the Indian entertainment scene. With a knack for finding humor in the country's vibrant film industry, he has built a sizable following online. Through his YouTube channel, also titled Bollywood Gandu, Karan offers a comedic perspective on Bollywood films and its notable personalities, resonating with audiences and setting him apart as a unique voice in the world of comedy.

name: Navin Prabhakar
about: Navin Prabhakar's foray into the entertainment industry began with a knack for mimicry that he developed during his college years. As he honed his craft, he started participating in various talent shows and competitions, impressing audiences with his uncanny ability to replicate the voices and mannerisms of iconic Bollywood figures. His big break came when he appeared on the popular TV comedy series The Great Indian Laughter Challenge, catapulting him to national recognition as a skilled comedian and mimicry artist.

name: Ali Asgar
about: Ali Asgar's journey into the world of entertainment began when he was just a teenager, around 10th grade. Although he showed a keen interest in performing, he didn't initially consider it as a viable career path. However, his portrayal of Kamal in the popular show Kahaani Ghar Ghar Ki marked a significant turning point, setting him on the path to success as a talented actor and comedian.

name: Ahsaan Qureshi
about: Ahsaan Qureshi is a notable Indian comedian, known for his witty stand-up performances. His career gained momentum in 2005 when he participated in The Great Indian Laughter Challenge, where he emerged as a strong runner-up. He also showcased his comedic talent on Star One's stand-up comedy competition. Additionally, Ahsaan Qureshi made an appearance in the film Journey Bombay to Goa, further expanding his presence in the entertainment industry.

name: Azeem Banatwalla
about: Azeem Banatwalla is a leading figure in India's comedy scene, renowned for his clever writing and razor-sharp instincts on stage. His journey in comedy began with a humble start, taking the mic for the first time at Mumbai's Zenzi pub in September 2011, marking the inception of his stand-up career.

name: Angad Singh Ranyal
about: Hailing from Delhi and raised in Libya, Angad Singh Ranyal has carved a niche for himself as a talented stand-up comedian, actor, and writer in the Indian entertainment scene. With a flair for humor, he has consistently delivered impressive performances at renowned venues like the Canvas Laugh Factory. Additionally, Angad is also a key member of the popular YouTube comedy channel, East India Company, where he showcases his creative wit and humor.

name: Kunal Rao
about: Kunal Rao's journey in comedy began during his college years, where he cut his teeth performing at open-mic nights and local comedy venues. This early start laid the groundwork for his distinctive brand of comedy, which has since become a hallmark of his career as a stand-up comedian, writer, and actor. With a keen sense of humor and a knack for observation, Rao has established himself as a notable figure in the Indian comedy scene.

name: Jimmy Moses
about:
Jimmy Moses is a product of Mumbai, the youngest sibling of the renowned comedian Johnny Lever. Born to Prakash Rao Janumala and Karunamma Janumala, Jimmy's early life was deeply rooted in the world of comedy, laying the groundwork for his illustrious career.

With over two decades of experience under his belt, Jimmy Moses has established himself as a seasoned comedian, having performed in more than 30 countries and gracing the stage over 4,000 times. This remarkable feat is a testament to his unwavering dedication to the craft and his ability to connect with diverse audiences worldwide.

name: Sahil Shah
about: Sahil Shah is a key figure in the Indian comedy scene, having co-founded the prolific East India Comedy. With a career spanning numerous international performances, he has taken to the stage in cities such as New York, London, and Dubai, among others, with an impressive tally of over 1500 shows. In 2016, Sahil was part of the esteemed lineup at the Global Citizen festival. His solo show, Childish Behaviour, embarked on a extensive tour across 25 cities in 2018, and also gained a global audience through its release on Amazon Prime Video.

name: Johnny Lever
about: With a career spanning over three decades, Johnny Lever is a trailblazer in the Indian comedy scene. Since his debut in 1984, he has made a lasting impact on the entertainment industry, contributing to more than 350 films in Bollywood.

name: Sunil Pal
about: Sunil Pal is a multifaceted talent who has left an indelible mark on India's comedy landscape. With a career spanning various mediums, he initially gained recognition as a skilled performer, effortlessly transitioning between stand-up comedy and the art of mimicry, a skill he has honed to perfection.

name: Kapil Sharma
about: Born in Amritsar, Punjab, Kapil Sharma has established himself as a multifaceted talent in the entertainment industry. With a career spanning various genres, he has made a name for himself as a skilled stand-up comedian, charismatic television host, accomplished actor, and savvy producer. His claim to fame lies in the numerous successful TV shows he has been a part of, including Comedy Nights with Kapil, The Kapil Sharma Show, and Family Time with Kapil, which have garnered significant attention and acclaim from audiences.

name: Bhuvan Bam
about: Bhuvan Bam is a multifaceted talent, excelling as a YouTube personality, songwriter, and performer. His popular channel, BB Ki Vines, has garnered a massive following, with over 14 million subscribers tuning in to his content.

name: Kautuk Srivastava
about: Based in Mumbai, Kautuk Srivastava is a multifaceted creative who thrives on being part of the cultural zeitgeist. As a writer and performer, he has lent his talents to a variety of notable shows, including MyCam, Drive with MTV, Reality Stars, and MTV Rock the Vote, with his most recent endeavor being The List with Varun Thakur.

name: Sudesh Krishna
about: Sudesh Krishna, a multifaceted talent from India, has made a name for himself in the entertainment world through his impressive comedic timing and uncanny ability to mimic a wide range of characters. His journey in the industry began with mimicry, where he quickly gained recognition for his spot-on impressions of prominent Bollywood personalities, politicians, and other notable figures, showcasing his remarkable skill and versatility as a performer.

name: Sunil Grover
about: Sunil Grover is a talented Indian comedian and actor, known for his versatility in bringing humor to various roles. His breakthrough came when he donned the colorful character of Gutthi on Comedy Nights with Kapil, captivating audiences with his unique style and wit. However, it was his portrayal of the eccentric Dr. Mashoor Gulati on The Kapil Sharma Show that truly cemented his place in the hearts of viewers. With a knack for playing memorable characters, Sunil has also made a mark in the film industry, featuring in the Bollywood blockbuster Bharat.

name: Rahul Dua
about: With a knack for finding humor in the mundane, Rahul Dua has established himself as a talented comedian, writer, and actor. His stand-up comedy sets often draw from personal experiences and everyday situations, showcasing his ability to craft humor that is both clever and universally relatable.

name: Kumar Varun
about: Kumar Varun's debut standup video takes a nostalgic trip back to his engineering days, weaving in humorous anecdotes about his married life. This set was carefully crafted with the help of editor Namit Nath, and was recorded live at That Comedy Club. The comedian also extends his gratitude to Prerna Obhan for her support in making this project a reality.

name: Rahul Subramanian
about: Rahul Subramanian is a Mumbai-based comedian who has been making waves in the entertainment industry with his unique blend of wit and humor. A standout performer, Rahul has showcased his talents in various platforms, including Amazon Prime specials and notable appearances on "Comicstaan" and "Comedy Premium League." His ability to skillfully weave everyday observations into relatable and side-splitting comedy has earned him a loyal following.

name: Kiku Sharda
about: Kiku Sharda is a multifaceted entertainer, having made a mark in the worlds of comedy, film, and television. His notable roles include portraying Hobo in the series Hatim, bringing to life the character of Constable Mulayam Singh Gulgule in F.I.R., and embodying Akbar in the comedic series Akbar Birbal. Additionally, he showcased his versatility as a comedic actor in Comedy Nights with Kapil, where he skillfully played a range of characters, with his portrayal of Palak being particularly memorable.

name: Rueben Kaduskar
about: Rueben Kaduskar is a multifaceted talent, excelling as an actor, writer, and stand-up comedian. His latest creations, including the thought-provoking 'How To Protest' and humorous 'Papa Ki Pitai', can be found on his YouTube channel, offering a glimpse into his unique brand of comedy and storytelling.

name: Amit Bhadana
about: Amit Bhadana has made a name for himself as a talented actor and YouTuber, renowned for his comedic prowess. With a strong presence across various social media platforms, including Facebook, Instagram, and YouTube, he has become a beloved figure in the Indian entertainment scene, particularly admired for his humorous video content.

name: Saurav Mehta
about: Saurav Mehta is a multifaceted talent, excelling in the realms of stand-up comedy, acting, and writing, with a career that showcases his versatility and creative range.

name: SNG Comedy
about: Originating in India, SNG Comedy - an acronym for Schitzengiggles - has established itself as a prominent force in the country's comedic landscape. The collective was born out of a collaborative effort by a group of skilled comedians seeking to craft engaging, locally-relevant content that resonates with Indian viewers.

name: Neville Shah
about: Neville Shah is a multifaceted entertainer from India, recognized for his quick-witted comedy style and distinctive ability to craft humor with a sarcastic edge.

name: Varun Thakur
about: Varun Thakur is a multifaceted talent, seamlessly transitioning between acting and comedy, with a knack for crafting relatable characters and punchlines that resonate with audiences. Born and raised in India, Thakur's comedic voice is deeply rooted in his cultural heritage, yet universally relatable.

name: Appurv Gupta
about: Hailing from Delhi, Appurva Gupta spent his formative years in the city, where he completed his early education at a government school. He later pursued a degree in engineering from the prestigious Jaypee Institute of Information Technology, located in Noida.

name: Manan Desai
about: Manan Desai is a multifaceted entertainer who has made a name for himself in the realms of comedy, acting, and radio hosting. Notably, he is also the co-creator of the popular YouTube channel 'The Comedy Factor', which showcases Gujarati humor and entertainment.

name: Neeti Palta
about: Hailing from New Delhi, Neeti Palta has made a name for herself in the world of comedy as a talented standup comedian.

name: Sudesh Lehri
about:
Sudesh Lehri is a multifaceted talent, effortlessly bridging the gap between India's thriving television and film industries. Born on October 27, 1968, in Jalandhar, Punjab, he has carved out a unique niche for himself as both an accomplished actor and a skilled stand-up comedian.

Lehri's foray into the entertainment world began in 2007, when he made his acting debut in the Hindi film "Wagah". This marked the starting point of his illustrious career, which has since seen him transition seamlessly between the small and big screens. The same year, he participated in the highly acclaimed comedy show "The Great Indian Laughter Challenge", further solidifying his reputation as a gifted comedian.

Throughout his career, Lehri has garnered recognition and accolades, including a notable award for Best Comedy Album in the Punjabi music scene, which he shared with fellow comedian Bharti Singh.

name: Aakash Gupta
about: Aakash Gupta is a multifaceted talent from India, blending comedy, acting, and writing with a unique perspective shaped by his roots in Old Delhi. With a knack for humor, he has been entertaining his family and friends from a young age, often using impressions of his relatives to bring laughter to gatherings. His career in comedy took off from these humble beginnings, with his ability to mimic his maasi (aunt) being a particular highlight. As his career has progressed, Aakash has become known for his intense focus on his craft, which can sometimes be misinterpreted as a serious demeanor. However, those who know him understand that he is a jovial person who is deeply passionate about making people laugh. His comedy style is showcased in his recent YouTube releases, including I'm Chef, Paan, and Couple Goals, which offer a glimpse into his creative and humorous world.

name: Abijit Ganguly
about: Abijit Ganguly is a notable figure in India's vibrant comedy scene, which has been gaining momentum in recent years. With multiple appearances on prominent platforms such as NDTV Prime, Radio One, Times of India, and CNN News, his brand of comedy has resonated with audiences across various age groups, effortlessly bridging the gap between younger and older generations.

name: Ramya Ramapriya
about: Ramya Ramapriya embarked on her comedy career in 2017, marking a significant departure from her previous life. Originally from the city, Ramya holds an engineering background, but her true passions lay elsewhere. Feeling unfulfilled in her corporate job, she made the bold decision to leave it behind. Despite having a more straightforward path available, Ramya chose to forge her own way, embracing the challenges that came with it. In her free time, she enjoys activities like painting, stitching, and binge-watching shows, often finding solace in sleep. At her core, Ramya is an old soul, struggling to navigate the complexities of modern life. Her claim to fame may be her appearance on Comicstaan in 2019, but she prefers to keep a low profile, keeping her personal struggles and dark past private.

name: Them Boxer Shorts
about: Meet Them Boxer Shorts, a collective of talented individuals comprising Naveen Richard, Mani Prasad, Aravind Anil Kumar, and Rahul Hota. This group of actors, comedians, and creatives came together in 2013, united by their passion for making people laugh. Their diverse comedic style offers something for everyone, blending clever writing, music, and sketch comedy. One of their notable projects is the mockumentary 'Better Life Foundation', which features Kanan Gill and Sumukhi Suresh. The team has also lent their writing expertise to Comedy Central's sketch show 'The Living Room', which aired in 2014. With their unique brand of humor, Them Boxer Shorts is a versatile and entertaining act that can bring laughter to various events, from live shows and college festivals to corporate gatherings and private functions.

name: Sumit Sourav
about: Hailing from Jamshedpur, Jharkhand, Sumit Sourav has established himself as a prominent figure in India's comedy scene. Growing up, he was a reserved and introspective individual, yet he was drawn to the world of performance. While pursuing engineering in Kolkata, Sumit Sourav discovered his passion for acting, public speaking, and comedy. He began to hone his craft by participating in plays, presentations, and open mic nights, where he initially faced challenges but eventually found his footing. After completing his studies, Sumit Sourav landed a job as a VFX designer at the edtech startup Byju's in Bengaluru. However, his true calling remained in the realm of comedy, and he took a chance by auditioning for Comicstaan S2. His comedic talents have since been showcased through various video releases, including Inter Cast Marriage, Pizza Story, and Dusra Baccha Kyun Karte Hai? which can be found on his YouTube channel. With his unique brand of humor, Sumit Sourav has become a sought-after performer, entertaining audiences at live shows, college festivals, corporate events, and private gatherings.

name: Tanmay Bhat
about: Tanmay Bhat, a renowned Indian comedian and writer, was born on July 23, 1987, in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. With a successful career spanning multiple platforms, he has solidified his position as one of India's most popular and commercially successful comedians. As the co-founder of the acclaimed comedy group 'All India Bakchod' (AIB), alongside Gursimran Khamba, Tanmay Bhat has made a lasting impact on the Indian comedy scene.

name: Urooj Ashfaq
about: At just 23 years old, Urooj Ashfaq has already made a name for herself as a rising star in the comedy scene. Based in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India, Urooj balances her passions as both a writer and comedian. Her journey into comedy began on an unexpected note, sparked by a less-than-stellar academic performance in school. In a candid interview, Urooj recalled feeling like she needed to pivot and try something new. It was a friend's suggestion that led her to take the stage at an open mic event at the Canvas Laugh Club in Mumbai back in June 2016. Since then, Urooj has gone on to claim top spots in several stand-up comedy competitions, showcasing her quick wit and sharp humor.

name: Vipul Goyal
about: Hailing from Rajasthan, India, Vipul Goyal has established himself as a talented stand-up comedian and actor. With a background in electrical engineering from the prestigious Indian Institute of Technology Bombay, Vipul's journey into the world of comedy began during his college days, where he developed a passion for theatre. He has consistently been ranked among the top comedians in India, and his notable performances include starring in the highly successful web series Humorously Yours, a production of The Viral Fever, a leading web series production house in India.

name: Sundeep Sharma
about: Sundeep Sharma has established himself as a seasoned stand-up comedian and voice artist, known for his captivating storytelling ability. With a diverse portfolio, he has collaborated with prominent brands in the advertising and media industry, notably lending his voice to characters in NDTV's satire series, Gustakhi Maaf. Sundeep has also written scripts for radio stations, including Red FM Delhi and the BBC World Service Trust. His experiences living in multiple cities have given him a unique perspective on life in India, particularly the struggles of artists. His comedy sets, which often blend Hindi and English, offer a humorous and relatable take on everyday life, from the mundane to the absurd. Drawing inspiration from his surroundings, Sundeep's stories are infused with wit and humor, making him a compelling performer. Recognized as one of the 'Best in Stand-Up' by CLC, Sundeep continues to tour and perform his one-hour special, 'The Sundeep Shawarma Show.' He has also released several videos on his YouTube channel, including 'Dadi Banati kya Thee' and 'Pi ke Mat Chala,' which showcase his comedic talent and versatility. With a passion for connecting with live audiences, Sundeep remains dedicated to his craft, constantly seeking new ways to engage and entertain his fans.

name: Vishwash Chauhan
about: Hailing from Haryana, Vishwash Chauhan is a multifaceted performer with a strong background in theater and acting, complemented by his knack for stand-up comedy. Having made it to the finals of The Great Indian Laughter Challenge in 2017, he draws inspiration from his roots to craft relatable and amusing stage performances that often find their base in his hometown experiences.

name: Gaurav Gupta
about:
Gaurav Gupta's comedic persona is a unique blend of his Delhi upbringing and his sharp observations of life's everyday moments. As a dentist by profession, he's honed in on the nuances of human interactions, which he skillfully weaves into humorously relatable anecdotes. With a keen eye for the absurd, Gaurav crafts witty observations that resonate with his audience.

A seasoned performer, Gaurav has made a name for himself at open mic events, where his clever wordplay and clever observations have earned him a loyal following. With a career that seamlessly straddles his medical and comedic pursuits, Gaurav's irreverent take on life is as refreshing as it is side-splitting.

Fans can catch up with Gaurav's latest creations on his YouTube channel, where he frequently drops new content, including recent hits like "Daughter," "Baccha Hum Paal lenge," and "Market Down Hai."

name: Karunesh Talwar
about: Karunesh Talwar brings his authentic self to the stage, delivering humor that's rooted in clever wordplay and witty observations. Unlike many comedians, he doesn't rely on exaggerated voices, facial contortions, or over-the-top physical antics to get a laugh. Instead, his unique brand of comedy is built around his sharp writing and clever use of language, making him a standout in the world of stand-up.

name: Parvinder Singh
about: Parvinder Singh, a standout comedian, rose to prominence as a finalist on The Great Indian Laughter Challenge in 2017. Born with a comedic spark, his arrival was met with a humorous remark from the doctor, setting the tone for a lifetime of laughter. Growing up, Parvinder developed a knack for dodging flying slippers and avoiding trouble, skills that now serve him well in his comedic pursuits. As a charming and witty performer, Parvinder's Punjabi roots often find their way into his humor, adding a unique flavor to his stories. By day, he works in sales, but his true talent lies in spinning engaging tales that don't require a hard sell - they're entertaining enough to speak for themselves. Join him on a hilarious journey through the cities that have shaped him, from his birthplace to the stages where he now performs. Parvinder's latest comedy videos, including Dilli, Dating 2.0, and Aam Vs Avocade, can be found on his YouTube channel, offering a glimpse into his comedic world and showcasing his talent for making audiences laugh. With his natural charm and quick wit, Parvinder is sure to delight audiences and leave them looking forward to his next performance.

name: Jaspreet Singh
about: Jaspreet is a comedian who has made a name for himself with his relatable and engaging content that resonates with people of all ages and backgrounds. His impressive online presence is evident in the over 50 million views he's garnered from just four videos. As a seasoned performer, he has taken the stage over 400 times, entertaining audiences in more than 30 cities across India, Australia, the UK, and the UAE. Before becoming a full-time comedian, Jaspreet pursued a career in engineering and spent eight years working in the IT industry. He also dabbled in theater during his college days, which eventually led him to try his hand at stand-up comedy. Today, he's a favorite among colleges and corporates, having performed at esteemed institutions like IITs, NITs, and DU, as well as for top brands such as Adidas, Hyundai, and American Express. Jaspreet's stand-up solo, Tu Toh Chup Hi Reh!, has been a huge success, with over 10,000 tickets sold worldwide. He's had the opportunity to travel extensively, taking his comedy to cities like Delhi, Dubai, Bangalore, Melbourne, Mumbai, and London. He's also been featured at the prestigious Jaspal Bhatti humor festival and has appeared on notable platforms like the BBC Asia Network in London and ABC News in Australia. Jaspreet has been recognized as one of the rising stars of comedy by NDTV and has been featured in prominent publications such as The Hindu, The Economic Times, and The Tribune, as well as online portals like Meninx, MTV, and Scoop Whoop. His latest comedy releases, including Crowd Work Comedy, Khanna Main Banaunga, and Koi Load Nahi, can be found on his YouTube channel.

name: Sumit Anand
about: Sumit Anand, a notable figure in Indian stand-up comedy, is set to make his mark at the Edinburgh Fringe. With a unique approach, his performance deviates from traditional joke-telling, offering a fresh perspective. Since bursting onto the comedy scene five years ago, Sumit has consistently looked back on his journey with reflection. Despite occasional thoughts of exploring other creative pursuits, such as music or magic, his comedic talents have kept him in demand. His YouTube channel features a collection of video releases, including It's My Birthday, My Job, My Home, and The Maid, showcasing his distinctive voice and style.

name: Ravi Gupta
about: Ravi Gupta is a comedian who finds humor in the mundane aspects of everyday life. With a distinctive style that earns him the moniker shuddha desi comic, he brings a unique perspective to the stage. Hailing from Uttar Pradesh but currently based in New Delhi, Ravi's background in cartooning has honed his ability to find the humor in everything around him. As he delved deeper into the world of standup comedy, he discovered a natural affinity for it, and his passion for making people laugh has become a defining part of his career.

name: Manik Manha
about: Hailing from Delhi, India, Manik Manha has established himself as a notable figure in the comedy scene. With a distinctive style that blends dry wit with a hint of irreverence, he has won over audiences at various comedy shows and events. Having already made the rounds at virtually every major comedy venue in Delhi, Manik is now expanding his reach to top comedy hubs across the country. Interestingly, he also boasts an unexpected talent - being a champion of avenue dance battles, showcasing his versatility beyond the comedy stage.

name: Suresh Albela
about: Suresh Albela is a multifaceted entertainer from India, skilled in the art of stand-up comedy, mimicry, and acting. His remarkable ability to emulate voices and mannerisms has earned him a reputation as a talented mimic. Albela's rise to fame began with his appearance on the popular reality TV series The Great Indian Laughter Challenge, where his impressive impersonations of celebrities, politicians, and actors captivated both the judges and the audience. With a career spanning numerous comedy performances and events throughout India, Albela has developed a distinctive comedic voice, blending his sharp wit with uncanny mimicry skills that have endeared him to crowds nationwide.

name: Lalit Shokee
about: Lalit Shokeen has made a name for himself as a prominent figure on social media and YouTube. His claim to fame lies in creating comedic content that resonates with his audience. Shokeen's journey on YouTube began on June 11, 2015, when he uploaded his first video to his channel, LShokeen Films. The humorous Haryanvi videos he posted quickly gained traction and went viral, earning him a significant following. In addition to LShokeen Films, Lalit Shokeen also operates a secondary channel, Lalit Shokeen Vlogs, where he shares more personal and behind-the-scenes content with his fans.

name: Dhirubhai Sarvaiya
about:
Dhirubhai Sarvaiya is a talented Gujarati comedian hailing from the small village of Khirasara, near Rajkot city in Gujarat, India. With a rich background in folk singing, he has spent over two decades immersed in the world of 'Lok Sahitya.' This traditional roots-based knowledge has now evolved into his signature style of humor, earning him recognition as one of the prominent Gujarati comedians of his time.

Dhirubhai's comedy performances are characterized by his ability to seamlessly blend wit and satire, often pushing the boundaries of traditional Gujarati humor. His hilarious comedy videos can be found on YouTube, providing a platform for fans to enjoy his unique style of comedy at their convenience. As a sought-after performer, he regularly conducts live shows and concerts across India and abroad, including the United States, England, Dubai, and Singapore.

Born into a farming family, Dhirubhai's down-to-earth upbringing has instilled in him a genuine connection with his audience. His unpretentious nature and infectious sense of humor have captured the hearts of many, offering a refreshing escape from life's challenges. His recent video releases, such as 'Gher vadi kye kai Baju,' 'Khatla na 2 Paya,' and 'Parki panchayat,' are just a few examples of his comedic genius.

Dhirubhai's performances are a testament to his dedication to his craft, and his ability to create laughter and joy for his audience is a true gift. His comedy has the power to transcend cultural boundaries, making him a beloved figure in the world of Gujarati entertainment.

name: Sairam Dave
about: Sairam Dave is a renowned Gujarati comedian with a career spanning over two decades. Born into a family of educators, Dave initially pursued a career in teaching, but his passion for folk art and comedy eventually led him to release his debut comedy audio cassette, 'Chaman Banega Crorepati', in 2001. This breakthrough success marked the beginning of his journey as a professional comedian. Dave's comedy often draws inspiration from his hometown of Jamnagar, Gujarat, and his performances have taken him to numerous countries, including the USA, Australia, New Zealand, Dubai, Muscat, Abu Dhabi, and Switzerland. With over 40 international trips under his belt, he has successfully introduced his unique brand of humor to a global audience. In addition to his work as a comedian, Dave is also a prolific author, having written several notable books, such as 'Sairamna Hastakshar', 'Rang Kasumbal Gujarati', a collection of patriotic songs, 'Aksharni Aangaliyu Zali', and 'Mamanu Ghar Ketle?', a collection of nursery rhymes for children. Dave's recent comedy releases, including 'Pushpa Dharaish', 'Hasya ni Vaccine', and 'Prem na Saval Javab', can be found on his YouTube channel. With his diverse range of creative pursuits and extensive performance experience, Sairam Dave has established himself as a leading figure in Gujarati comedy, entertaining audiences worldwide with his unique blend of humor and folk culture.

name: Bharti Singh
about: Bharti Singh has established herself as a leading figure in Indian entertainment, leveraging her sharp wit and infectious energy to deliver memorable comedic performances as a comedian, actress, and TV personality.

name: Karthik Kumar
about: Karthik Kumar is a multifaceted talent from India, with a career spanning acting, comedy, and business ventures.

name: Nitin Jani
about: Hailing from Bardoli, Gujarat, Nitin Jani - affectionately known as Khajur Bhai - has made a name for himself as a talented Gujarati comedian, YouTuber, and actor. His YouTube channel, Khajur Bhai, features a collection of his latest works, including the popular videos Mobile Chorayo, NST Alkline Water, and Garmi Ma Gola, showcasing his unique brand of humor and creativity.

name: Tarun Jani
about: Hailing from Bardoli, Gujarat, Tarun Jani, affectionately known as Lala bhai, has made a name for himself as a talented Gujarati comedian, YouTuber, and actor. His YouTube channel, Khajurbhai, features a collection of entertaining videos, including his recent releases such as Dubai Nu Sonu, Bhabhi Ane Bhaibandh, and Lockdown ma Padosi, which showcase his comedic flair and versatility as a performer.

name: Nimesh Patel
about: Nimesh Patel is a multifaceted talent in the entertainment industry, with a strong background in stand-up comedy, writing, and production. His writing credits include work on several high-profile shows, showcasing his ability to craft compelling comedic content.

name: Swati Sachdeva
about: Swati Sachdeva is making a name for herself in the Indian comedy scene, offering a fresh perspective that resonates with audiences. With her quick wit and down-to-earth humour, she has built a loyal following and consistently delivers entertaining performances. Her distinctive approach to comedy has earned her a reputation as a talented and engaging performer, leaving a lasting impression on those who experience her shows.

name: Vikalp Mehta
about:
Vikalp Mehta is a talented comedian known for his uncanny ability to capture the essence of Bollywood stars, with his standout impressions of Akshay Kumar being a particular crowd favorite. With a gift for dynamic performance and exceptional mimicry skills, Mehta consistently brings audiences to their feet with his engaging comedy style and infectious energy.

A master of comedic timing, Mehta has honed his craft to deliver side-splitting laughs that leave a lasting impression on his fans. His impressive range and versatility as a performer have made him a sought-after name in the entertainment industry. Whether he's bringing his unique brand of humor to a live stage or a corporate event, Vikalp Mehta is sure to leave a lasting impact on his audience.

name: Nishant Kumar
about:
Comedian Nishant Kumar hails from Chandigarh, where he has built a reputation for crafting relatable and entertaining stand-up routines. With a keen eye for everyday observations, Nishant seamlessly weaves together humor and personal stories, leaving his audiences in stitches.

Nishant's comedic style has resonated with diverse crowds, making him a sought-after performer in the region. His approach to humor is authentic and engaging, offering a refreshing take on the world around us.

As a stand-up comedian, Nishant has honed his craft through his experiences and observations, making him a talented and charismatic performer on stage.

name: Saikiran
about:
Saikiran Rayaprolu, known to fans as Saikiran, has carved a niche for himself in the world of Indian stand-up comedy with his witty observations on the mundane and the quirky aspects of everyday life. Drawing heavily from his personal experiences, his comedy often delves into topics such as identity, relationships, and the realities of growing up. His viral hits, "Middle-Class," "Life Before Marriage," and "Corporate Life," have resonated with audiences on platforms like YouTube and Amazon Prime Video.

Saikiran's clever approach to storytelling has endeared him to a diverse range of fans, from young professionals to families, who appreciate his engaging style and relatable humor. His dedication to exploring the complexities of modern life has made him a standout figure in the Indian comedy scene.

name: Amit Tiwari
about:
Amit Tiwari is a charismatic standup comedian who seamlessly blends witty observations with clever wordplay to keep audiences in stitches. With a strong background in entrepreneurship, he brings a refreshing perspective to the world of comedy, tackling everyday situations with a keen eye for humor.

Tiwari's impressive track record boasts over 200 live performances, showcasing his ability to connect with diverse crowds and consistently deliver laugh-out-loud moments. His success in numerous comedy contests has solidified his position as a rising star in the industry.

As a multifaceted performer, Amit Tiwari has honed his craft to captivate and entertain various audiences. His unique style and infectious energy make him an exciting addition to any event.

name: Pooja Kashyap
about: Pooja Kashyap is a talented thespian carving out her niche in India's vibrant theatre scene. With a diverse range of roles under her belt, including notable performances in productions such as 'Maasti Kallu' and '13 Margosa Mahal,' she has established herself as a versatile and accomplished actor. Beyond her work in theatre, Pooja has also made a name for herself as a skilled stand-up comedian, entertaining audiences across the country with her unique wit and charm.

name: Piyush Sharma
about: Piyush Sharma is a rising star in the comedy scene, garnering attention for his witty commentary on everyday life and ability to find humour in the mundane. With a knack for delivering sharp, well-timed jokes, he has a talent for captivating audiences and leaving a lasting impression with his energetic stage presence. His comedy style, which often touches on relatable themes, has resonated with fans and helped establish him as a fresh voice in the world of comedy.

name: Ankita Shrivastav
about: With her debut stand-up video Bombay Girls, Local Trains racking up an impressive 4 million views, Ankita Shrivastav has established herself as a rising star in the comedy scene. Her distinctive style of storytelling has a broad appeal, connecting with young audiences from both urban metropolises and smaller towns across India. By sharing relatable tales, Ankita has carved out a niche for herself, making her a compelling choice for events looking to feature fresh and engaging comedic talent.

name: Manhar Seth
about: Manhar Seth is a comedian on the ascent, recognized for his clever insights and down-to-earth comedic style. Through his keen observations and amusing personal stories, he consistently delights audiences at both live performances and digital events, leaving a lasting impression with his unique brand of humor. With a talent for finding the humor in everyday life, Manhar Seth continues to build a loyal following and establish himself as a notable figure in the comedy scene.

name: Jayvijay Sachan
about: Jayvijay Sachan is a captivating performer who has been making waves in the music scene with his unique sound. His musical style blends elements of contemporary and traditional genres, creating a distinctive fusion that resonates with audiences of all ages. With a strong stage presence, Jayvijay Sachan has the ability to connect with his fans on a deep level, drawing them in with his charismatic energy and infectious enthusiasm. As a live performer, Jayvijay Sachan brings a level of passion and dedication to his craft that is undeniable. His music is a reflection of his personality, with each song showcasing his creativity and talent. Whether he's performing intimate acoustic sets or high-energy shows with a full band, Jayvijay Sachan has a way of captivating his audience and leaving a lasting impression. With a growing fan base and a reputation for delivering memorable live performances, Jayvijay Sachan is an artist to watch in the music industry. His music is a testament to his skill and artistry, and his stage presence is a reflection of his passion and dedication to his craft. As he continues to grow and evolve as an artist, Jayvijay Sachan is sure to make a lasting impact on the music scene.

name: Hitesh Antala
about:
Hitesh Antala is a talented and versatile Indian comedian known for his work in the Gujarati entertainment industry. Born and raised in India, Antala brings a unique perspective to the world of comedy, often incorporating his cultural background and everyday experiences into his performances.

As a comedian, Antala has made a name for himself with his witty observations and ability to connect with audiences of all ages. He has performed at numerous comedy shows and events, honing his craft and developing a distinct style that has endeared him to fans.

With a strong foundation in Gujarati culture and a deep understanding of human nature, Antala's comedy often explores the complexities of everyday life, making him a relatable and entertaining performer.

name: Gurleen Pannu
about:
Gurleen Pannu is an emerging force in the world of comedy, captivating audiences with her sharp wit and engaging storytelling. 

Her early breakout role came on the popular online platform "Comedy Sketch Show," where she showcased her unique brand of humor. Later, she joined the esteemed cast of Comicstaan (2018) and Chalo Koi Baat Nahi (2021), solidifying her position as a talented and versatile comedian.

With a knack for crafting hilarious narratives and clever one-liners, Gurleen has quickly established herself as a standout in the industry. Her ability to effortlessly navigate a wide range of comedic styles has endeared her to fans and peers alike.

Gurleen's impressive body of work has earned her a reputation as a skilled and innovative comedic voice, one that is sure to continue to entertain and inspire audiences for years to come.

name: Munawar Faruqui
about:
Munawar Faruqui is a multifaceted artist, best known for his bold and irreverent style that has captured the hearts of audiences far and wide. With a career-defining stint on the popular reality show Bigg Boss 17, he solidified his position as a household name.

Munawar's journey as a comedian and rapper is a testament to his boundless creativity and unapologetic wit. One of his earliest successes came with the viral standup comedy video "Dawood, Yamraaj & Aurat," which he uploaded to his YouTube channel in April 2020. The video marked a turning point in his career, catapulting him to newfound fame and setting the stage for his future endeavors.

Through his unique blend of humor and music, Munawar has carved out a distinct niche for himself in the entertainment industry. His work continues to inspire and entertain, showcasing his innate talent and unwavering dedication to his craft.

name: Deep Vaidya
about:
Deep Vaidya is a multifaceted artist, carving his path in the entertainment industry as a talented theatre actor and stand-up comedian. His unique blend of humor and charisma has allowed him to connect with diverse audiences. In addition to his performance career, Deep holds a significant role as the production head of The Comedy Factory, overseeing creative and logistical aspects of the organization.

Beyond his professional endeavors, Deep's creative outlet is evident through his engaging YouTube content. His recent releases, such as "Pranks & Girlfriend," "Rajkot Wedding," and "My Gujju Family," showcase his ability to craft relatable, often humorous stories that resonate with viewers.

name: Malika Dua
about:
Mallika Dua is a multifaceted talent, effortlessly weaving together her passions for comedy, acting, and writing. With a distinct voice and irreverent style, she quickly gained a massive following thanks to her hit series 'Shit People Say: Sarojini Nagar Edition', a witty and relatable take on everyday life in Delhi's Sarojini Nagar.

Mallika's talent knows no bounds, and she has been making waves in the Indian entertainment industry with her stand-up comedy, acting, and writing. Her unique perspective and sharp wit have endeared her to audiences and critics alike, making her a standout figure in contemporary Indian comedy.

name: Saloni Gaur
about:
Saloni Gaur is a multifaceted comedian who has captured the hearts of audiences with her clever sketches and masterful impressions. Her breakout character, 'Nazma Aapi', catapulted her to stardom, but it's her unapologetic approach to satire that has truly set her apart. By injecting humor into complex social and political issues, Saloni Gaur has established herself as a fearless and innovative voice in the comedy world.

With a unique blend of wit and social commentary, Saloni Gaur continues to push boundaries and challenge her audience's perspectives. Her performances are both entertaining and thought-provoking, making her a standout figure in the comedy scene.

name: Upasana Singh
about:
Upasana Singh is a multifaceted Indian actress who has left an indelible mark on the entertainment industry. Her breakthrough role as a deaf-mute in the 1997 film Judaai not only showcased her acting prowess but also introduced her to the masses. However, it is her iconic portrayal of the lovable and mischievous "Bua" on the popular TV show Comedy Nights with Kapil that has cemented her place in the hearts of audiences.

With her signature on-screen style and impeccable comedic timing, Upasana Singh has mastered the art of delivering clever one-liners in both Punjabi and English. Her unique blend of humor and wit has endeared her to fans of all ages, making her a revered figure in the world of Indian entertainment.

Throughout her illustrious career, Upasana Singh has established herself as a talented and versatile actress who can effortlessly navigate the realms of drama, comedy, and more. Her enduring popularity is a testament to her remarkable talent, dedication, and the special connection she shares with her audience.

name: Vadivelu
about:
Vadivelu, a comedic icon in Tamil cinema, has left an indelible mark on the industry with his unique blend of humor and wit. Over the course of his illustrious career, he has received widespread recognition, including not one but two Filmfare Award South honors and an impressive six Tamil Nadu State Film Awards, a testament to his enduring impact on the world of entertainment.

With a distinctive style that has endeared him to audiences across the globe, Vadivelu has established himself as a household name, synonymous with laughter and joy. His contributions to the Tamil film industry have been nothing short of remarkable, and his influence continues to be felt even today.

name: Charle
about: With a career spanning over 800 Tamil films, Charle has established himself as a prominent figure in South Indian cinema, excelling in comedic and supporting roles. Notably, he has also earned a Ph.D. in Tamil from Tamil University, where his research focused on the concept of humor in Tamil cinema. Throughout his extensive body of work, Charle has showcased his versatility and dedication to the craft, making him a beloved and recognizable name in the industry.

name: Harsh Gujral
about:
Harsh Gujral has made a name for himself in the world of comedy with his quick wit and sharp observations. His rise to prominence began with a series of performances at the renowned Canvas Laugh Club, where he honed his craft and developed a unique style that has captivated audiences.

Through his work, Harsh has established himself as a skilled comedian with a knack for crafting clever, relatable humor. His ability to think on his feet and connect with his audience has earned him a loyal following, and he continues to be a sought-after performer at comedy clubs and events across the country.

With a background that includes performances at top comedy venues, Harsh has developed a distinctive voice that sets him apart from other comedians. His ability to tackle a wide range of topics with humor and sensitivity has made him a favorite among comedy fans, and his shows are often described as both hilarious and thought-provoking.

name: Santhanam
about: Santhanam's journey to stardom began with his early days as a television comedian, where his undeniable charm and wit quickly made him a household name. His breakout role came on STAR Vijay's popular show Lollu Sabha, where he took center stage in hilarious spoofs of Tamil films, showcasing his impressive ability to poke fun at the industry in a light-hearted and entertaining way.

name: Senthil
about: With a career spanning numerous iconic films in Tamil cinema, Senthil has solidified his position as a beloved comedic figure. His on-screen partnership with fellow comedian Goundamani has yielded some truly unforgettable moments. Notable films like Hindustani, Muthu, and Padaiyappa have showcased Senthil's impressive comedic talent and impeccable timing, earning him widespread acclaim. His contributions to these blockbuster hits have left a lasting impact on the world of Tamil comedy.

name: Harisree Ashokan
about: With a career spanning over 200 films, Harisree Ashokan has established himself as a prominent figure in Malayalam cinema, particularly in comedic roles. His journey in the entertainment industry began as a mimicry artist with the Harisree troupe, where he honed his skills and eventually transitioned to acting. Throughout his career, Ashokan has made a significant impact on the Malayalam film industry, showcasing his versatility and talent in a wide range of comedic characters.

name: Janagaraj
about:
Janagaraj is a seasoned South Indian film actor with a career spanning over four decades, marked by his versatility and knack for comedy. With an impressive filmography of over 240 movies, he has established himself as a sought-after supporting actor and comedian in the industry.

Janagaraj's rise to prominence began in 1980 with the critically acclaimed film Nizhalgal, directed by the renowned Bharathiraja. This breakthrough role laid the foundation for his successful career, during which he shared the screen with some of the biggest names in South Indian cinema. His ability to bring humor and depth to his characters has endeared him to audiences and filmmakers alike, cementing his status as a beloved figure in the entertainment industry.

name: Jaswinder Bhalla
about:
Jaswinder Bhalla has been making audiences laugh for over three decades, starting his career in the late 1980s. As one of the most beloved Punjabi comedians, he has carved a niche for himself by infusing humor into cinema through clever taglines.

With a career spanning decades, Jaswinder has become synonymous with adding a comedic twist to Punjabi films. His ability to deliver punchlines that resonate with audiences has made him a household name. His unique blend of wit and humor has entertained generations, solidifying his position as a respected figure in the Punjabi comedy scene.

Through his work, Jaswinder continues to bring joy and laughter to people of all ages, showcasing his versatility and talent as a comedian. His impact on Punjabi cinema is undeniable, leaving a lasting legacy that will be remembered for years to come.

name: Saswata Chatterjee
about:
Saswata Chatterjee is a multifaceted talent who has captivated audiences with his nuanced performances on stage and screen. His early rise to fame came through his portrayal of Topshe in the acclaimed television series, helmed by the visionary director Sandip Ray. Since then, he has continued to excel in a diverse range of roles, showcasing his incredible versatility as an actor.

One of his most notable successes came with the critically acclaimed film Kahaani, directed by Sujoy Ghosh in 2012. His chilling portrayal of Bob Biswas, a complex and intriguing assassin, left a lasting impact on audiences nationwide. Through his work, Saswata Chatterjee has demonstrated a remarkable ability to inhabit complex characters and bring depth to the stories he's a part of.

With a career spanning multiple mediums, Saswata Chatterjee has established himself as one of the most respected and sought-after actors in Indian cinema. His dedication to his craft and his passion for storytelling have endeared him to fans and industry professionals alike, cementing his status as a beloved and accomplished artist.

name: Brahmanandam
about:
Brahmanandam is a beloved figure in the world of Telugu cinema, with a career spanning decades that has solidified his position as one of India's most revered comedic actors. As a master of the art of comedy, he has effortlessly captured the hearts of audiences and industry professionals alike with his unique blend of wit and charm.

Throughout his illustrious career, Brahmanandam has received numerous accolades, including the prestigious Padma Shri, India's fourth-highest civilian honor, a testament to his immense contributions to the world of entertainment. His extensive filmography boasts an impressive array of iconic roles, cementing his status as a comedic legend in Indian cinema.

name: Mir Afsar Ali
about:
Mir Afsar Ali is a multifaceted entertainer, effortlessly juggling the roles of comedian, radio personality, television host, and vocalist. Renowned for his sharp wit and captivating stage presence, he has become a beloved figure in the entertainment industry.

His popular show, 'Mirakkel,' catapulted him to fame, endearing him to audiences with its unique blend of humor and charm. With a career spanning multiple mediums, Mir Afsar Ali continues to be a sought-after talent, leaving a lasting impact on fans through his irrepressible energy and infectious laughter.

name: Gurpreet Ghuggi
about:
Gurpreet Ghuggi is a multifaceted performer who has carved out a distinct niche for himself in the world of Punjabi and Hindi cinema. With a career spanning over three decades, he has made a significant impact on the entertainment industry through his versatility as an actor and comedian.

Ghuggi's journey in the arts began in the early 1990s, where he honed his craft in theatre, eventually transitioning to the big screen. His breakthrough role in a leading comedic part brought international recognition, catapulting him to the forefront of the Punjabi entertainment scene.

Today, Ghuggi continues to be a sought-after talent, known for his ability to seamlessly blend humor and emotion in his performances. His dedication to his craft has endeared him to audiences across the globe, solidifying his position as a respected figure in the world of Indian cinema.

name: Binnu Dhillon
about: Birender Singh Dhillon, better known by his stage name Binnu Dhillon, has established himself as a prominent figure in the Punjabi entertainment industry, exceling as an actor, comedian, and producer.

name: Samay Raina
about:
Samay Raina is a multifaceted talent who has carved a niche for himself as a skilled comedian and a passionate chess enthusiast. His breakthrough moment came when he shared the stage as a co-winner of the highly acclaimed Comicstaan season two, a testament to his impressive comedic abilities. 

Beyond his stand-up career, Samay Raina has also made a name for himself as the founder of Comedians On Board (COB), a unique online chess tournament that brings together comedians and celebrities to engage in friendly competition. This innovative platform showcases his creativity and ability to think outside the box, blending his love for comedy and chess to create an unforgettable experience.

name: Gursimran Khamba
about:
Gursimran Khamba is a multifaceted figure in India's comedy scene, best known for his uncompromising perspective on social issues and his sharp wit as a comedian. As one of the co-founders of the influential All India Bakchod (AIB) collective, Khamba has cultivated a reputation for pushing boundaries and sparking conversations with his unapologetic humor.

Through his work, Khamba has developed a unique ability to find humor in even the most pressing topics, often leaving audiences in stitches with his clever insights and incisive commentary. His irreverent style has endeared him to fans and critics alike, making him a standout figure in Indian comedy.

Khamba's contributions to the country's entertainment landscape have been significant, and his influence extends beyond the world of comedy. He continues to be a driving force in shaping the national conversation, using his platform to address social issues and challenge societal norms.

name: Anubhav Singh Bassi
about:
Indian comedian Anubhav Singh Bassi first burst onto the standup scene in 2017 after a chance appearance at an open mic night. This pivotal moment marked the beginning of his journey as a skilled comedian, one that would eventually lead him to share his unique brand of humor with audiences nationwide.

In addition to honing his craft through live performances, Bassi has also showcased his talents on Amazon Funnies with a memorable monologue. Furthermore, his hit show "Bas Kar Bassi" has traveled extensively across India, entertaining crowds in over 35 cities along the way. With his refreshing take on everyday life, Bassi has established himself as a notable figure in the Indian comedy scene.

name: Abhishek Upmanyu
about:
Abhishek Upmanyu's rise to prominence as a sought-after comedian began in earnest in January 2022. His unique brand of observational humor, coupled with a distinct style, has captivated audiences across the country, bridging cultural divides in the process.

As a masterful storyteller, Upmanyu has woven a rich tapestry of experiences and observations, tackling everyday life with wit and nuance. His ability to find humor in the mundane has endeared him to fans, cementing his status as one of India's leading stand-up comedians.

name: Jay Chhaniyara
about:
Jay Chhaniyara's journey in the world of comedy began at an astonishingly young age of six. What started as a childhood passion eventually blossomed into a successful career. His breakthrough moment came when he showcased his talents on the popular reality show The Great Indian Laughter Challenge on Star One. 

Since then, Jay has continued to entertain audiences with his unique blend of humor. He has also made appearances on other prominent Indian television channels, including Zee TV's Aashayein and SAB TV's Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah.

name: Krushna Abhishek
about:
Krushna Abhishek is a skilled Indian comedian who has made a lasting impact on the nation's entertainment scene. With a knack for delivering witty one-liners and hilarious performances, he has become a household name in Indian television.
