Best known for his memorable stints on comedy shows like Comedy Circus, Comedy Nights Bachao, and The Kapil Sharma Show, Krushna has consistently showcased his unique sense of humor and ability to connect with audiences. His impressive career has also seen him take on various comedy roles in films, further solidifying his status as a beloved figure in Indian entertainment.

As a talented comedian with a strong presence on both television and the big screen, Krushna Abhishek continues to entertain and delight audiences with his signature style and infectious humor.

name: East India Comedy
about:
East India Comedy is a collective of talented Indian stand-up comedians who have been making waves in the comedy scene for years. The group initially consisted of seven comedians but has since evolved, with a core team of four dedicated performers: Azeem Banatwalla, Kunal Rao, Sapan Verma, and Sahil Shah.

Known for their witty humor and uncanny ability to poke fun at everyday life, these comedians have captured the hearts of audiences across India. Their unique brand of comedy has been showcased through various live performances, with each member bringing their distinct perspective to the table.

With a focus on storytelling, satire, and clever observations, East India Comedy has carved out a niche for themselves in the world of Indian comedy. As they continue to grow and evolve, their loyal fan base eagerly awaits their next show, eager to experience the group's signature blend of laughter and entertainment.

name: Anuvab Pal
about:
Anuvab Pal is a multifaceted Indian artist, renowned for his versatility in the entertainment industry. He seamlessly transitions between the worlds of comedy, literature, and television, effortlessly showcasing his creative range.

As a stand-up comedian, Anuvab Pal brings his unique perspective to the stage, often incorporating witty observations and clever wordplay into his performances. His sharp humor and infectious energy have endeared him to audiences across the country.

Beyond his stand-up work, Anuvab Pal has also made a name for himself as a talented screenwriter, playwright, and novelist. His writing often explores themes of everyday life, relationships, and social commentary, offering a refreshing and relatable perspective on the world.

In addition to his individual projects, Anuvab Pal has also had the opportunity to collaborate with other creatives on popular platforms. One notable example is his recurring role as a rotating co-host on Season 4 of The Bugle podcast, where he engages with listeners and fellow hosts on a wide range of topics.

name: Vir Das
about:
Vir Das is a multifaceted artist, effortlessly navigating the realms of comedy, acting, and music. Born and raised in India, Vir has made a name for himself as a talented comedian, bringing laughter and joy to audiences through his sharp wit and engaging stage presence. His impressive filmography includes notable roles in Badmaash Company and Delhi Belly, cementing his status as a versatile and in-demand performer.

Vir's ability to tackle complex themes and topics with humor and sensitivity has earned him critical acclaim and a loyal following. His Netflix special, Abroad Understanding, is a testament to his thought-provoking and entertaining style, offering a unique perspective on the human experience.

As a comedian, actor, and musician, Vir Das continues to push boundaries and defy expectations. His infectious energy and creative spirit make him a compelling figure in the entertainment industry, and his contributions to the world of comedy and beyond are undeniable.

name: Parikrama The Band
about: Hailing from Delhi, India, Parikrama is a renowned Rock & Roll band that has been making waves in the music scene since its inception on June 17, 1991. The band's name, derived from Sanskrit, translates to 'Orbital Revolutions', reflecting their unique blend of sounds. With a penchant for live performances, Parikrama has built a reputation for their energetic shows, often incorporating traditional Indian instruments like the Tabla, Flute, and Mridangam alongside conventional instruments such as the Guitar, Keyboard, and Drums. The band's approach to music is distinct, with a focus on capturing the raw energy of their live performances rather than relying on studio recordings. This approach has allowed them to develop a loyal fan base and showcase their improvisational skills. At the heart of Parikrama are its talented members, each bringing their own unique style to the table. The band consists of Nitin Malik on vocals, Sonam Sherpa and Saurabh Chaudhry on guitars, Subir Malik on keyboards, Gaurav Balani on bass, and Srijan Mahajan on drums. Together, they create a sound that is both rooted in tradition and forward-thinking, making Parikrama a compelling force in the world of Rock & Roll.

name: Sanam Band
about: Sanam Band has carved out a unique niche for themselves in the music scene, blending nostalgic Bollywood classics with their own distinctive sound. Their heartfelt interpretations and contemporary style have resonated with audiences worldwide, earning them a devoted fan base. The band's YouTube presence is a testament to their popularity, with their channel ranking among India's top 10 independent channels. With an impressive 855 million views and 4.6 million subscribers, their soulful renditions have clearly struck a chord. Songs like 'Mere Mehboob,' 'Lag Jaa Gale,' 'Duaa,' 'Pal Pal Dil Ke Paas,' and 'Dilbar Mere' have become viral sensations, enchanting music enthusiasts globally. Sanam Band's live shows are a high-energy experience, perfect for elevating any occasion. Their dynamic performances have captivated crowds at various events, from concerts to college gatherings and private functions. With their infectious sound and captivating stage presence, they are an excellent choice for those looking to create an unforgettable experience.

name: Strings
about:
Strings, a legendary Pakistani rock band, has been making waves in the music industry since 1988. Their iconic soundtrack, "Aakhri Alvida," for the film Shootout At Lokhandwala, not only showcased their musical prowess but also catapulted them to international fame.

The release of their fifth studio album, "Koi Aanay Wala Hai," marked a significant milestone in Strings' career. Co-produced by John Abraham, this album topped the charts in Pakistan and India, featuring soundtracks from films like Shootout At Lokhandwala and Zinda. This achievement solidified their position as a leading force in the Pakistani music scene.

Strings have entertained crowds at numerous live performances, including shows with Indian Ocean in Hyderabad and Ahmedabad. Their popularity soon caught the attention of Levi's Pakistan, who appointed them as brand ambassadors. The band's fan base extended beyond Pakistan's borders, with a significant following in Nepal. This international recognition earned them the title of Asia's favourite band at the MTV Asia Awards.

A remarkable feat in Strings' history was their performance at the prestigious Rashtrapati Bhavan, making them the first Pakistani band to achieve this milestone. Their impressive list of accolades includes Best Band at the MTV Music Awards 2009 and Best Album at the same ceremony. Additionally, they were named MTV Asia's most favourite band in 2005, cementing their position as a beloved and respected band in the region.

name: Meghdhanush
about: Hailing from Ahmedabad, India, Meghdhanush is a three-piece rock band that came together in 2009, united by their passion for music and a shared vision. With a focus on the rock genre, the band believes in the transformative power of music to uplift and inspire, spreading positivity and overcoming negativity. At the heart of Meghdhanush's approach is a commitment to creative expression, originality, and innovation. This ethos drives them to craft unique and emotive compositions that blend elements of experimental pop and rock. Their distinctive sound has resonated with audiences in the Gujarati music scene and beyond, earning them a reputation as a standout act in the rock industry. Notable highlights of Meghdhanush's career include composing the soundtrack for the acclaimed Gujarati film Chhello Divas and receiving the prestigious MTV Never Hide Sounds award. With their captivating performances and dedication to their craft, Meghdhanush continues to make a lasting impact on the music landscape.

name: Astitva Band
about:
Astitva: A Fusion of Sound

Hailing from the vibrant city of Delhi, Astitva has been an integral part of India's rock music scene since 2007. This innovative band has carved out its own niche by blending the deeply meditative ragas of traditional Indian music with the energetic beats of rock and jazz, infused with the poetic nuances of Urdu literature.

Astitva's music is designed to resonate with a wide audience, with each song offering a unique listening experience. Their compositions are carefully crafted to evoke distinct emotions, often telling a story within the melody. This artistic approach allows listeners to connect with the music on a deeper level.

One notable collaboration for Astitva was with popular Indian YouTuber Bhuvan Bam in 2016, resulting in the single "Dil Banjara." This union showcased the band's versatility and ability to adapt to diverse creative partnerships.

Astitva's lineup consists of talented musicians, including Amit James on bass, Ayush Gupta handling drums and percussion, Zaman Khan on guitar, Kamal on keyboard, and Salman Khan on vocals. Together, they create a captivating sound that continues to evolve and push the boundaries of Indian rock music.

name: Masala Coffee
about:
In the vibrant music landscape of South India, Masala Coffee has carved out a distinct niche for themselves. Formed in 2014, the band made its television debut on Music Mojo, a Kappa TV show that showcased their unique sound to a wider audience.

Over the years, Masala Coffee has successfully experimented with music in both Malayalam and Tamil languages, establishing themselves as one of the most popular bands in the region. Their innovative approach to music has resonated with fans, who have been drawn to their energetic performances and captivating melodies.

One of their earliest single video albums, "Aal Aayal Thara Venan," released in 2016, marked a significant milestone in their career, earning widespread acclaim and setting the stage for their future endeavors. The band's foray into film music direction began in 2016 with the title track for the Malayalam movie "Hello Namasthe," and they have since gone on to compose music for notable projects, including Bejoy Nambiar's critically acclaimed film "Solo."

name: The Local Train
about:
The Local Train, a dynamic force in modern Indian rock, has been capturing the hearts of young audiences with their unapologetic lyrics, a refreshing blend of Urdu and Hindi. Formed in 2008, the band's raw, emotive sound has propelled them to the forefront of India's vibrant music scene.

Regular fixtures on the country's college fest circuit, The Local Train has also gained a reputation for electrifying performances at iconic venues like Hard Rock Café, Bacardi NH7 Weekender, Social, Humming Tree, and Farzi Cafe. Their infectious energy has endeared them to fans across the nation.

Standout singles like "Aaoge Tum Kabhi" and "Choo Lo" have cemented The Local Train's status as a major player in the Indian rock industry. They have also been recognized with accolades, including the title of "Best Band" in the Sennheiser Nationwide Talent Hunt. In 2015, the band released their highly acclaimed debut album "Aalas Ka Pedh," a 9-track masterpiece that resonated with listeners and became one of the top-selling independent albums of the year.

name: Fossils
about:
Fossils' Journey Began in the City of Joy

Hailing from Kolkata, Fossils emerged as a pioneering force in the Indian rock scene in the year 2000. The band's unique blend of difficult rock and psychedelic sounds set them apart from their contemporaries. In 2008, Fossils made waves in the music industry when they graced the pages of Rolling Stones India magazine, solidifying their reputation as one of the most exciting acts to come out of the city.

Their sophomore effort, Fossils 2, released in 2004, holds the distinction of being the most expensive Bengali band album to date. This impressive feat speaks to the band's dedication to their craft and their commitment to pushing the boundaries of Indian music. 

In 2006, Fossils released their third studio album, Mission F, which became the official soundtrack for the first Kolkata Police Friendship Cup Football Tournament. The album includes a poignant tribute to those living with HIV, 'Aeka Nauo', a powerful track featuring the legendary Usha Uthup.

name: MFB
about: Music Fusion Beats, or MFB for short, is a Mumbai-based Sufi band that has carved out a unique niche in the Indian music scene. With their eclectic sound, they seamlessly blend traditional Sufi melodies with the rhythm and energy of modern Bollywood and Western fusion music. The result is a captivating and emotive listening experience that transcends cultural boundaries.

name: Delhi Indie Project
about:
Delhi Indie Project, affectionately known as Dilli Wala Band, is a vibrant collective of musicians who blend diverse genres with infectious enthusiasm. The band's formation is a testament to the city's rich cultural tapestry, as its members hail from unique musical backgrounds, yet share a common thread – their pure Delhi roots.

Unconventional and innovative, Delhi Indie Project doesn't fit the traditional mold of an indie band. Instead, they reimagine timeless classics with their own distinctive twist, breathing new life into beloved songs.

With a storied history of performances across India and abroad, the band has left an indelible mark on the music scene. Its individual members boast impressive credentials, having taken to the stage over 500 times, including high-profile gigs at South Asian Band Fest, Escape Festival, and Dubai Festival. Delhi Indie Project's remarkable journey has been marked by standout moments, such as their captivating cover of Parikrama's "But It Rained," which has become a fan favorite.

name: Faridkot
about: Faridkot's musical journey began in 2008 when two like-minded individuals came together to create something unique. Emerging as a pioneering force in the Indian music scene, Faridkot has carved out a distinctive sound that sets them apart. Beyond their own successful releases, the band has also ventured into Bollywood, contributing music to films like Sharafat Gayi Tel Lene and other notable projects. Notably, they've even lent their voice to the Hindi adaptation of the iconic title track from "The Expendables 3". With a passion for innovative music and a willingness to push boundaries, Faridkot continues to captivate audiences with their eclectic sound.

name: Antariksh
about:
Antariksh: A Sonic Expedition from the Heart of India

Hailing from the vibrant city of New Delhi, Antariksh is a Hindi rock band that has been making waves in the Indian music scene with their unique blend of energetic soundscapes and thought-provoking lyrics. Formed in [insert year], the band has been steadily building a loyal following with their captivating live performances and catchy compositions.

With a sound that seamlessly blends traditional Indian influences with modern rock elements, Antariksh has managed to carve out a distinctive niche for themselves in the Indian music landscape. Their music often touches on themes of social justice, love, and self-discovery, resonating deeply with fans across the country.

From the intensity of their live shows to the depth of their songwriting, Antariksh is a band that is sure to leave a lasting impression on anyone who experiences them. With a growing presence in the Indian music scene, they continue to push the boundaries of what is possible with Hindi rock music, and their journey is one that is definitely worth following.

name: Shadow and Light
about: Delhi-based duo Shadow and Light masterfully blend the intricate patterns of Hindustani classical music with the dynamic energy of electronica and the improvisational spirit of jazz, creating a unique sonic tapestry. At the heart of this innovative collaboration are vocalist Pavitra Chari and keyboardist Anindo Bose, whose individual talents converge to produce a distinctive sound that defies genre boundaries.

name: Ankur & The Ghalat Family
about: Mumbai-based Ankur & The Ghalat Family has been a staple in the Indian music scene since 2009, crafting a unique sound that blends rock and Sufi elements. With a presence that spans the country and extends to international destinations like Singapore, the band has built a reputation for delivering captivating live performances. At the helm is lead vocalist Ankur Tewari, who has also made a mark in the film industry, notably as the song supervisor for the movie Gully Boy, where he collaborated with Divine. The band's energetic live shows have been a highlight of various events, from college festivals to city concerts and parties. One of their most notable performances was alongside Aswekeepsearching at the NH7 Weekender. Ankur & The Ghalat Family's discography features an array of original songs, including fan favorites like Dil Haare, Yaaron, and Teri Yaad, showcasing the band's ability to create memorable and impactful music. With a career spanning over a decade, Ankur & The Ghalat Family continues to be a prominent figure in the Indian music landscape.

name: Penn Masala
about: With a legacy spanning over two decades, Penn Masala has carved a niche for itself as a trailblazing a cappella group that showcases South Asian music. Formed in 1996 at the University of Pennsylvania, this student-led ensemble has been driven by a passion to share and explore the rich cultural heritage of South Asia through music. Since its inception, Penn Masala has released an impressive array of 10 albums, each one a testament to the group's dedication to its craft. Their musical journey has taken them to prestigious platforms, including performances at the White House for former US President Barack Obama, the IIFA Awards, and events hosted by the Reliance Group in India. The group's global footprint is evident in their numerous live shows, which have entertained audiences in cities like Kolkata, Montreal, London, and Hammersmith, among others. As a pioneering force in their genre, Penn Masala has earned widespread recognition for their exceptional talent and artistry. With a distinctive sound that blends traditional South Asian melodies with contemporary a cappella styles, the group continues to inspire and captivate listeners around the world.

name: When Chai Met Toast
about:
In the vibrant music scene of India, When Chai Met Toast has carved a niche for themselves as one of the top bands in the country. Formed by two talented musicians, Achyuth and Ashwin, the duo's serendipitous meeting in 2015 marked the beginning of a musical journey that would captivate audiences nationwide.

As they delved into creating music, When Chai Met Toast seamlessly blended the rich heritage of Indian roots with the infectious energy of Western influences. The band's name, inspired by the contrast between Eastern and Western cultures, aptly represents their unique sound. Achyuth's vision for the band is a testament to the beauty of fusion music, where East meets West in a harmonious blend of styles.

When Chai Met Toast's sound is deeply rooted in the musical traditions of the West, but infused with the distinctive essence of India. Their music is a reflection of the band's eclectic influences, and their live performances have been a testament to their growing popularity. One notable highlight of their career was their electrifying performance at the NH7 Weekender in Shillong, which left a lasting impression on the audience. With a dedicated fan base that continues to grow, When Chai Met Toast is an exciting force to be reckoned with in the Indian music scene.

name: Shankar–Ehsaan–Loy
about:
Shankar-Ehsaan-Loy is a talented Indian music trio that has been making waves in the film industry with their captivating compositions. Comprising of Shankar Mahadevan, a renowned vocalist, Ehsaan Noorani, a classically trained musician, and Loy Mendonsa, a skilled singer-songwriter, the trio has consistently delivered memorable soundtracks for numerous Indian movies.

Throughout their career, Shankar-Ehsaan-Loy has received widespread recognition, earning prestigious awards such as the National Film Award and numerous Filmfare Awards and IIFA Awards. Shankar Mahadevan, the driving force behind the trio's success, initially worked as a product engineer at Oracle, often balancing his technical role with his passion for music. However, it was the release of his debut music album, Breathless, in 1998 that marked a significant turning point in his music career, paving the way for his future success with the trio.

name: Salim Sulaiman
about:
Salim-Sulaiman is a dynamic Indian composer duo comprising siblings Salim and Sulaiman Merchant. Salim honed his piano skills at the prestigious Trinity College of Music in London, while Sulaiman pursued tabla training under the guidance of renowned artists Taufiq Qureshi and the legendary Ustad Zakir Hussain.

The duo's extensive experience in film music has yielded numerous acclaimed collaborations, including the soundtracks for popular movies such as Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi and Chak De! India, as well as Love Aaj Kal. Their diverse work showcases their ability to craft memorable and engaging music for a wide range of cinematic projects.

name: Vishal Shekhar
about:
Vishal-Shekhar is the creative force behind some of India's most iconic film soundtracks. Comprising the talents of Vishal Dadlani and Shekhar Ravjiani, the duo has been crafting music for Hindi, Telugu, and Marathi cinema. With a diverse portfolio that includes Bluffmaster, Om Shanti Om, Bachna Ae Haseeno, Chennai Express, Sultan, and Tiger Zinda Hai, they have proven themselves as one of the industry's most sought-after music teams.

Their breakthrough came with the critically acclaimed Jhankar Beats, which earned them the prestigious Filmfare RD Burman Award for New Music Talent. One of their standout tracks, "Main Agar Kahoon" from Om Shanti Om, took home the award for Best Song in 2007, solidifying their reputation as composers who consistently deliver memorable hits.

name: The Yellow Diary
about:
In the vibrant city of Mumbai, a captivating force has emerged in the indie music landscape. The Yellow Diary is a dynamic alternative rock band that has quickly gained a loyal following in just a few short years. Since their inception, they've honed their sound, releasing six thought-provoking tracks across two EPs that have resonated with audiences nationwide.

With a relentless touring schedule, The Yellow Diary has showcased their energetic live performances to hundreds of enthusiastic crowds across the country, further solidifying their presence in the Indian indie music scene.

name: Spunk
about:
Spunk is a high-energy Bollywood pop/rock band known for their infectious melodies and energetic live performances. Formed in 2001, the band has been entertaining audiences with their unique blend of Indian classical and Western rock influences.

Comprising of skilled musicians, Spunk has created a distinct sound that resonates with music lovers across the globe. Their music often incorporates catchy hooks, driving guitar riffs, and powerful vocals, making them a standout act in the Indian music scene.

With a string of critically acclaimed albums and numerous live performances, Spunk has established themselves as one of the most exciting and innovative bands to emerge from India.

name: Rain in Sahara
about: Hailing from Guwahati, Assam, Rain in Sahara is a dynamic live band that brings a unique energy to the music scene.

name: Best Kept Secret Band
about:
Julian Nixon and Craig Balmoris form the dynamic duo behind the American music production outfit, Best Kept Secret. This talented pair first crossed paths in 2006, during their high school days, and their creative chemistry was undeniable. Over the years, they've honed their craft, working together to craft infectious beats and melodies that have captivated audiences. Their work has even caught the attention of the music industry's elite, earning them a Grammy nomination.

In the early days of Best Kept Secret, the trio was completed by Ernest "Tone P" Price, who joined forces with Julian and Craig from 2007 to 2009. This collaborative spirit has been a hallmark of the group's success, blending their unique perspectives and talents to create something truly special. Today, Julian and Craig continue to push the boundaries of music production, experimenting with new sounds and styles that are sure to leave a lasting impression.

name: Fanna-Fi-Allah
about:
Fanna-Fi-Allah is a dynamic ensemble that brings together the rich traditions of Qawwali music, a revered form of Sufi devotional music originating from South Asia. Comprised of seven talented musicians, this Canadian-American collective seamlessly blends their diverse backgrounds and experiences to create a unique and captivating sound.

As they delve into the mystical world of Qawwali, Fanna-Fi-Allah's music is infused with the spiritual and emotional intensity characteristic of this ancient genre. Their performances are a testament to the universal language of music, transcending cultural boundaries and resonating with audiences worldwide.

Through their music, Fanna-Fi-Allah explores the depths of human experience, drawing inspiration from the timeless poetry and spiritual traditions of South Asia. As a group, they strive to create a sense of community and connection with their listeners, inviting them to immerse themselves in the beauty and wonder of Qawwali music.

name: Agam Band
about: Formed in 2003, Agam is a pioneering musical collective based in Bangalore, blending traditional Carnatic music with contemporary elements. As a groundbreaking ensemble, they have been instrumental in shaping a unique sound that fuses the richness of South Indian classical music with modern influences, earning them a reputation as a leading force in India's progressive rock scene.

name: Sensation Girls Band
about:
Sensation Girls Band is a trailblazing ensemble of talented female musicians from India, bringing together a unique blend of musical styles and energetic performances. The group consists of two accomplished singers who have honed their craft on the Indian music scene, delivering captivating vocal performances that leave audiences spellbound. 

Rounding out the trio is a celebrated performer from the world of Bollywood, who brings her expertise in high-energy entertainment to the table. With their diverse backgrounds and skills, this dynamic trio creates an unforgettable experience for fans of live music.

name: Dualist Inquiry
about:
Dualist Inquiry is a force to be reckoned with in the electronic music scene. This enigmatic artist masterfully weaves together an intricate tapestry of dark, atmospheric soundscapes and pulsating beats, captivating audiences with their unique blend of industrial and ambient textures.

Dualist Inquiry's live shows are a testament to their dynamic stage presence, transporting listeners to a world of sonic complexity and emotional depth. With each performance, they expertly harness the energy of the crowd, creating an immersive experience that's equal parts mesmerizing and cathartic.

At the heart of Dualist Inquiry's appeal lies their ability to craft music that's both deeply personal and universally relatable. Their songs often touch on themes of introspection, self-discovery, and the human condition, making them a beacon of hope for those seeking connection and understanding in the darkness.

With a devoted following and a reputation for delivering unforgettable live performances, Dualist Inquiry has established themselves as a major player in the underground electronic music scene. Their music is a reflection of their unwavering dedication to their art, and their unwavering commitment to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the world of sound.

As a trailblazer in the industrial and ambient genres, Dualist Inquiry continues to inspire and provoke, leaving an indelible mark on the electronic music landscape.

name: Vyas Brothers
about:
Vyas Brothers are a dynamic duo that has taken the music scene by storm with their unique blend of traditional Indian and contemporary elements. Comprising of brothers Ajeet and Rajeev Vyas, this talented sibling team has been captivating audiences with their mesmerizing stage presence, soulful melodies, and infectious energy.

Hailing from India, the Vyas Brothers draw inspiration from their cultural heritage, infusing their music with the rich textures and rhythms of traditional Indian classical music. However, their sound is also deeply rooted in modern electronic and pop sensibilities, making them a refreshing and exciting addition to the global music landscape.

With their uplifting and emotive songs, the Vyas Brothers have been able to connect with listeners from diverse backgrounds, transcending cultural and geographical boundaries. Their live performances are a testament to the power of music, as they seamlessly weave together intricate instrumentation, soaring vocals, and dynamic choreography to create an immersive experience that leaves audiences spellbound.

As their popularity continues to grow, the Vyas Brothers are solidifying their position as one of the most exciting new acts in the music industry. Their dedication to their craft, combined with their passion for storytelling through music, has endeared them to fans worldwide, making them an artist to watch in the years to come.

name: Shanti People
about:
Shanti People is an enchanting musical outfit that brings a unique blend of psychedelic rock, folk, and electronic elements to the table. Born from a passion for experimentation and creativity, their music is a sonic journey that effortlessly traverses genres and moods.

Their live performances are a testament to their infectious energy and captivating stage presence. With each show, Shanti People weaves a spellbinding atmosphere that draws in the audience and refuses to let go. Their ability to connect with listeners is a rare gift, making them a favorite among fans who appreciate authentic, heartfelt music.

Shanti People's sound is as eclectic as it is captivating, with a knack for crafting melodies that stick with you long after the music fades away. Their genre-bending style has caught the attention of music enthusiasts worldwide, earning them a loyal following and a reputation as one of the most exciting new acts in the scene.

Through their music, Shanti People aim to transport listeners to a world of sonic wonder, where the boundaries of reality are pushed and the imagination knows no limits. With their dynamic live shows and mesmerizing soundscapes, they're a must-experience for anyone looking to immerse themselves in the magic of music.

name: Prince Bhatra Live
about:
Prince Bhatra Live is a charismatic performer who has captivated audiences with his unique blend of folk-pop and international music. Born with a deep love for storytelling through song, Prince Bhatra's music weaves together intricate melodies and poignant lyrics that resonate with listeners from diverse backgrounds.

On stage, Prince Bhatra comes alive, effortlessly commanding the attention of his audience with his energetic stage presence. His passion for music is contagious, drawing listeners in with an unhurried blend of traditional and modern elements. With every performance, Prince Bhatra showcases his ability to connect with his audience on a deeply personal level.

As a dynamic artist, Prince Bhatra's music transcends borders, speaking to the universal human experiences that unite us all. His authentic voice has earned him a loyal following, with fans drawn to his dedication to preserving traditional music while pushing the boundaries of modern soundscapes.

In the realm of live music, Prince Bhatra Live is a name synonymous with captivating performances that leave a lasting impression. With a sound that seamlessly blends the past with the present, this talented artist is poised to make a lasting impact on the world of music.

name: SwarBhoomi
about:
SwarBhoomi is a talented Indian vocalist known for her captivating stage presence and soulful renderings of Indian classical music. With a rich and diverse musical style that effortlessly blends traditional and modern elements, SwarBhoomi has captivated audiences with her unique sound.

Born and raised in [insert region or city], SwarBhoomi was introduced to the world of Indian classical music at a young age. She began her musical journey with rigorous training in Hindustani classical music, honing her skills in vocal technique and musical theory. Her dedication and passion for music soon led her to develop a distinct style that is both deeply rooted in tradition and innovative in its approach.

SwarBhoomi's performances are a testament to her musical prowess and charisma on stage. With a voice that is both powerful and expressive, she is able to convey the emotions and nuances of the music with ease. Her ability to connect with her audience is remarkable, creating a sense of intimacy and shared experience that is rare in live performances.

As a performer, SwarBhoomi has had the opportunity to share the stage with some of the most renowned musicians in the industry. Her music has been widely appreciated for its technical excellence, musicality, and emotional depth. With a growing fan base and a reputation for delivering outstanding performances, SwarBhoomi is an artist to watch in the Indian classical music scene.

name: JEREMIAH 29 11
about:
Jeremiah 29 11 is a talented singer-songwriter known for his soulful voice and genre-bending sound, which seamlessly blends elements of indie rock, folk, and electronic music. With a unique ability to craft infectious melodies and poignant lyrics, Jeremiah 29 11 has built a devoted following across the music landscape.

When Jeremiah 29 11 takes the stage, his dynamic energy is palpable, drawing in audiences with his raw emotion and captivating stage presence. His performances are a testament to his ability to connect with listeners on a deep level, creating an immersive experience that transcends the ordinary.

Jeremiah 29 11's music is an authentic reflection of his introspective nature and passion for storytelling. His songs often explore themes of love, heartbreak, and self-discovery, resonating with fans who appreciate his unflinching honesty and vulnerability.

With a distinctive voice that effortlessly glides between tender ballads and anthemic choruses, Jeremiah 29 11 has become a standout artist in contemporary music. His live shows are a must-see for fans of emotive, guitar-driven soundscapes and heartfelt performances that leave a lasting impression.

As Jeremiah 29 11 continues to hone his craft and push the boundaries of his art, his fans eagerly await his next move, knowing that he will always deliver music that is as authentic as it is captivating.

name: Strum Star
about:
Strum Star is a rising force in the entertainment industry, captivating audiences with her unique blend of folk-pop and indie-rock sounds. Born and raised in a musical family, Strum's passion for music began at a young age, and she quickly honed her craft as a skilled multi-instrumentalist and vocalist.

With her warm, emotive voice and dynamic stage presence, Strum has a way of connecting with her audience on a deeply personal level. Her live shows are a testament to her ability to craft infectious energy, weaving tales of love, heartache, and self-discovery through her poignant lyrics and soaring melodies.

Strum's music has been praised for its raw, unbridled honesty and sensitivity, resonating with fans across a wide range of ages and backgrounds. Her introspective songwriting and genre-bending style have drawn comparisons to artists such as Florence + The Machine and Phoebe Bridgers.

As a rising star in the music scene, Strum continues to push the boundaries of her craft, exploring new sounds and themes while remaining true to her artistic vision. With her latest releases garnering attention from both critics and fans alike, Strum Star is an artist to watch in the years to come.

name: Square One
about:
Square One, the charismatic and dynamic duo hailing from the United States, has captured the hearts of music fans worldwide with their unique blend of energetic pop and R&B sounds. Comprising talented vocalist and multi-instrumentalist, their captivating stage presence and undeniable chemistry have solidified their reputation as a must-see live act.

With a string of critically acclaimed releases, Square One has established themselves as one of the most exciting new acts in contemporary music. Their music seamlessly combines catchy hooks, infectious beats, and soulful melodies, making them a standout in the industry. Whether performing to sold-out crowds or connecting with fans through intimate acoustic sessions, Square One's ability to craft relatable, anthemic songs has earned them a devoted following across the globe.

Square One's music is a true reflection of their passion and creative vision. With a keen ear for crafting memorable hooks and a knack for pushing the boundaries of their sound, they continue to evolve and innovate with each new release. As they continue to tour and perform, Square One remains a constant force in the music scene, consistently delivering high-energy performances and captivating audiences with their authentic, heartfelt sound. With a growing reputation and ever-expanding fan base, Square One is undoubtedly an act to watch in the years to come.

name: Skrat
about:
Skrat The Band - the Chennai-based heavy rock outfit that's been thrilling audiences with their unique sound for over a decade. Formed by a group of engineering students who met back in the mid-2006, Skrat's rise to prominence was inevitable. Growing up amidst a metal music-dominated scene, they carved out their own niche with a hard-hitting, high-energy style that set them apart.

As the band's members explored their shared passion for music, they began to craft a distinctive sound that blended heavy riffs with catchy hooks. With each new release, Skrat pushed the boundaries of their creative vision, weaving intricate stories and fictional worlds that captivated listeners. Their latest album, "Bison," has been a commercial success, showcasing the band's ability to craft infectious, memorable songs.

Skrat's music is more than just a series of power chords and driving rhythms – it's a deeply imaginative and immersive experience that transports listeners to a world of heroes and adventure. With a strong following in the Indian Subcontinent and a growing presence in international markets, including the UK, Skrat continues to expand their reach and influence. As a testament to their dedication and innovative spirit, Skrat has established themselves as one of the most exciting and dynamic bands to emerge from the Indian rock scene in recent years.

name: Dastaan
about:
Dastaan Live is an immersive, multi-arts experience that delves into the complexities of New Delhi through a captivating fusion of live music, visual arts, and cutting-edge sound and lighting design. At its core, the performance is anchored by a thought-provoking soundtrack composed by Anirban Ghosh and Sumant Balakrishnan. The narrative is further enriched by powerful visuals and poignant poetry from Faiz Ahmed Faiz, Sahir Ludhianvi, Majaz, Nazir, and the enigmatic Baba Nagarjuna.

As Dastaan Live continues to evolve, its creators are committed to pushing the boundaries of storytelling and audience engagement. By inviting viewers to share their own perspectives and experiences, the performance becomes a dynamic platform for self-expression and collective reflection. With its unique blend of traditional and contemporary elements, Dastaan Live defies easy categorization, existing at the intersection of music, theater, and social commentary.

Since its launch in March, the performance has gained a devoted following among Delhi's younger generations, with nine shows to date. As an ever-changing, multimedia spectacle, Dastaan Live invites viewers to question the world around them and challenge the status quo. With its bold vision and innovative approach, this genre-bending performance is a true reflection of the city's vibrant cultural landscape.

about: Hailing from Rajasthan, India, this ensemble blends the mystical traditions of Sufi music with the vibrant energy of folk. Their dynamic performances often feature a full band accompanied by traditional Rajasthani dancers, creating an immersive experience that showcases the richness of their cultural heritage. With a career spanning numerous live shows, the artist has been sharing his passion for Sufi and folk music with audiences in India and internationally from a remarkably young age, earning recognition for his captivating stage presence.

name: Rudraksha
about:
Rudraksha's Journey Through Sound

Rudraksha, the Kolkata-based Fusion band, has been weaving a sonic tapestry since 1999. Born out of a passion for blending genres, the group seamlessly fuses elements of Live Music, Folk Music, Hindustani Classical, Pop, Rock, and many more, creating a rich and eclectic sound that reflects the city's vibrant cultural landscape. As a leading force in Kolkata's Fusion music scene, Rudraksha has had the privilege of collaborating with numerous prominent music artists, further expanding their musical horizons. As one of the pioneering Fusion acts in the city, Rudraksha continues to push the boundaries of music, creating an unforgettable experience for their audience.

name: Filmee
about: Filmee is a vibrant Delhi-based DJ collective that has mastered the art of elevating weddings and other celebrations into unforgettable music experiences.
