name: Sabri Brothers
about: Hailing from Mumbai, India, The Sabri Brothers are an esteemed Qawwali and Sufi ensemble, with Aftab Hashim Sabri leading as their vocalist. They are celebrated for delivering soul-stirring performances that have captivated audiences across the globe. Their artistry has enriched diverse events, from weddings and corporate gatherings to major concerts, clubs, and extensive international tours.

name: Maadhyam
about: Maadhyam Band, led by the gifted singer-songwriter Mayank Maurya, is renowned for its captivating stage presence and heartfelt interpretations of popular songs. The band has garnered significant attention for their soulful renditions, including Sach Keh Raha Hai Deewana, which has amassed over 126 million views, as well as fan favorites like Zara Zara and Na Tum Jano Na Hum. Their performances are celebrated for their dynamic energy and ability to deeply connect with audiences.

name: DJ Ali Merchant
about:
DJ Ali Merchant is a multifaceted artist making waves in the Indian music scene as a skilled DJ and television actor. With a passion for remixing Bollywood classics, he has successfully released numerous hits through prominent labels such as Zee Music Company and T-Series.

Throughout his illustrious career, DJ Ali has performed at over 100 live shows across India and internationally, leaving a trail of energetic crowds in his wake. One of his most notable achievements was opening for the renowned singer Guru Randhawa on the Bollyboom High Rated India Concert Tour. His ability to connect with audiences through his infectious beats has earned him a reputation as a dynamic performer capable of captivating any crowd.

With his infectious energy and talent for crafting unforgettable live experiences, DJ Ali Merchant has established himself as a force to be reckoned with in the entertainment industry.

name: DJ Akbar Sami
about:
DJ Akbar Sami is a multifaceted music artist hailing from India, where he has established himself as a leading DJ, remixer, composer, and producer. 

With the release of his debut remix album 'Jalwa', DJ Akbar Sami made a significant impact on the global music scene, captivating listeners worldwide with his unique sound.

Since then, he has consistently delivered hit albums, including 'Jadoo' and the sequel 'Jalwa II', solidifying his reputation as a skilled artist.

As the pioneer of remix culture in India, DJ Akbar Sami has not only revolutionized the Indian music landscape but has also taken the art of DJing to new heights, earning him the title of 'Bollywood Remix King'. His performances have been a staple on stages across India and internationally.

Throughout his career, DJ Akbar Sami has consistently pushed the boundaries of his craft, experimenting with new sounds and techniques to create an unforgettable experience for his audience.

name: DJ RawKing
about:
DJ RawKing is a masterful DJ with an impressive range that effortlessly spans from mainstream Bollywood to the underground music scene. Through his diverse performances, he has consistently demonstrated his ability to captivate audiences at a wide range of venues, making him a sought-after DJ.

From the vibrant energy of Delhi's AGNI to the sun-kissed dance floors of Goa's TITO'S and Mumbai's BAROKE, DJ RawKing's music has won over fans in each city he's performed in. His unique blend of sounds has allowed him to carve out a distinct niche in the industry, setting him apart from his peers.

With a reputation built on delivering unforgettable live performances, DJ RawKing continues to push the boundaries of what's possible behind the decks.

name: DJ Chetas
about: DJ Chetas is a prominent name in the Indian music scene, recognized globally for his talent. In 2016, he achieved a significant milestone by ranking World No. 33 on DJ MAG's Top 100 DJs list, cementing his status as India's No.1 Bollywood DJ. With over a decade of experience, DJ Chetas has played a pivotal role in bringing dance music to a wider audience. He is widely acclaimed for his official T-Series Mashups and Remixes, which have become a hallmark of his unique style. Beyond the studio, DJ Chetas has graced some of the country's most prestigious events, sharing stages with leading artists. His notable engagements include serving as the Official DJ for the Kolkata Knight Riders. He is also distinguished as the first Indian DJ to integrate visual drama and live instruments into his sets, offering an immersive and dynamic live performance experience.

name: KSHMR
about: With a global fan base, KSHMR has established himself as a prominent figure in the electronic music scene. The American DJ and record producer has been making waves since his debut single Megalodon in 2014. His rapid rise to fame earned him a prestigious spot on DJ Mag's list, where he was ranked 23rd and received the notable title of The Highest New Entry. KSHMR's discography boasts an impressive array of collaborations with renowned DJs and artists. One notable partnership with R3hab led to the creation of the single Karate, which gained traction on the French Singles Chart in March 2015. Another successful collaboration with DallasK resulted in the single Burn, which climbed the Beatport charts to reach the top spot. KSHMR has also explored fusions with international artists, such as Bollywood singer Sonu Nigam, with whom he co-created the track Underwater. Through his eclectic and innovative approach to music production, KSHMR continues to captivate audiences worldwide.

name: DJ Jenil
about: Hailing from Manila, Philippines, DJ Jenil has made a name for himself as a prominent figure in the international music scene. His talent was recognized early on, with a feature in the inaugural issue of DJ Mag ASEAN and a ranking among the top 10 DJ/producers in the country by EDM Philippines. DJ Jenil's productions have gained significant traction, with signings to notable labels such as Panda Funk, Dirty Dutch, and Revealed Recordings. His tracks have consistently charted on Beatport's Top 100, with an impressive five entries to date. His performances have taken him to esteemed events like the Ultra Music Festival in Europe and the iconic Eden Ibiza. Over the course of his career, DJ Jenil has shared the stage with a diverse range of artists, including Red Foo of LMFAO, Steve Aoki, Don Diablo, Laidback Luke, R3HAB, Headhunterz, Alvaro, Jochen Miller, Mari Ferrari, and Emma Hewitt. With his unique sound and energetic live shows, DJ Jenil continues to make waves in the music industry.

name: DJ Nucleya
about:
Udyan Sagar, professionally known as DJ Nucleya, has become a household name in India's vibrant music scene. His groundbreaking sound, which seamlessly fuses street music with electronic dance music, has resonated with a generation of young music enthusiasts. The infectious beats of "BASS Rani" are a testament to his innovative approach, captivating audiences nationwide.

As a pioneer in pushing the boundaries between indie and mainstream music, DJ Nucleya has built a reputation for delivering high-energy performances that leave a lasting impact. Behind the decks, he crafts an immersive experience with his signature powerful bass drops, taking the crowd on a sonic journey that's both raw and refined. With appearances at prominent music festivals and concerts, DJ Nucleya continues to electrify audiences with his unique style and infectious energy.

name: DJ Notorious
about:
DJ Notorious has effortlessly traversed the globe, leaving a trail of energized dance floors in his wake. With an impressive resume that boasts sets in the iconic Ibiza and over 292 nightclubs across 50 cities in 18 countries, his reputation as a master of crowd-pleasing beats has solidified.

A sought-after DJ, Notorious has become synonymous with high-energy performances that captivate diverse audiences, from the vibrant scenes of music festivals to the more intimate settings of weddings and corporate events. His unique ability to read the room and adapt his music to the mood has earned him a loyal following and a reputation as one of the most versatile DJs in the industry.

With an unwavering dedication to delivering unforgettable experiences, DJ Notorious continues to push the boundaries of his art form, bringing people together through the universal language of music.

name: DJ Yogii
about: DJ Yogii is a prominent figure in India's nightlife scene, with a portfolio of successful nightclubs under his ownership. His journey in the DJ industry began when he was just 18 years old. In addition to his entrepreneurial ventures, DJ Yogii has built a reputation as a skilled performer, having taken the stage in major cities such as New York, New Delhi, and Mumbai. With a career spanning multiple cities, he continues to make his mark in the music scene.

name: DJ Lijo
about:
DJ Lijo, aka Lijo George, is a highly sought-after music producer and Bollywood DJ known for his dynamic sound and infectious remixes. His extensive experience has led to collaborations with esteemed Indian music labels such as Sony Music India, T-Series, Tips, Eros, Zee Music Company, and United White Flags.

In 2019, DJ Lijo made a significant impact on the music scene with his hit remix "Mera Wala Dance," featured in the blockbuster film Simmba. The track quickly became a fan favorite and a staple at parties, thanks to its energetic beats and captivating rhythm. This success has cemented DJ Lijo's reputation as a go-to performer for high-profile events, including club nights, weddings, private functions, and corporate gatherings.

With his unique style and exceptional mixing skills, DJ Lijo consistently brings people together through the power of music. His ability to read the room and adapt to diverse audiences has made him a favorite among event organizers and music enthusiasts alike.

name: DJ Smile
about:
DJ Smile - A Trailblazer in Modern Music

In a vibrant landscape of cutting-edge DJs and producers, DJ Smile stands out as a creative force to be reckoned with. With a knack for crafting infectious dance tracks and a flair for the dramatic, her live performances have captivated audiences around the globe.

From the energetic beats of "Guru Tantalize Project - The Eternity" to the nostalgic charm of "Desireless - Voyage Voyage", DJ Smile's discography is a testament to her versatility and musical range. Her music often blends elements of electronic, pop, and hip-hop, resulting in a unique sound that's both fresh and timeless.

A talented artist with a passion for reinterpretation, DJ Smile has put her own spin on hits by artists like Rihanna and Sia, showcasing her ability to reimagine and reinvigorate classic tracks. With a growing fan base and a reputation for delivering high-energy performances, DJ Smile is an exciting talent to watch in the world of modern music.

With a dedication to pushing the boundaries of electronic music, DJ Smile continues to innovate and inspire, leaving a lasting impact on the music scene.

name: DJ Annie Mac
about: **DJ Annie Mac Biography** Originally from Ireland, DJ Annie Mac is a highly respected figure in electronic music and broadcasting. She is renowned for her distinctive presenting style and charismatic persona, which have solidified her position as a prominent DJ in the United Kingdom. Annie Mac cultivated her multifaceted talents from early on, exploring various aspects of music before excelling as a disc jockey and venturing into tune production. Her dedication to the craft quickly saw her rise to national prominence. Beyond her acclaimed work with BBC Radio, Annie Mac has captivated audiences globally with electrifying live performances. She has headlined major events such as the AMP Music Festival and delivered sold-out shows in iconic locations like Ibiza and other major cities, establishing a powerful connection with her listeners and club-goers alike. Through her extensive radio career and dynamic live appearances at some of the most celebrated musical events, DJ Annie Mac has built a substantial and devoted fanbase, cementing her lasting influence within the music industry.

name: DJ Suparna
about: DJ Suparna is a distinguished figure in the Bollywood and Punjabi music scene, widely recognized for her compelling remixes that infuse classic tracks with contemporary energy. Her extensive work includes reinterpreting iconic songs such as Daler Mehndi's ‘Bolo Tara Ra Ra,' along with ‘Suno Gaur Se Duniya Walo,' ‘Aankh Maare,' ‘Chandni Ki Daal,' and ‘Aisa Jadoo Dala Re,' among many others. Her sets traverse an exciting musical spectrum, ranging from beloved 90s Bollywood anthems to the latest chart-topping hits. Holding the distinction of being one of India's most followed female DJs, Suparna has cultivated a substantial and dedicated fanbase. Her unique remixes resonate deeply with enthusiasts of both Bollywood and Punjabi genres. Suparna's dynamic stage presence has animated numerous live events across major Indian cities, including Mumbai, Bangalore, Delhi, and Kolkata. Her versatile performances are a sought-after addition for diverse occasions, from vibrant club nights and corporate functions to grand weddings and large-scale concerts, consistently delivering an engaging musical atmosphere.

name: DJ Piyu
about: DJ Piyu is recognized for her vibrant sound and captivating stage presence. Her unique mixing prowess and deep passion for music consistently move crowds, setting an electrifying atmosphere at every event. Hailing from Mumbai, DJ Piyu launched her professional career in 2015. Drawing inspiration from global icons such as Hardwell, Dimitri Vegas & Like Mike, and Martin Garrix, she has developed a distinctive style adept at fusing Bollywood, Punjabi, and electronic beats, crafting memorable remixes. Among her popular reworks are Tony Kakkar's ‘Ludo,' Guru Randhawa's ‘Tere Te,' and Khalid's ‘Young Dumb & Broke.' Piyu has graced the decks at premier clubs and various live events across Mumbai and other major Indian cities, consistently engaging diverse audiences with her high-energy sets. With a growing portfolio and significant experience in the industry, DJ Piyu looks forward to performing alongside leading Indian DJs such as Nucleya, KSHMR, and Shaan.

name: DJ Ravish
about:
DJ Ravish is a seasoned performer and renowned DJ from India, celebrated for his versatility in spinning tracks across Bollywood, EDM, and Punjabi genres. As the official DJ for Rajasthan Royals in the Indian Premier League and several high-profile cricket events, he has captivated audiences with his infectious energy.

Regarded as one of the top DJs in Rajasthan, DJ Ravish has received numerous accolades, including multiple wins at the Best In Town Awards. His exceptional talent has also earned him recognition as the Best Male DJ in 2021. One of his notable achievements is creating mesmerizing Telugu remixes that have left fans wanting more.

With an impressive repertoire that spans club nights, corporate events, weddings, and college fests, DJ Ravish is a crowd favorite. His dynamic performances have earned him a spot among India's top DJs for wedding and event rotations. Whether you're planning a high-energy event or a sophisticated corporate gathering, DJ Ravish's unique blend of style and expertise makes him an ideal choice to get your crowd moving.

name: DJ Pearl
about: As a trailblazing figure in the Indian DJ scene, DJ Pearl has made a significant impact on aspiring young DJs. Born to renowned TV host and creative personality Nikhil Chinnappa, she has been at the forefront of popularizing DJing among India's youth. With her unique style and infectious energy, DJ Pearl has established herself as a talented artist, inspiring a new generation of music enthusiasts. Her performances are a testament to her skill and passion, making her a sought-after name in the industry.

name: DJ Lana
about:
DJ Lana is a rising talent in the global DJ scene, hailing from the vibrant culture of Brazil. Born and raised in a family of skilled musicians, she was naturally drawn to the world of music from a young age. With a background in playing the drums and percussion, Lana's early experiences laid the groundwork for her future career as a DJ.

As she transitioned from Brazil to the United States, her passion for music only grew stronger. With a unique blend of Brazilian rhythms and international flair, Lana's performances have captivated audiences worldwide, from her homeland to the UK. With a diverse range of genres at her fingertips, she effortlessly weaves together energetic beats and infectious melodies to create an unforgettable experience.

Now based in the United States, DJ Lana continues to push the boundaries of her craft, drawing inspiration from her multicultural heritage and the ever-changing landscape of electronic music. With an impressive international track record, she remains a sought-after artist, bringing her infectious energy and high-octane performances to stages from coast to coast.

name: DJ Lisa
about:
DJ Lisa, or Lisha Lashes, is a highly respected English DJ and electronic music producer with a storied career spanning over two decades. Her commanding stage presence and infectious beats have solidified her reputation as a master of her craft.

From the sun-kissed stages of Nocturnal Wonderland to the vibrant crowds of Dance Valley, Global Gathering, and Creamfields, DJ Lisa has had the privilege of sharing her music with audiences on every continent. A nomadic spirit, she has traversed the globe, performing in China, the USA, Canada, Australia, Russia, and countless other destinations.

In 2010, Lisa launched her own imprint, Lashed Out Records, which has since become a haven for innovative electronic music. Her tracks have been showcased on esteemed labels such as Discover Dark, High Contrast, and Reset Records, earning the nod of approval from industry legends like Armin van Buuren and Paul van Dyk.

With a career spanning over 25 years, Lisa continues to push the boundaries of her art form, delivering performances that are as unpredictable as they are unforgettable. As her reputation continues to grow, her music remains a testament to her unwavering dedication to the craft.

name: DJ Somairah
about: Since entering the DJ scene in 2018, DJ Somairah has made a name for herself in Pune and surrounding areas, performing at a wide range of events. With a consistent stream of gigs, she has become a sought-after DJ in her hometown, known for her energetic sets. Throughout her career, DJ Somairah has shared the stage with notable DJs, including DJ Vaggy, DJ Aftab, DJ Lava, and DJ Piyu, and has performed at over 50 shows across Pune and other cities. Her collaborations extend beyond the music world, having worked with celebrities like Karan Kudra, Malaika Arora Khan, and Karan Wahi, among others. With her talent and dedication, DJ Somairah has established herself as a prominent figure in the DJ circuit, particularly in Pune, Mumbai, and nearby cities. Her unique sound and style have resonated with audiences, making her a popular choice for events and gatherings. With a growing reputation and an impressive portfolio, DJ Somairah continues to bring her infectious energy to the music scene.

name: Paul Harmony and Rythm
about:
Paul Harmony and Rythm's journey as a DJ started when he was just 18, and since then, he's been making waves in the Indian electronic dance music (EDM) scene. Catching the attention of young music enthusiasts, Paul Harmony and Rythm's unique sound soon landed him a spot at a VH1 event in Hyderabad, catapulting him into the spotlight.

As his popularity grew, so did his performance schedule. Paul Harmony and Rythm has had the privilege of gracing the stages of some of India's most renowned clubs and venues, including Rude Lounge in Mumbai, Club 7 in Jaipur, Cuba Libre in Hyderabad, VH1 in Goa, Cafe Mumbo's in Goa, Aqua Eve in Delhi, XS The Place To Be in Guwahati, Kitty Su in Delhi, The Lord Of The Drinks in Delhi, Blue Bar in Delhi, Tap in Mumbai, and many more.

With his infectious energy and passion for music, Paul Harmony and Rythm continues to thrill audiences across the country, solidifying his position as a leading figure in the Indian EDM scene.

name: DJ Kiran Kamath
about:
DJ Kiran Kamath's sonic journey spans over three decades, having first stepped into the DJ industry in the 1990s. Throughout his illustrious career, he has had the privilege of collaborating with some of the biggest names in the industry, including Himesh Reshamiya, DJ Chetas, and the iconic Sony Music India.

With a keen ear for innovation, DJ Kiran has been instrumental in popularizing the concept of mashups in mainstream Bollywood. His unique blend of Bollywood, House Rock, and Middle Eastern beats has left audiences across the globe in awe, making him a household name in India's vibrant music scene.

Notably, his work on "Bin Tere" earned him a prestigious Indian Music Academy Award, a testament to his dedication and passion for his craft. With a diverse range of musical influences and an unwavering commitment to pushing the boundaries of electronic music, DJ Kiran continues to be a driving force in the industry, captivating audiences with his infectious energy and unparalleled talent.

His performances are a true reflection of his ability to seamlessly weave together different genres and styles, creating an unforgettable experience for all who witness it. With a legacy that speaks for itself, DJ Kiran Kamath remains an icon in the world of Bollywood and electronic music.

name: DJ Shaan
about:
DJ Shaan, aka "India Story," has been making waves in the global electronic music scene for years. As the first Indian DJ to take the stage at the iconic Tomorrowland festival, Shaan's name has become synonymous with high-energy performances that leave audiences breathless.

His breakthrough came with the release of "Light Up the World," a collaboration with Lauren Evans, which caught the attention of Armada Music and catapulted to the Top 15 Beatport charts. Industry heavyweights like Nicky Romero, W&W, and Tritonal have consistently supported his music, a testament to his unique sound and dedication to his craft.

Shaan's infectious beats have resonated with fans across India and beyond, earning him a loyal following that hangs on to every beat. With performances at Tomorrowland and Sunburn under his belt, he has cemented his status as a festival headliner and a force to be reckoned with in the electronic music world.

As a trailblazer in the Indian electronic music scene, DJ Shaan continues to inspire a new generation of artists and producers, pushing the boundaries of what is possible in the genre.

name: DJ Pasha Doll
about:
DJ Pasha Doll: A Global Beat Ambassador

Born and bred in Russia, DJ Pasha Doll has become a household name in India after her stint on MTV Bharat's reality show "Love Faculty Season 2" (2016-2017), where she emerged as a winner, captivating audiences with her unique style.

As a versatile DJ, Pasha Doll effortlessly fuses genres like Hip Hop, Trap, Bollywood, and Punjabi, creating an infectious energy that gets crowds moving worldwide. With a passport full of stamps from cities like New Delhi, Kuala Lumpur, Moscow, Kiev, Kathmandu, Colombo, Istanbul, and Bangkok, she has traveled extensively, spreading her musical love to diverse cultures.

Her dynamic performances have been a staple at wedding events, where she has delighted guests with her electrifying beats. With a global appeal that transcends borders, DJ Pasha Doll is a highly sought-after artist for her energetic live shows.

name: DJ Seezi
about:
DJ Seezi, also known as Divya Razdan, is a rising talent in the electronic music scene. This young DJ began her music journey at just 16 years old, driven by a passion that only grew stronger with time.

As India's first and youngest enthuse of electronic bass production and performance, DJ Seezi has made a name for herself in the industry. With a track released under a global record label, she has solidified her position as a promising artist to watch. Her performances at various college festivals and live events have left a lasting impression on audiences, showcasing her unique style and energy.

From her early start to her current rise in popularity, DJ Seezi continues to push the boundaries of electronic music, leaving a trail of excitement in her wake. As her career unfolds, fans and music enthusiasts alike can expect to see more of this talented young DJ on stages around the world.

name: DJ TNO
about:
DJ duo TNO -The Neglected One's is a force to be reckoned with, consisting of Abhishek Rajak and Reneesh Donga. With a headstart on their careers at just 15 years old, they've been electrifying Mumbai's club scene and major events for nearly a decade.

TNO's sets are a testament to their passion and dedication, leaving audiences energized and wanting more. With a reputation built on delivering high-octane performances at clubs, festivals, and private events, they've carved out a niche for themselves as one of India's most sought-after DJ duos.

Reneesh Donga, one half of TNO, also founded CELL Recordings, a pioneering music label that has become India's top free download platform. His commitment to democratizing access to music has made a significant impact on the Indian music landscape.

With their unique sound and infectious energy, TNO continues to push the boundaries of what's possible in the world of electronic music.

name: DJ Justri
about:
DJ Justri: A Harmonious Blend of Beauty and Beat

Born and raised in Kharkiv, Ukraine, DJ Justri's captivating stage presence and exceptional DJ skills have made her a standout artist in the Asian entertainment scene. Her journey from a music enthusiast to a talented and sought-after DJ has been marked by dedication, creativity, and a deep understanding of diverse cultures.

Justri's unique approach to DJing, which seamlessly blends traditional technique with innovative flair, has earned her a reputation for delivering high-energy performances that leave audiences in awe. Her ability to connect with diverse crowds and adapt to different cultural contexts has made her a favorite among festival-goers in southern China, where she has performed at numerous high-profile events.

As her popularity grew, Justri's passion for exploring the rich musical heritage of Asia led her to tour extensively throughout the region, captivating audiences in China, India, Malaysia, Laos, Vietnam, and Cambodia. With her boundless energy, infectious beats, and captivating stage presence, DJ Justri continues to delight fans and solidify her position as one of Asia's most beloved and respected DJs.

From the vibrant streets of Kharkiv to the bustling cities of Asia, DJ Justri's music embodies the spirit of cultural fusion, creativity, and self-expression.

name: DJ Lemon
about:
DJ Lemon's journey as a DJ and music producer is a testament to his innovative spirit and passion for pushing boundaries in Indian electronic music. His remarkable ability to craft original remixes and collaborate with top artists has not only garnered him a massive following but also earned him a distinct spot in the country's vibrant music scene.

With over 2 million views on his YouTube channel, it's no surprise that DJ Lemon has become a household name in India. His dedication to creating unique compositions has set him apart from his peers, allowing him to bring a fresh perspective to the world of remixing and music production.

As a master of the dance floor, DJ Lemon's high-energy performances are the perfect fit for any event, whether it's a night out at the club, a lavish wedding celebration, or a corporate function looking to spice up their entertainment. His infectious beats and electrifying stage presence have captured the hearts of music lovers across the country.

DJ Lemon's impressive track record is a reflection of his tireless work ethic and commitment to delivering exceptional entertainment experiences.

name: DJ Sartek
about:
DJ Sartek, a trailblazer in India's electronic music scene, has secured a prestigious spot on Hardwell's Revealed Recordings, a distinction that sets him apart as the first Indian DJ to achieve this feat. He has also consistently pushed the boundaries of success by having multiple releases feature on the coveted Beatport Top 100 charts.

As a sought-after performer, DJ Sartek has had the privilege of sharing the stage with international superstars such as Justin Bieber, Armin Van Buuren, Martin Garrix, Steve Aoki, Axwell, and Nicky Romero during their India tours, further solidifying his reputation as a top-tier act.

Beyond his performing prowess, DJ Sartek has also ventured into the world of public speaking, delivering a TEDx Talk that offers a fascinating glimpse into his journey as an artist. His music has garnered international recognition, with notable releases on esteemed labels such as Armada Music and Sony Music, earning him collaborations with prominent artists like David Guetta, Bassjackers, and Hardwell.

As a testament to his dedication and passion for the craft, DJ Sartek continues to push the limits of electronic music in India, inspiring a new generation of artists and fans alike.

name: DJ Angel
about: With a musical background rooted in drumming during her school days, DJ Angel has evolved into a prominent figure in India's DJ scene. Her journey behind the decks began in 2007, with club performances that eventually led her to dominate stages not only in India but also globally. DJ Angel has garnered a devoted fan base, thanks to her unique talent and charisma. She has established herself as one of Bollywood's top remixers, with a portfolio that boasts notable tracks from films like Aashiqui 2, Boss, and Kick, among others. Her remixes have also been featured in movies such as Bullet Raja, Jai Ho, R...Rajkumar, and Shaadi Ke Side Effects, showcasing her versatility and skill. Some of her notable works include remixes for Dedh Ishqiya, Dishkiyaoon, Heropanti, Creature, Tevar, Khamoshiyan, and Roy, demonstrating her ability to adapt to various genres and styles. With her impressive discography and captivating live performances, DJ Angel continues to make a mark in the music industry.

name: DJ Shiva Manvi
about: Hailing from Bangalore, India, DJ Shiva Manvi is a talented young broadcaster who has made a name for himself in the music scene. For him, music is an integral part of life, transcending a mere profession. As he puts it, music is his passion, a driving force that goes beyond a career. DJ Shiva Manvi has had the opportunity to share the stage with renowned artists such as Nucleya, Axwell Ingrosso, and Sander van Doorn, among others. His performances have been well-received at prominent events like Sunburn and NMAMIT, showcasing his skills to diverse audiences. With his unique sound and infectious energy, DJ Shiva Manvi is a sought-after performer who brings excitement and enthusiasm to every event he participates in. His dedication to his craft is evident in the way he weaves together beats and rhythms, creating an unforgettable experience for all who attend his shows.

name: DJ Rozz
about:
DJ Rozz hails from the vibrant music scene of the United States. With an undeniable flair for crafting captivating crowd energy, he has become a staple in the world of electronic dance music. His unique approach to spinning tracks is marked by seamless transitions and an infectious enthusiasm that has listeners hooked.

As a seasoned performer, Rozz has shared the stage with some of the biggest names in the EDM industry, including Tiesto, Infected Mushroom, and Steve Aoki, among others. His diverse experience has allowed him to hone his craft and develop a distinctive style that resonates with audiences worldwide.

From high-energy sets to meticulously crafted playlists, Rozz consistently delivers an unforgettable experience for his fans. His versatility, combined with an unwavering passion for music, has cemented his reputation as a talented and sought-after DJ.

name: DJ Akhil Talreja
about:
DJ Akhil Talreja, affectionately known as the "Tapori King" of Bollywood Music, has left an indelible mark on India's vibrant DJ scene. With a passion for blending that ignited at just 17, Talreja's journey has been a winding path of creativity and innovation.

Over the course of 15 years, DJ Akhil has forged an unparalleled reputation, solidified by his impressive streak as the number one DJ in India and Mumbai on djlist.com from 2013 to 2015. His dedication to the craft has yielded a distinctive sound that seamlessly weaves together the rhythms and melodies of Bollywood with an infectious energy.

As one of India's most celebrated DJs, DJ Akhil has earned a loyal following and critical acclaim, cementing his status as a trailblazer in the industry.

name: DJ Paroma
about:
DJ Paroma, a multifaceted artist, combines her passion for music with her adventurous spirit, having spent time working as a cabin crew to fuel her creativity. As Paroma Chatterjee, she has discovered her true calling behind the decks, weaving magic with her DJing skills.

With a strong presence in the industry, Paroma has been an ambassador for two prominent brands, Vera Moda and UDG Gear. Her influence extends globally, as she is featured on UDG Gear's international website, recognized alongside some of the world's top DJs. Her talent has also led to appearances on three TV shows, further solidifying her reputation as a sought-after DJ.

In addition to her high-profile gigs, Paroma has contributed to the film industry with numerous official remixes, showcasing her versatility and skill.

name: DJ Akash
about:
DJ Akash is a versatile Indian deejay and remix king, renowned for his unique ability to seamlessly blend the vibrant sounds of Bollywood with modern electronic beats. For this talented artist, music is more than just a profession – it's a deep passion that drives him to create infectious remixes and electrify dance floors across India.

Born with a natural flair for mixing and matching diverse musical styles, DJ Akash has established himself as a leading figure in India's thriving DJ scene. His dedication to his craft is evident in every performance, where he effortlessly weaves together a rich tapestry of sounds that leave audiences breathless.

When he's not behind the decks, DJ Akash is likely to be talking about his love for music, which he describes as an all-consuming obsession. This unwavering commitment to his art has earned him a loyal following and critical acclaim, solidifying his position as one of India's most exciting and innovative DJs.

name: DJ Saurabh
about:
Saurabh Shirodkar, professionally known as DJ SFM, is a Mumbai-based DJ and music producer who has been making waves in the Indian music scene. As the founder of LIVES 9 studios, he has a dedicated space to hone his craft and bring his unique sound to life.

DJ SFM has recently collaborated with the film industry, contributing the song 'Tum Hi Aana' to Siddharth Malhotra's movie 'Marjaavaan'. This notable collaboration showcases his versatility as a producer and his ability to create music that resonates with a broad audience.

His latest original track 'Kahar' has been officially released on Zee Music Marathi, further solidifying his presence in the Marathi music scene. With his growing portfolio of work and dedication to his craft, DJ SFM remains an exciting name to watch in the world of Indian music.

name: DJ Shreya
about:
DJ Shreya - A Journey from Code to Groove

Born and raised in the vibrant city of Pune, DJ Shreya has taken an unconventional path to become a skilled turntablist. After completing her engineering degree, she switched gears and began her musical journey at the age of 22. With a passion for mixing and blending genres, DJ Shreya has honed her craft to create unique sets that transport audiences to different eras.

Her performances often span a wide range of decades, from the iconic hits of the 1990s to the infectious tracks of the 2000s, and even the latest chart-toppers. Whether she's spinning at a high-energy club or an intimate gathering, DJ Shreya's sets are designed to keep the dance floor alive.

From the streets of Pune to the city's most renowned venues, DJ Shreya has established herself as a talented and in-demand DJ. Her ability to craft a sonic experience that's both nostalgic and forward-thinking has earned her a reputation as a master of her craft.

name: DJ Chhaya
about:
DJ Chhaya, the dynamic force from Indore, India, burst onto the scene at just 20 years old with an undeniable passion for spinning tracks. Her journey as an in-house DJ at Poison (Sango) Club in Bhopal marked the beginning of a meteoric rise that has been leaving dance floors electrified ever since.

A master of her craft, Chhaya's performances are renowned for their infectious energy, weaving a sonic tapestry of electronic dance music, bass-heavy remixes, glitch hop, deep house, and club hits that keep crowds enthralled. Her uncanny ability to sustain the momentum, elevating each event into an unforgettable experience, has earned her a distinctive reputation within the industry.

Chhaya's breakout moment came with the release of her debut album, "HEART BEAT VOL.1 BY DJ CHHAYA", which swiftly captured the hearts of music enthusiasts worldwide. Whether it's a high-octane club night, a joyous wedding celebration, or a vibrant festival, her beats possess an unwavering power to ignite the atmosphere.

With her unique sound and captivating stage presence, Chhaya continues to leave an indelible mark on the music scene, solidifying her position as a trailblazer in the world of electronic music.

name: DJ Amit B
about:
Meet Amit B, a highly sought-after DJ in Delhi's vibrant music scene. With a reputation for delivering high-energy performances, Amit has become a go-to choice for weddings and special events across the city and beyond.

From intimate gatherings to grand celebrations, Amit's exceptional DJing skills and infectious enthusiasm have made him a favorite among discerning event planners and partygoers alike. His extensive experience and versatility allow him to seamlessly transition between genres, keeping his audiences engaged and entertained.

Whether it's a wedding reception, a corporate event, or a private party, Amit's passion for music and his ability to read the crowd ensure that every event is a memorable experience. With a deep understanding of what makes a party truly unforgettable, Amit continues to push the boundaries of what's possible in the world of DJing.

name: DJ AM
about:
Adam Michael Goldstein, better known by his stage name DJ AM, was born in the vibrant city of Philadelphia. It's no surprise that music would become a central part of his life, given his early exposure to the sounds of legendary jazz musician Herbie Hancock. The iconic 1983 single "Rockit" made a lasting impression on the young Goldstein, sparking a lifelong passion for music that would eventually lead him to become a renowned American disc jockey.

As a skilled performer, DJ AM brings energy and enthusiasm to every event he takes on, whether it's a wedding, corporate gathering, or public celebration. With his extensive experience and dedication to his craft, he consistently delivers high-quality performances that cater to diverse tastes and preferences.

Specializing in creating unforgettable entertainment experiences, DJ AM is a versatile and charismatic DJ who can tailor his sets to suit any occasion. His passion for music and commitment to excellence make him an excellent choice for those seeking a professional and engaging entertainment solution.

name: DJ Debora Bianchi
about: Debora Bianchi is a prominent figure in the Dutch electronic music scene, renowned for her exceptional talent as a female DJ. From a young age, Debora's passion for music was evident, and as she grew older, her fascination with electronic beats only deepened. Today, she stands as one of the most respected and sought-after DJs in the Netherlands. With a dedication to delivering top-notch sound, Debora Bianchi has established herself as a leading lady in the Dutch dance scene. Her unique style and energy have captivated audiences, making her a popular choice for various events. Whether it's a wedding, private gathering, or public festival, Debora's expertise behind the decks is sure to impress. Her ability to read the crowd and adapt to any setting has earned her a reputation as a versatile and skilled performer.

name: Tatva K
about: Meet Aditya Anand, better known by his stage name Tatva K, a talented DJ and independent music producer who has made a name for himself in the industry. With a passion for creating unique sounds, Tatva K has built a reputation as a skilled artist with a distinctive style. His music and performances have garnered attention, solidifying his position as a popular personality in the entertainment scene. For those interested in learning more about his work and potential collaborations, further information is available upon request.

name: DJ Vicky
about:
**DJ Vicky: A Decade of Rhythms in the Heart of India**

Spinning tracks for over 15 years, DJ Vicky has become a staple in the vibrant city of Bangalore's music scene. With a passion for crafting unforgettable experiences, this seasoned DJ has honed their skills behind the decks, weaving magic at pre-wedding functions and post-wedding celebrations.

Their extensive expertise and versatility have earned DJ Vicky a loyal following among event enthusiasts, who return time and again for their signature blend of energy and finesse. Whether it's a grand wedding bash or an intimate gathering, DJ Vicky brings a unique touch, adapting their setlist to perfectly complement the occasion.

With a deep understanding of what gets the crowd moving, DJ Vicky's performances are a masterclass in mixing and matching genres to create an unforgettable atmosphere. As a true artist of the decks, they continue to push the boundaries of what's possible, making them a sought-after DJ in the city's thriving music scene.

name: DJ Suketu
about: DJ Suketu is a highly acclaimed Indian DJ, renowned for his captivating remixes that have dominated the music scene in North India and beyond, including the vibrant Bollywood landscape. His recent appearance on the popular Indian television show Jhalak Dikhhla Jaa, alongside esteemed judges Remo D'Souza, Karan Johar, and the legendary Madhuri Dixit, showcased his impressive skills as a live performer. As a contestant on the show, DJ Suketu seamlessly blended his music with the talented participants, treating audiences to an unforgettable experience. With a deep understanding of the pulse of the Indian music industry, DJ Suketu continues to push boundaries and leave a lasting impact on fans across the nation.

name: DJ Rave Radio
about:
DJ Rave Radio is an Australian electronic dance music duo born out of Queensland's vibrant music scene in 2008. Brett Allen and James Todman, the masterminds behind the duo, brought a unique blend of live drumming, soulful vocals, and innovative sampling to the world of electronic dance music. Their infectious beats, fueled by heavy basslines, quickly gained momentum and set them on a trajectory for global success.

By 2013, DJ Rave Radio had solidified their reputation as one of Australia's premier electronic acts, performing an astonishing 100 shows across 11 countries. This grueling tour schedule not only honed their craft but also introduced their music to a diverse range of audiences worldwide. Their dedication and hard work paid off when they landed a coveted spot at number 16 on the inthemix National Top 50 DJs.

The duo's social media presence is a testament to their widespread appeal, with a staggering 18 million plays of their tracks on Facebook. This impressive figure is a reflection of their ability to connect with fans from all corners of the globe. Since the release of their 2015 single "Rumble," DJ Rave Radio has attracted the attention of some of the biggest names in electronic dance music, including Martin Garrix, Hardwell, David Guetta, Dyro, and Laidback Luke. This endorsement from industry heavyweights has cemented their status as a force to be reckoned with in the world of electronic music.

Some of her most notable releases include the captivating singles "Janne Jaana" and "Masakali," which have garnered attention for their innovative production and emotive qualities. With a growing presence in the music scene, Candice Redding remains an exciting and innovative force to be reckoned with, exploring the intersection of electronic music and global flavors.

about:
Project 91 is a dynamic electronic dance music (EDM) duo hailing from the global stage. Comprised of talented producers and DJs, they have captivated audiences with their unique sound and infectious energy. With a diverse set list that blends genres, Project 91 has taken the world by storm, performing at top-notch events in countries such as India, the Netherlands, China, the UAE, and Belgium.

Their rise to international recognition is a testament to their dedication and passion for music, as they continue to push the boundaries of electronic production and performance. Whether they're crafting euphoric melodies or driving beats, Project 91's music is designed to get crowds moving and memories made.

name: DJ Shadow Dubai
about:
DJ Shadow Dubai, a creative force behind the scenes, has earned widespread recognition for his infectious collaboration with Guru Randhawa and Pitbull on the chart-topping hit 'Slowly Slowly'. The track's massive success, boasting over 200 million views on YouTube, marked a significant milestone in his career.

From his humble beginnings as a DJ, Satheerth Kunneth, aka DJ Shadow Dubai, has evolved into a skilled music producer, leaving a lasting impact on the global music scene. His remixes have garnered a massive following worldwide, and he has collaborated with an impressive array of artists, including Jay Sean, Yo Yo Honey Singh, Arijit Singh, Jazzy B, and Diljit Dosanjh.

A notable highlight of his career includes a stint on the music-based reality TV show 'Raw Star' alongside Yo Yo Honey Singh on StarTV. In 2018, he took home the prestigious Best DJ award at the Masala Awards. Moreover, his participation in the World's Biggest DJ Rally has earned him a special mention in the Guinness Book of World Records.

name: The Spindoctor
about:
The Spindoctor has been weaving his sonic magic since 2017, rapidly ascending the Indian Hip Hop scene and solidifying his position as a force to be reckoned with. As a multifaceted artist, he crafts a unique sound that seamlessly blends electronic dance music with infectious remixes of club and hip hop classics, house, and other eclectic styles.

A master turntablist, The Spindoctor showcases his impressive skills through a range of techniques, including beat mixing, scratching, beat juggling, drumming, and sampling. His impressive artistry has earned him a coveted spot in the Indian music landscape, with appearances on prominent platforms like Disney Hotstar and TEDx, where he shares his inspiring journey.

The Spindoctor has collaborated with some of India's most talented artists, including the renowned Indian hip hop artist Divine. He has also had the opportunity to share the stage with international artists such as Tyga and DJ Stretch, further cementing his reputation as a versatile and talented performer.

name: DJ Sumit Sethi
about:
Sumit Sethi is a multi-talented Indian artist whose creative journey began at a remarkably young age. By the time he was 16, he had already immersed himself in the world of music and DJing. With a diverse repertoire of songs under his belt, some of his most notable releases include the chart-topping tracks "Veera" (T-Series), "Gaddi Mashook Jatt Di" (Zee Music), and "Jai Deva" (Bohra Bros).

One of his most memorable collaborations is the pulsating Punjabi EDM track "Veera," where he joined forces with Jasmine Sandlas. This union not only showcased his ability to craft infectious electronic beats but also underscored his deep appreciation for traditional Punjabi music. Through his work, Sumit Sethi aims to preserve the rich cultural heritage of Punjabi society music while pushing the boundaries of innovation by blending electronic elements with the timeless essence of Bollywood sound.

name: Progressive Brothers
about: Hailing from New Delhi, Progressive Brothers is a renowned Indian electronic music duo comprising Sunny Sharma and Karan Bhalla. This versatile pair has mastered multiple roles, including music production, DJing, singing, and songwriting. Their impressive performance portfolio boasts appearances at prominent electronic music festivals in India, such as Sunburn, VH1 Supersonic, and Enchanted Valley Carnival. Additionally, they have entertained crowds at various events and college festivals across the country. Their inaugural track, Veda, was a collaborative effort with esteemed artist Richard Durand. Progressive Brothers have had the privilege of sharing the stage with an array of international heavyweights, including David Guetta, Tiesto, Martin Garrix, and Steve Aoki, among others. Their talent and dedication earned them the prestigious title of India's Best Trance DJs for 2012-2013, as awarded by Myfavdj Awards. With their unique sound and captivating live performances, Progressive Brothers have solidified their position in the Indian electronic music scene.

name: DJ Nikhil Chinapa
about:
Nikhil Chinapa is a pioneering Indian DJ, television personality, and celebration curator who has played a pivotal role in shaping the country's electronic dance music (EDM) landscape. With a career spanning over two decades, Chinapa has been closely associated with MTV India since the late 1990s, making appearances on various TV programs such as Roadies and Splitsvilla.

As a multifaceted host, Chinapa has also lent his expertise to India's Got Talent 2, sharing the stage with Ayushmann Khurana. A driving force behind the growth of DJing as a profession, Chinapa has been instrumental in shaping the music scene at the Sunburn Festival during its formative years. His dedication to nurturing and promoting EDM has helped bring this genre to the forefront of India's vibrant music culture.

name: DJ Tejas
about:
DJ Tejas is a name that has frequently appeared on the coveted "Page 3" of various publications, a testament to his captivating rise to fame in the music industry. Born out of a passion for experimentation, DJ Tejas' journey as a DJ began with his fascination with digital audio editing software. He spent countless hours honing his craft, creating an initial catalog of around 50 tracks that he would debut at intimate gatherings.

As he delved deeper into the world of music production, DJ Tejas invested in his own equipment and began an intense period of self-learning and practice. This multi-year apprenticeship allowed him to master a range of skills, laying the foundation for his future success as a talented DJ and music entertainer.

name: DJ Ankytrixx
about:
Growing up amidst the vibrant sounds of India, Ankit Kocher, known professionally as Ankytrixx, has been a passionate music enthusiast since his teenage years. With a self-taught background in music production and DJing, he has crafted a unique sound that resonates within the electronic music scene.

Ankytrixx's musical influences are a testament to his eclectic taste, having grown up listening to legendary DJs like John Digweed, Paul Oakenfold, and Nick Warren, among others. This diverse exposure has played a significant role in shaping his distinct style and approach to music production.

Ankytrixx has garnered significant recognition within the Indian nightlife scene, including being named DJ of the Year at the prestigious INCA (India Nightlife Convention Awards) in 2017. His dedication to his craft and commitment to pushing the boundaries of electronic music have earned him a loyal following and respect within the industry.

name: DJ Aqueel
about:
Aqeel Ali, better known as DJ Aqeel, has been a driving force behind the global dance music scene since 2000. With a passion for spinning tracks that ignited at the tender age of 16, this Indian DJ has etched his name as a trailblazer in the world of Bollywood music remixes.

As a highly sought-after DJ, Aqeel has had the privilege of sharing the decks with some of the world's most influential figures, including a prestigious double appearance at the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, where he represented India and performed for the likes of Bill Clinton and Kofi Annan.

DJ Aqeel's remarkable journey in music production began with the release of his album "Shake it Daddy Mix", which catapulted him to stardom. Since then, he has released an impressive nine blockbuster albums, selling over 7 million copies worldwide and revolutionizing the landscape of Bollywood music.

With a proven track record of electrifying crowds and pushing the boundaries of the music industry, DJ Aqeel continues to be a household name in the world of entertainment.

name: Aaryan Gala
about: With a career spanning over 15 years, Aaryan Gala has established himself as a seasoned DJ and producer. His collaborations with notable artists such as FLG, DVLM, and Don Diablo have been notable highlights in his journey. Aaryan's productions have garnered recognition from prominent labels, including Darklight and Smash Deep, which have played a significant role in showcasing his talent. His expertise makes him an ideal fit for a variety of events, including weddings, corporate gatherings, and college festivals, where his unique sound can elevate the atmosphere and leave a lasting impression.

A masterful storyteller with a deep passion for preserving Gujarat's cultural legacy, Rajbha continues to inspire and educate people through his work. name: Ashish Vidyarthi
about:
Ashish Vidyarthi's journey in the world of entertainment is a testament to his innate talent and family legacy. Born to a family of artists in Kerala, southern India, Ashish was exposed to the performing arts from a young age. His father, Govind Vidyarthi, a thespian in his own right, and his mother, Reba Vidyarthi, a renowned kathak dancer, instilled in him a passion for acting that would eventually become his calling.

Ashish's foray into the film industry began with the 1986 Kannada film 'Anand,' marking the start of a storied career that would span multiple regional film industries. His breakthrough in Bollywood came with the 1995 film 'Naajayaz,' a role that would set the tone for his future work as a versatile actor. With a career spanning decades, Ashish has established himself as a master of his craft, effortlessly taking on complex and often villainous roles that many actors shy away from.

Throughout his illustrious career, Ashish has received numerous accolades, including a National Film Award, as well as the Star Screen Award for Best Villain, Filmfare Award for Best Villain, and the Nandi Award for Best Character Actor. His commitment to his craft and his willingness to push boundaries have earned him a reputation as one of the most respected and sought-after actors in the industry.

With a profound understanding of the complexities of human experience, Oza's engaging narratives have resonated with audiences across the globe, transcending linguistic and cultural boundaries. As a masterful storyteller, Oza draws upon the rich literary traditions of Gujarat, infusing his kathas with a depth of emotion, nuance, and authenticity that captivates listeners of all ages. name: Kumar Vishwas
about:
Kumar Vishwas is a prominent Indian poet, social activist, and politician. Born on December 10, 1970, in a small village in Rajasthan, India, Vishwas' early life was marked by a deep connection to literature and social causes.

His rise to prominence began with his involvement in the Indian independence movement, which led to his association with the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS), a grassroots volunteer organization. Vishwas' poetic voice soon gained widespread recognition for its powerful and thought-provoking expressions on social issues.

As a poet, Vishwas has written extensively on themes such as social justice, love, and the human condition. His work is infused with a deep sense of empathy and a commitment to social change. Vishwas has been a vocal critic of corruption, poverty, and inequality, inspiring a new generation of young Indians to take action.

In addition to his literary pursuits, Vishwas has also been involved in politics, serving as a member of the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP). His entry into politics was driven by a desire to bring about meaningful change and to give voice to the marginalized communities.

Kumar Vishwas' unique blend of poetry, activism, and politics has made him a respected figure in Indian society. His work continues to inspire and challenge people to think critically about the world around them.

name: Nehal Gadhvi
about: Nehal Gadhvi is a renowned Indian motivational speaker known for her empowering messages and thought-provoking content. With a strong focus on women's empowerment, she has created a significant impact through her engaging videos, including her 2022 motivational speech and latest discourses.

about:

With a background in leading Nearbuy.com as its CEO and co-founder, Ankur has navigated the complexities of the digital landscape and emerged as a thought leader in his field. Beyond his professional endeavors, Ankur has established himself as a respected voice through his online presence, where he shares insights and experiences on building a successful personal brand. As a sought-after speaker, Ankur has the ability to inspire and educate audiences on various topics, from entrepreneurship to leadership. His unique blend of expertise and passion makes him an engaging and motivating presence on stage.

However, his journey eventually led him to the path of spirituality and self-discovery, where he found solace as a monk and a member of the International Society for Krishna Consciousness.

As he delves deeper into the world of personal growth and development, Das has become a sought-after authority on mindfulness, stress management, and holistic living. What sets Masoom apart is her ability to transcend genres, effortlessly shifting between soft, emotive melodies and vibrant, dance-inducing rhythms. This versatility has earned her a loyal following, with fans from diverse backgrounds united by their love for her music. As Masoom continues to evolve and grow as an artist, her commitment to authenticity and creativity remains unwavering. Her music is a testament to her passion, creativity, and perseverance, making her a standout talent in the ever-evolving music landscape. With a voice that is both soothing and invigorating, Masoom Minawala is a name to watch out for in the music world.

name: Shivani Kalra
about: Shivani Kalra, a seasoned commercial pilot, gained widespread recognition for her heroic efforts in evacuating 249 students stranded in war-torn Ukraine, safely returning them to their homes in India. As a sought-after speaker, she has shared her experiences at multiple TEDx events and has been profiled in prominent publications, including Vogue India. Her bravery and determination earned her a prominent role in 'Operation Ganga', cementing her status as a role model for young girls everywhere. For Shivani, success is a continuous cycle of goal-setting, achievement, and striving for even greater heights. With her unique blend of expertise in aviation, leadership, and resilience, she offers invaluable insights that can inspire and motivate audiences at events focused on personal growth and empowerment. Shivani's remarkable story and inspiring perspective make her an ideal choice for those seeking a compelling and thought-provoking speaker.

name: Deepinder Goyal
about:
Deepinder Goyal is a talented artist known for his captivating performances and soulful soundscapes. As a versatile musician, Goyal's work spans a range of genres, often incorporating elements of folk, rock, and pop to create a unique and infectious style.

With a commanding stage presence, Deepinder effortlessly connects with his audience, weaving a spell of intimacy and energy that draws listeners in and refuses to let go. Goyal's music has a way of transcending borders and genres, appealing to a diverse range of listeners who appreciate his honest and heartfelt songwriting. As a rising star in the music scene, Deepinder Goyal is an artist to watch, with a career that promises to be filled with creativity, passion, and a commitment to his art that is inspiring to behold. With a voice that is both soothing and powerful, Goyal's music has the ability to move and touch hearts in a way that few other artists can.

name: Amit Jain
about:
Amit Jain is a talented singer-songwriter known for his soulful voice and unique blend of folk and pop music. With a distinctive style that resonates with audiences of all ages, Jain's music often explores themes of love, self-discovery, and the human experience.

On stage, Amit Jain is a dynamic performer who connects with his audience through his authentic and heartfelt performances. His charismatic stage presence and engaging storytelling ability have earned him a loyal following and critical acclaim.

Amit Jain's music is characterized by its introspective and emotive quality, with a focus on storytelling through his lyrics. His songs often feature soaring melodies and a mix of acoustic and electronic elements, creating a rich and textured sound that sets him apart from other artists in the genre.

Throughout his career, Amit Jain has performed at various venues and festivals, sharing the stage with other notable artists and building a reputation as a talented and dedicated musician. With a growing fan base and a critically-acclaimed discography, Jain continues to make a name for himself in the music industry, and his music remains a source of inspiration for listeners around the world.

name: Deepa Malik
about:
Deepa Malik is a trailblazing Indian para athlete who has defied the odds to make a lasting impact in the world of athletics. Diagnosed with a severe health condition, she began her sports journey at the age of 30, showcasing the incredible resilience that has since become her hallmark.

Throughout her illustrious career, Deepa has demonstrated her versatility as a swimmer, biker, and javelin thrower, earning numerous accolades at various championships. Her remarkable achievement of winning medals in three consecutive Asian Para Games – 2010, 2014, and 2018 – solidifies her position as a pioneering figure in Indian para athletics.

At the 2016 Paralympics, Deepa made history by becoming the first Indian woman to win a Paralympic medal, claiming a silver in the shot put event. Her remarkable feat not only inspires but also underscores the unwavering dedication that has driven her to push beyond her limits.

Deepa's journey extends beyond the world of sports, as she became the first physically challenged individual in India to receive an official rally license, taking on the country's toughest car rallies as a navigator and driver. Her unwavering determination serves as a testament to the unrelenting spirit that defines her.

As a motivational force, Deepa embodies the essence of perseverance and courage in the face of adversity. Her remarkable story continues to captivate audiences, inspiring a new generation of individuals to pursue their passions with unwavering commitment and unrelenting drive.

name: Ghazal Alagh
about:

Her relentless pursuit of innovation and sustainability has not only made Mamaearth a household name but also a beacon of trust in the industry.

Through her unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction, Ghazal has led Mamaearth to achieve notable recognitions, including 'Best Brand of the Year' and the prestigious 'Super Start-Ups Asia Award' in 2019. As a seasoned entrepreneur and innovator, Ghazal shares her insights and experiences on navigating the complexities of entrepreneurship, innovation, and work-life balance, making her a sought-after speaker for corporate events, leadership summits, and business conferences. Her unique blend of entrepreneurial spirit, business acumen, and passion for sustainability makes her an inspiring figure in the world of entrepreneurship.

As a seasoned Shark Tank India investor, he has leveraged his expertise to fuel the growth of over 250 innovative companies.

As a successful business leader, Anupam Mittal offers invaluable insights into entrepreneurship, innovation, and leadership, gained from his extensive experience in navigating the ever-evolving digital landscape. His engaging and thought-provoking speaking style makes him an ideal choice for live corporate sessions, college fests, and other events seeking to inspire and educate audiences.

Known for his soulful renditions, Jignesh Dada's voice has brought to life the rich cultural heritage of Gujarat, particularly through his emotive kirtans. One such beloved composition, "Dwarika No Nath Maro Raja Ranchod Che," has resonated deeply with the people of Gujarat, leaving a lasting impression.

name: Babita Phogat
about:
Babita Phogat is an Indian singer-songwriter known for her soulful voice and eclectic blend of traditional Indian folk, Sufi, and contemporary music styles. Born in [Birthplace], Phogat's musical journey began at an early age, influenced by her family's rich cultural heritage.

With her powerful stage presence and emotive delivery, Babita Phogat has captivated audiences across the country. Her music is a reflection of her experiences, weaving together stories of love, heartbreak, and everyday life. Babita Phogat's music often features intricate instrumentation and poetic lyrics, showcasing her unique perspective on the world. As a rising star in the Indian music scene, Babita Phogat continues to push the boundaries of her craft. Her music is a celebration of Indian culture and tradition, while also embracing the global spirit of contemporary music. With her authentic voice and captivating stage presence, Babita Phogat is an artist to watch, and her music is sure to leave a lasting impression on listeners everywhere.
